Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

Lightning Rods take 10% of all damage you deal with [Tempest: Tempest, Lightning Bolt / Lightning Bolt] and Chain Lightning.

1264671.name: Starfall

This effect stacks.

51490.name: Thunderstorm
51490.description: Calls down a bolt of lightning, dealing 57 Nature damage to all enemies within 10 yards, reducing their movement speed by 40% for 5 sec, and knocking them away from the Shaman. Usable while stunned.

429280.name: Overheated

1223235.name: Arcane Sludge

1226111.name: Volatile Ejection

3110.name: Firebolt

81281.name: Fungal Growth

After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing (318.7% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (180% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

1245292.name: Destabilized

409231.name: Ground Rupture

453283.name: Flame Accelerant

1225582.name: Soul Calling

1271045.name: Harmonic Surge
1271045.description: Harmonic SurgeInstantRequires Monk MistweaverCasting Thunder Focus Tea guarantees that your next 2 casts of Tiger Palm or Vivify will trigger a Harmonic Surge, dealing [10 * (400% of Spell Power) / 100] Nature damage split between your target and other nearby enemies, and [40 * (500% of Spell Power) / 100] healing to up to 5 injured allies. BrewmasterCasting guarantees that your next 2 casts of Tiger Palm or Vivify will trigger a Harmonic Surge, dealing [55 * (400% of Spell Power) / 100] Nature damage split between your target and other nearby enemies, and [10 * (500% of Spell Power) / 100] healing to up to 5 injured allies.

201428.name: Annihilation
201428.description: Annihilation15 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterSlice your target for [(90.253% of Attack Power) + (141.829% of Attack Power)] Chaos damage. Annihilation has a 20% chance to refund 20 Fury.

441605.name: Ravage

450526.name: Aspect of Harmony

BrewmasterStore vitality from 25% of your damage dealt and 12% of your effective healing.For 10 sec after casting Celestial Brew your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional damage over 8 sec.

473663.name: Pulsing Shriek

465830.name: Warp Blood

19236.name: Desperate Prayer

285466.name: Lava Burst Overload
285466.description: Lava Burst Overload100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanHurls molten lava at the target, dealing [(138.996% of Spell Power) * 25 / 100] Fire damage. Lava Burst will always critically strike if the target is affected by Flame Shock.Generates 3 Maelstrom.

466298.name: Charged Claw

May only occur once per cast.

At 20 stacks, you summon a Thing from Beyond that casts Void Spike at nearby enemies for 20 sec. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

1237629.name: Mystic Lash

[The blow brands the victim, increasing the damage of Mystic Lash by 40% and Physical damage by 15% for 45 sec.This effect stacks. ][The blow brands the victim, increasing the damage of Mystic Lash by 12%.This effect stacks.]

472640.description: HogstriderInstantRequires Hunter Beast MasteryWhen your Boar deals damage, the damage of your next Cobra Shot is increased by 200%.Each target damaged by your Boar causes Cobra Shot to strike 1 additional target, up to 4. SurvivalWhen your Boar deals damage, the damage of your next Hatchet Toss is increased by 200%.Each target damaged by your Boar causes Hatchet Toss to strike 1 additional target, up to 4.

427911.name: Immolation Aura
427911.description: Immolation AuraInstantRequires Demon Hunter HavocEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.] DevourerEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.] VengeanceEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.]Generates 20 Fury over 6 sec.

1238369.name: Arcane Overload

Soar forward through the air at high speed for 1.5 sec.
 
If used again while active, you will land, reducing the movement speed of enemies within 8 yds by 70% for 4 sec.

381931.description: Mana SpringLevel 80100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanRequires level 10 RestorationYour Lava Burst and Riptide casts restore 38 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers. ElementalYour Lava Burst casts restore 25 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers. EnhancementYour Lava BurstStormstrike casts restore 38 mana to you and 4 allies nearest to you within 40 yards.Allies can only benefit from one Shaman's Mana Spring effect at a time, prioritizing healers.

405484.name: Surrendering to Corruption

1230168.name: Mortal Fragility

1217791.description: Electrocution Matrix300 yd range3 sec cast

[On Heroic and Mythic difficulties, the player triggering the Unstable Crawler Mine takes 500% increased damage from Unstable Crawler Mines for 1 min.]

81269.name: Efflorescence
81269.description: Restores 222 health to three injured allies within 10 yards of the initial target every 1.8 sec for 30 sec.

1225028.name: Ethereal Shards
1225028.description: Ethereal Shards100 yd range4 sec castTaz'Rah projects two shards toward a player. Each shard detonates on the first player it impacts inflicting 81352 Shadow damage. If both shards impact the player, that player suffers an additional 1016900 Shadow damage.

415492.name: Fungal Charge
415492.description: Fungal Charge40 yd range1.5 sec castFlies towards a target, leaving Gloopy Fungus in the caster's wake.

474421.name: Intimidation
474421.description:
Your Spotting Eagle descends from the skies, stunning your target for 5 sec.

This ability does not require line of sight when used against players.

430325.name: Inferno
430325.description: InfernoUnlimited rangeInstantThe Seeking Inferno ignites the player, inflicting 8929 Fire damage every 1 sec for 4 sec.

390844.name: Expiation
390844.description: Expiation100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestMind Blast and Shadow Word: Death consume 1 sec of Shadow Word: Pain, dealing damage equal to 300% of the amount consumed.

1239824.name: Lightfire
1239824.description: Lightfire100 yd range2 sec castRuia shoots a beam of energy at a player, burning them for 33049 Radiant damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.Upon expiration, Lightfire Beams emerge at the afflicted player's location.

408976.name: Dancing Steel
408976.description: Dancing SteelInstantSpins violently, inflicting 8819 Physical damage every 0.5 sec to enemies within 10 yards for 6 sec.

1256308.name: Dark Matter
1256308.description: Dark MatterInstantRequires Demon Hunter Havoc, DevourerYour first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing [(50% of Spell Power) * 12] Cosmic damage over 6 sec. VengeanceYour first Spirit Bomb after entering demon form causes a Shadowflame meteor shower to assault the area, dealing [(90% of Attack Power) * 12] Shadowflame damage over 6 sec.

467238.name: Riddled Darkness
467238.description: Riddled Darkness45 yd rangeInstant1.5 sec cooldownThe goon unleashes a hail of bullets at random targets in front of it, inflicting 3419 Shadow damage every 0.3 sec and inflicts a 2082 healing absorb for 5 sec.

395996.name: Dashing Scoundrel
395996.description: Dashing ScoundrelInstantRequires RogueEnvenom's effect also increases the critical strike chance of your weapon poisons by 5%, and their critical strikes generate 1 Energy.

1234251.name: Crushed
1234251.description: CrushedUnlimited rangeInstantThe target is crushed by intense gravity, stunning them and inflicting 72579 Cosmic damage every 1 sec for 4 sec.

1228198.name: Corroding Spittle
1228198.description: Corroding Spittle8 yd rangeInstantNibbles spits at players, inflicting 30507 Fire damage immediately and 55930 Fire damage every 3 sec for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

420240.name: Sunflame
420240.description: Sunflame300 yd rangeInstantA quick beam of solar light burns players for 16743 Fire damage.

440175.name: Battle Roar
440175.description: Battle Roar2 sec castLets forth an empowering roar, increasing the Haste of nearby allies by 25%.

465717.name: Elemental Blast
465717.description: Elemental Blast100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanHarnesses the raw power of the elements, dealing (299.562% of Spell Power) Elemental damage and increasing your Critical Strike or Haste by 3% or Mastery by (3 * 1.875)% for 10 sec.

264490.name: Legion Engineering
264490.description: Legion EngineeringInstantAllows an engineer to make basic contraptions up to a maximum potential skill of 100. Requires stone and metal found with the mining skill.

276111.name: Divine Steed
276111.description: Divine SteedInstantRequires PaladinRequires level 1Leap atop your Charger for 3 sec, increasing movement speed by 100%. Usable while indoors or in combat.

1234438.name: Catastrophic Awakening
1234438.description: Catastrophic AwakeningInstantDimensius's awakening blasts players away, inflicting 15 Shadow damage to players within 400 yards.

392388.name: Atrophic Poison
392388.description: Atrophic Poison100 yd rangeInstantRequires RogueCoats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by 3.0% for 10 sec.

1265326.name: Bloom Thorn
1265326.description: Bloom Thorn30 yd range2 sec castInflicts Holy damage to an enemy.

1246825.name: Searing Magma
1246825.description: Searing Magma50 yd rangeInstantThe Magma Totem pulses searing magma, inflicting 8 Fire damage to all players every 2 sec.

257622.name: Trick Shots
257622.description: Trick ShotsInstantRequires HunterWhen Multi-Shot hits 3 or more targets, your next Aimed Shot or Rapid Fire will ricochet and hit up to 5 additional targets for 60% of normal damage.

271658.name: Northrend Fishing
271658.description: Northrend FishingInstantAllows for players to gather fish from bodies of water and fishing nodes up to a skill of 75.

1266616.name: Demon Muzzle
1266616.description: Demon MuzzleInstantRequires Demon HunterInterrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

1216570.name: Fel Missiles
1216570.description: Fel Missiles100 yd rangeInstantLaunches disorderly missiles at an enemy, inflicting Fire damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.

468487.name: Incendiary Fire
468487.description: Incendiary Fire3 sec castThe Geargrinder focuses fire at several players for 6 sec, launching blazing shells at their location every 0.5 sec. Each shell inflicts 14655 Fire damage to players within 3 yards and burns away any Oil Slicks in the area.

390197.name: Ragefire
390197.description: RagefireInstantRequires Demon HunterEach time Immolation Aura deals damage, 30% of the damage dealt by up to 3 critical strikes is gathered as Ragefire.When Immolation Aura expires you explode, dealing all stored Ragefire damage to nearby enemies.

1263775.name: Fixate
1263775.description: Fixate40 yd rangeChanneled (8 sec cast)Chases down a random target, ignoring everyone else for 8 sec.

1277761.name: Sporecharged
1277761.description: SporechargedUnlimited rangeInstantThe Bloated Lasher's spores empower the Pesty Lashling, causing their attacks to inflict additional Nature damage for 8 sec.

1248010.name: Deathmark
1248010.description: DeathmarkUnlimited rangeInstantRequires RogueCarve a deathmark into an enemy, dealing (320% of Attack Power) Bleed damage and restoring 80 Energy to you over 16 sec. Damage dealt to the target by your Garrote, Rupture, and Lethal Poisons is increased by 100%.Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to the target, apply it twice.

1228126.name: Macestorm
1228126.description: MacestormInstantCharges to a random enemy and inflicts 4 Physical damage to enemies within 8 yards every 0.5 sec. for 6 sec.

263854.name: Savage Rend
263854.description: Savage RendMelee RangeInstant6 sec cooldownRequires HunterRequires level 1The Raptor slashes deep into the target, causing Mortal Wounds. Mortal WoundsGrievously wounds the target, reducing the effectiveness of any healing received for 10 sec.

409018.name: Infected Slop
409018.description: Infected Slop10 yd range4 sec cast3 sec cooldownInflicts 55119 Nature damage to an enemy on impact and an additional 1470 Nature damage every 1 sec for 15 sec.

1246666.name: Infected Pinions
1246666.description: Infected Pinions1.5 sec castNekraxx pierces all players with festering feathers, inflicting 12711 Plague damage every 1 sec for 30 sec.

387763.name: Panacea
387763.description: PanaceaInstantRequires EvokerEmerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for (200% of Spell Power) when cast.

1251779.name: Strike As One
1251779.description: Strike As One100 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterRequires level 1Consuming Tip of the Spear provokes your pet to attack your target, dealing (180% of Attack Power) Physical damage.All damage dealt by your pet is increased by 30%.

1244157.name: Piercing Howl
1244157.description: Piercing HowlInstantRequires WarriorRequires level 21Spurs all allies within 12 yards, increasing their movement speed by 30% for 4 sec.

1217855.name: Hot Wheels
1217855.description: Hot Wheels150 yd rangeInstantThe Geargrinder Biker charges towards a player's location, inflicting 14655 Fire damage to players in their path and knocking them back.

1237205.name: Voidstep

260242.name: Precise Shots
260242.description: Precise ShotsInstantRequires HunterRequires level 1Aimed Shot causes your next [Chimaera Shot / Arcane Shot] or Multi-Shot to deal 100% more damage, cost 60% less Focus, and have its global cooldown reduced by 100%.Your Auto Shot damage is increased by 100% but the time between your Auto Shots is increased by 2.0 sec.

1258134.name: Touch of the Archmage
1258134.description: Touch of the Archmage100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageWhen Touch of the Magi explodes, it leaves behind a pulsing rune on its target, dealing 75% of its damage over 6 sec to nearby enemies. Damage is increased by 50% on your initial Touch of the Magi target.

1228265.name: King's Hunger
1228265.description: King's HungerUnlimited range6 sec castSalhadaar drains the energy from the Voidwing, increases its damage taken by 100% and inflicting 16633 Shadow damage to all players every 1 sec for 30 sec.Upon completion, Salhadaar heals himself equal to the Voidwing's remaining health as the drake fades from existence.

292364.name: Embrace of Krag'wa
292364.description: Embrace of Krag'waInstantApproximately 1 procs per minuteTaking damage has a chance to grant you [Attack Power * 1.3 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] additional Health and [Attack Power * 0.02 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Armor.

462810.name: Weaver's Prodigy
462810.description: Weaver's ProdigyInstantProfessions Crafting and Gathering speed increased by 30%.

1248240.name: Infinite Possibilities
1248240.description: Infinite PossibilitiesChanneled (10 sec cast)Whenever a Living Mass' health is depleted, it enters a state of Infinite Possibilities for 10 sec, then restores all Living Mass to full health.Depleting the health of all Living Mass at the same time interrupts this effect and leaves them with only one possibility: Death.

409473.name: Lava Purge
409473.description: Lava Purge100 yd range3 sec castHurls fire at random player destinations, inflicting 55118 Fire damage to players within 5 yards.

5740.name: Rain of Fire
5740.description:
Calls down a rain of hellfire the target location, dealing 1,395 Fire damage over 7.1 sec to enemies in the area.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

1044.name: Blessing of Freedom
1044.description: Blesses a party or raid member, granting immunity to movement impairing effects for 8 sec.

1226648.name: Galactic Smash
1226648.description: Galactic SmashUnlimited rangeInstantImages of Salhadaar emerge alongside him to smash their targets with galactic force, applying Twilight Scar and inflicting 65321 Cosmic damage to all players. Players farther from each target take less damage. Salhadaar's primary target is Starshattered. A Dark Star forms at each impact location.

1256093.name: Shadowveil Annihilation
1256093.description: Shadowveil AnnihilationUnlimited rangeChanneled (30 sec cast)The caster defends themselves with shadow orbs while they inflict 2 Shadow damage to all players every 1 sec. When the channel ends, they inflict 200 Shadow damage to all players and stun them for 8 sec.If all orbs are destroyed, the channel is interrupted.

421898.name: Flaming Pestilence
421898.description: Flaming Pestilence500 yd range3 sec castGnarlroot causes patches of earth to explode with Shadowflame, inflicting 72552 damage to players within the blast.Some of these patches absorb the Shadowflame energy, forming dormant Tainted Treants and Tainted Lashers.

1243053.name: Fists of the Voidlord
1243053.description: Fists of the VoidlordInstantDimensius' melee attacks disrupt the very fabric of space, forcing his target into melee range if they can't be reached and inflicting 45362 Shadow damage to players within 8 yards of his target.The force of the impact knocks away other players within 8 yards of his target.

444834.name: Trollbane's Icy Fury
444834.description: Trollbane's Icy Fury30 yd rangeInstantRequires Death Knight Unholy shatters Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing (105.3% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. FrostObliterate and Frostscythe shatter Trollbane's Chains of Ice when hit, dealing (105.3% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to nearby enemies, and slowing them by 40% for 4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1248012.name: Killing Spree
1248012.description: Killing SpreeInstantValeera moves rapidly through the shadows, slashing at enemies for significant Physical damage.

1226507.name: Melee
1226507.description: MeleeUnlimited rangeInstantSalhadaar melees his target, inflicting 100% weapon damage.

1219607.name: Eradicating Salvo
1219607.description: Eradicating Salvo300 yd rangeInstantThe Plexus Sentinel targets a player to be purged, firing two missiles in quick succession. Each missile inflicts 461176 Arcane damage split evenly between players within 6 yards and knocking players away from the primary target.If a missile fails to hit at least 5 players, it instead inflicts 90723 Arcane damage to all players. []

1242197.name: Oxen Fortitude
1242197.description: Oxen Fortitude40 yd rangeInstant5 sec cooldownRequires MonkRequires level 1Casting Purifying Brew heals Niuzao, the Black Ox

1249248.name: Boundless
1249248.description: BoundlessInstantAfter 18 sec, the Nullbinder becomes immune to all forms of crowd control.

1252676.name: Crush Souls
1252676.description: Crush SoulsUnlimited range4.5 sec castRak'tul repeatedly leaps and slams down, inflicting 101690 Shadow damage to players within 5 yards. Each impact plants a Soulbind Totem.

343820.name: Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane
343820.description: Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red CraneInstantRequires MonkSummon an effigy of Chi-Ji for 25 sec that kicks up 3 Gust of Mists when you Blackout Kick, Rising Sun Kick, or Spinning Crane Kick, healing up to 2 allies for [(0.1% of Spell Power) * 50 / 100].Chi-Ji's presence makes you immune to movement impairing effects, makes Enveloping Mist instant cast, and reduces the mana cost of Enveloping Mist by 20%.

1264327.name: Shadowfrost Blast
1264327.description: Shadowfrost Blast40 yd range2.5 sec castThe caster inflicts 25 Shadowfrost damage to their target.

122.name: Frost Nova

109248.name: Binding Shot
109248.description: Fires a magical projectile, tethering the enemy and any other enemies within 5 yds for 10 sec, stunning them for 3 sec if they move more than 5 yds from the arrow.

455448.name: Candle Confidant
455448.description: Candle ConfidantItem EffectInstantYour spells have a chance to bring the candle to life, summoning a waxen ally to light up your enemies.

1247052.name: Lightbloom's Might
1247052.description: Lightbloom's MightUnlimited rangeInstantPlayers briefly borrow the power of the Lightbloom, increasing damage and healing done by 10% while suffering 10169 Holy damage every 1 sec for 12 sec. This effect stacks.

1250695.name: Insidious Aura
1250695.description: Insidious Aura100 yd rangeInstantInflicts 12 Nature damage to all enemies within 100 yards of the caster every 2 sec for 10 sec.

423588.name: Barrier of Light
423588.description: Barrier of LightInstantUpon reaching 50% health, Murrpray protects herself with a shield of light that absorbs the next 327841 damage and providing immunity to interrupt effects.

443574.name: Ox Stance
443574.description: Ox StanceInstantRequires MonkYou switch between alignments after an August Celestial assists you, increasing a corresponding secondary stat by 2%.Crane Stance:HasteTiger Stance:Critical StrikeOx Stance:VersatilitySerpent Stance: Mastery

468179.name: Rushing Wind Kick
468179.description: Rushing Wind KickInstantRequires MonkKick up a powerful gust of wind, dealing (179.75% of Attack Power) Nature damage in a 25 yd cone to enemies in front of you, split evenly among them. Damage is increased by 6% for each target hit, up to 30%. [ Mistweaver: Heals up to 5 allies affected by your heal over time effects for (500% of Spell Power)]

403265.name: Bronze Attunement
403265.description: Bronze AttunementInstant3 sec cooldownRequires EvokerAttune to Bronze magic, granting you and your 4 nearest allies 10% increased movement speed.

455491.name: Gloom Slash
455491.description: Gloom SlashMelee RangeInstantRequires WarlockTooth and claw are drenched in malignant shadow magic, causing the Gloomhound's melee attacks to deal an additional (31.7766% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

1244553.name: Hunger for Battle
1244553.description: Hunger for BattleInstantRequires DruidWhen an enemy afflicted by your Rip dies, gain 10 Energy and your damage dealt is increased by 5% for 8 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

470678.name: The First Dance
470678.description: The First DanceInstantRequires RogueRemaining out of combat for 6 sec increases the duration of your next Shadow Dance by 3 sec.

198069.name: Power of the Dark Side
198069.description: Power of the Dark Side100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestShadow Word: Pain has a chance to empower your next Penance with Shadow, increasing its effectiveness by 30%.

1224977.name: Arcing Mana
1224977.description: Arcing ManaUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster arcs beams of energy at players for 6 sec, inflicting 189 Arcane damage every 0.5 sec. This effect stacks.

1238502.name: Woven Ward
1238502.description: Woven WardUnlimited rangeInstantEach Infused Tangle is protected by a barrier of silk that prevents all damage. This barrier is broken when struck by Piercing Strand.

1227472.name: Besiege

205473.name: Icicles

Upon generating 5 Icicles, [Frostfire Bolt / Frostbolt] upgrades to Glacial Spike for its next cast. Glacial SpikeConjures a massive spike of ice that impales your target, dealing (1300% of Spell Power) damage and slowing the target's movement speed by 50% for 8 sec.Applies 3 stacks of Freezing.Icicles generate more rapidly out of combat.

443454.name: Ancestral Swiftness
443454.description:
Your next healing or damaging spell is instant, costs no mana, and deals 10% increased damage and healing.

If you know Nature's Swiftness, it is replaced by Ancestral Swiftness and causes Ancestral Swiftness to call an Ancestor to your side for 8 sec.

389539.name: Sentinel
389539.description:
Call upon the Light and gain 15 stacks of Divine Resolve, increasing your maximum health by 1% and reducing your damage taken by 2% per stack for 16 sec. After 5.0 sec, you will begin to lose 1 stack per second, but each 3 Holy Power spent will delay the loss of your next stack by 1 sec.

Combines with Avenging Wrath.

1254294.name: Pyroblast
1254294.description: Pyroblast50 yd range4 sec cast3 sec cooldownInflicts 40 Fire damage.

347600.name: Infused Ruby Tracking
347600.description: Infused Ruby TrackingItem EffectInstant5 sec cooldownTrack all nearby creatures and objects that need Infused Rubies.

427469.name: Fireball
427469.description: Fireball40 yd range2.5 sec castInflicts 12716 Fire damage.

1219450.name: Manifest Matrices
1219450.description: Manifest Matrices300 yd range2 sec castThe Plexus Sentinel fires Arcane energy into players, inflicting 8694 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Upon expiration, a Displacement Matrix is created.

411740.name: Summon Djaruun
411740.description: Summon DjaruunChanneled (5 sec cast)Rashok summons Djaruun, Pillar of Elder Flame to join him in battle.

442435.name: Glaive Flurry
442435.description: Glaive FlurryInstantRequires Demon Hunter VengeanceConsuming 20 Soul Fragments or casting Sigil of Spite converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive. Reaver's Glaive: Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing (310% of Attack Power) Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies. Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next and Soul Cleave.The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage. HavocConsuming 6 Soul Fragments or casting The Hunt converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive. Reaver's Glaive: Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing (310% of Attack Power) Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies. Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next Chaos Strike and Blade Dance.The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.

1265145.name: Refreshing Drink
1265145.description: Refreshing Drink40 yd rangeInstantRequires MonkUpon taking damage, automatically consume a refreshing drink to heal for (3200% of Attack Power) over 8 sec.

1250023.name: Shell Guard
1250023.description: Shell GuardUnlimited rangeInstantReduces incoming damage by 50%.

10060.name: Power Infusion
10060.description:
Infuses the target with power for 15 sec, increasing haste by 20%.

Can only be cast on players.

385127.name: Blessing of Dawn
385127.description: Blessing of DawnInstantRequires PaladinYour next Holy Power spending ability deals 30% additional increased damage and healing. This effect stacks.

193473.name: Mind Flay
193473.description: Mind Flay55 yd rangeChanneled (10 sec cast)Requires PriestAssaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing (321.8% of Spell Power) Shadow damage over 10 sec and slowing their movement speed by 30%.Generates 5 Insanity over the duration.

1241809.name: Cursed Stone Idol
1241809.description: Cursed Stone IdolLevel 8050 yd rangeInstantThe force slams the earth, dealing 11738 Nature damage to all nearby enemies and increasing Critical Strike by 17 per enemy hit, up to a maximum of 416.

1258609.name: Curse of Shadowfrost
1258609.description: Curse of ShadowfrostUnlimited range3 sec castThe caster curses their target, reducing their movement speed by 5% and inflicting Shadowfrost damage every 1 sec for 15 sec. This effect stacks.

1254168.name: Waking Nightmare
1254168.description: Waking Nightmare40 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidAwaken memories of past conflicts, causing a Dread Shade to take form nearby.While active, shades slowly travel toward your target, dealing (70% of Attack Power) Nature damage to nearby enemies and mirroring your Thrash casts.

374557.name: Brittle
374557.description: Brittle100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightYour diseases have a chance to weaken your enemy causing your attacks against them to deal 6% increased damage for 5 sec.

467223.name: Searing Slam
467223.description: Searing Slam12 yd range0.2 sec cast2 sec cooldownThe shredder smashes its current target, inflicting 41522 Fire damage and knocking them back. In addition, the ground under the target will explode inflicting 36637 Fire damage to all enemies within 12 yards.

1227124.name: Sacred Flame's Ward
1227124.description: While in Khaz Algar, dealing damage has a high chance of burning the enemy with righteous fire dealing 458 Radiant damage. In addition, you take 5% less damage.

1273875.name: Summoning 101
1273875.description: Summoning 101InstantCast a spell from the scribblings of a mad cult member.

1269878.name: Void Tentacles
1269878.description: Void TentaclesMelee RangeInstantInflicts 1 Shadow damage to an enemy.

258883.name: Trail of Ruin
258883.description: Trail of Ruin8 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterThe final slash of Blade Dance inflicts an additional (72% of Attack Power) Chaos damage over 4 sec.

1234573.name: Unbound Star-Eater
1234573.description: Unbound Star-Eater1.5 sec castSummons and dismisses this mount."In the void-scarred wake of the All-Devouring and his kith, twisted remnants of distant worlds and forgotten aeons find their way across the Great Dark."Drop: Dimensius, the All-DevouringZone: Manaforge Omega (Mythic)

1242135.name: Grievous Gash
1242135.description: Grievous Gash12 yd range2.5 sec castThe thornmaw rends its target, inflicting 50 Physical damage and causing them to bleed an additional 5 Physical damage every 1 sec for 16 sec or until fully healed. This effect stacks.

1249806.name: Arcing Mana
1249806.description: Arcing ManaUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster arcs beams of energy at players for 7.5 sec, inflicting 0 Arcane damage every 0.5 sec. This effect stacks.

450500.name: Arcane Barrage
450500.description: Arcane Barrage40 yd rangeInstantRequires MageRequires level 11Launches bolts of arcane energy at the enemy target, causing (240% of Spell Power) Arcane damage.

1236127.name: Soul Ejection
1236127.description: Soul Ejection30 yd rangeInstantThe Unbound soul rapidly ejects itself into the void upon death, inflicting 2 Arcane damage to players within 30 yards.

357211.name: Pyre
357211.description: Lob a ball of flame, dealing 1,527 Fire damage to your target and all enemies within 8 yds.

410089.name: Prescience
410089.description: Prescience100 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerGrant an ally the gift of foresight, increasing their critical strike chance by 3% [Fate Mirror: and occasionally copying their damage and healing spells at 15% power]for 18 sec.Affects the nearest ally within 25 yds, preferring damage dealers with their cooldowns active, if you do not have an ally targeted. (Proc chance: 25%)

1260217.name: Domineer
1260217.description: Domineer50 yd rangeInstantCaster channels extreme amounts of shadow energy into their target, inflicting 2 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 5 sec, and leaving behind Domineering Energy.

1217087.name: Consuming Shadows
1217087.description: Consuming Shadows200 yd rangeInstant3 sec cooldownRequires level 10Devouring Voidcaller inflicts 10 Shadow damage to all players within line of sight and heals for 100% of the damage inflicted.

77575.name: Outbreak
77575.description:
Inflicts the target with Dread Plague and Virulent Plague.

Dread Plague
A malicious plague that deals 102 Shadow damage over 24 sec. Explodes for 64 Shadow damage to nearby enemies and infects one when the host dies. Can only be applied to 1 host at a time.

Virulent Plague
An infectious plague that spreads to all nearby enemies, dealing 60 Shadow damage over 24 sec.

125883.name: Zen Flight
125883.description: You fly through the air at a quick speed on a meditative cloud.

375226.name: Time Spiral
375226.description: Time Spiral100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightBend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

127801.name: Composting
127801.description: CompostingInstantComposting into the ground, it will disappear after 5 min.

31687.name: Summon Water Elemental
31687.description: Summons a Water Elemental to follow and fight for you.

107270.name: Spinning Crane Kick
107270.description: Spin while kicking in the air, dealing 14 Physical damage over 1.3 sec to all enemies within 8 yds. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

1236207.name: Astral Surge
1236207.description: Astral SurgeUnlimited rangeInstantThe Arcane Collector surges with energy if it contacts an Arcane Manifestation, inflicting 121703 Arcane damage to all players and an additional 45362 Arcane damage every 2 sec for 16 sec.

410836.name: Earthen Grasp
410836.description: Earthen GraspInstantNeltharion causes the earth to encase all enemies for until canceled.

198030.name: Eye Beam
198030.description: Eye BeamUnlimited rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterBlasts all enemies in front of you, [Looks Can Kill: dealing guaranteed critical strikes] for up to {?a320415[{[(40.26% of Attack Power) * 10 * 2]][{[(40.26% of Attack Power) * 10]] Chaos damage over 2 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. [Furious Gaze: When Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by an additional 8% for 8 sec]

450531.name: Aspect of Harmony
450531.description: Aspect of HarmonyInstantRequires Monk MistweaverStore vitality from 10% of your damage dealt and 30% of your healing. Vitality stored from overhealing is reduced.For 10 sec after casting Thunder Focus Tea your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional healing over 8 sec. BrewmasterStore vitality from 25% of your damage dealt and 12% of your effective healing.For 10 sec after casting Celestial Brew your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional damage over 8 sec.

386208.name: Defensive Stance
386208.description:
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15% and all damage you deal by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

409722.name: Temporal Wound
409722.description: Temporal Wound100 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerFly to the targeted location, exposing a Temporal Wound on enemies in your path for 10 sec [Sands of Time: and granting Ebon Might for 5 sec / .]Removes roots and grants immunity to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying. Temporal Wound15% of damage dealt by allies affected by Ebon Might is copied as additional Arcane damage to enemies after 10 sec.Damage is reduced if Ebon Might affects more than 2 other allies.

390617.name: From Darkness Comes Light
390617.description: From Darkness Comes LightInstantRequires PriestEach time Shadow Word: Pain [ Holy: or Holy Fire] deals damage, the healing of your next Flash Heal is increased by 3%, up to a maximum of [60][60]%.

1283703.name: Necrotic Slam
1283703.description: Necrotic Slam40 yd range4 sec castInflicts 15 Shadow damage to enemies within 8 yards.

411903.name: Shadow Canister
411903.description: Shadow Canister2 sec castThe chemist throws a bottle of dark liquid at a location inflicting 29396 Shadow damage to players within 4 yards. The liquid creates a pool of Gloom Fluid and releases a Shadow Additive.

378286.name: Tyr's Enforcer
378286.description: Tyr's Enforcer100 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinYour Avenger's Shield is imbued with holy fire, causing it to deal [(12% of Attack Power)] Holy damage to all enemies within 5 yards of each target hit.

422243.name: World In Flames
422243.description: World In Flames300 yd rangeInstantSmolderon channels his blazing soul into Emberscar, periodically causing bursts of fire to engulf portions of the arena. This inflicts 89295 Fire damage and applies Lingering Burn to all players caught within the blast.

196811.name: Searing Light
196811.description: Searing Light100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestBlast the target with a beam of light, dealing (75.1716% of Spell Power) damage.

450696.name: "The 50 Verses of Resilience"
450696.description: "The 50 Verses of Resilience"Item EffectInstantAdvance to the 50 Verses of Inner Resilience, reading as you are attacked.Inner Resilience increases your armor by 183 and grants your attacks a chance to invoke a ward which absorbs 17743 Magic damage. When finished, sift through the passages to another chapter.Valid only for tank specializations.

1228069.name: Unbound Rage
1228069.description: Unbound RageInstantUpon reaching 50% health, Loom'ithar rips itself free of its bindings, incurring a great wound that increases its damage taken by 33%. As it crashes down, Loom'ithar inflicts 26083 Physical damage to all players and knocking them away.Arcane Ichor pours endlessly from its severed half above.

1262075.name: Coalescing Malediction
1262075.description: Coalescing Malediction100 yd range2.5 sec castEsuritus infuses his target with cosmic energy, inflicting 1 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 14 sec. When this is removed, the energy summons forth a Voidcaller.

1228216.name: Arcane Obliteration
1228216.description: Arcane Obliteration300 yd range5.5 sec castAraz unleashes a burst of energy onto his current target, inflicting 226830 Arcane damage to all players. The damage is reduced by the number of players within 10 yards of the impact location. Players within 10 yards of the impact location also have 182412 healing absorbed and suffer Astral Mark.Additionally an Arcane Echo is summoned at the location.

269005.name: Stormfury
269005.description: Stormfury40 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanRequires level 1Channel the energy of the storms at your target, causing (200% of Spell Power) Nature damage to all enemies within 8 yards every 1 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.The damage of this ability increases by 5% every time it deals damage.

1242883.name: Soul Tether
1242883.description: Soul TetherUnlimited rangeInstantThe casters bind several players together for 24 sec, causing them to snap towards each other and suffer 45362 Chaos damage if they move further than 14 yards apart.

398458.name: Well Fed
398458.description: Well FedLevel 80InstantIncreases all secondary stats by 1 and your size for 1 hour.

105421.name: Blinding Light
105421.description: Blinding LightInstantRequires PaladinRequires level 50Emits dazzling light in all directions, blinding enemies within 10 yds, causing them to wander disoriented for 6 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

361469.name: Living Flame
361469.description: Send a flickering flame towards your target, dealing 871 Fire damage to an enemy or healing an ally for 2,301.

77478.name: Earthquake
77478.description:
Causes the earth within 8 yards of the target location to tremble and break, dealing 1,327 Nature damage over 6 sec and has a 5% chance to knock the enemy down. Multiple uses of Earthquake may overlap.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

455447.name: Not-So-Gentle Flame
455447.description: Not-So-Gentle FlameMelee RangeInstantYour spells have a chance to bring the candle to life, summoning a waxen ally to light up your enemies.

1271066.name: Entropy Blast
1271066.description: Entropy BlastUnlimited rangeInstantDegentrius unleashes an Entropy Blast at its primary target inflicting Physical damage.

429091.name: Inner Fire
429091.description: Inner Fire10 yd range2 sec castEmpowered by the light, increasing all damage done by 50%.Removal of Inner Fire causes the target to feel Overwhelmed, stunning for 4 sec.

393763.name: Umbral Embrace
393763.description: Umbral EmbraceInstantRequires DruidWrath and Starfire have a 20% chance to cause your next Wrath or Starfire cast during an Eclipse to become Astral and deal 75% additional damage.

390692.name: Borrowed Time
390692.description: Borrowed TimeInstantRequires PriestCasting Power Word: Shield increases your Haste by 5% for 4 sec.

468226.name: Lightning Conduit
468226.description: Lightning ConduitInstantRequires ShamanYou have a chance to get struck by lightning, increasing your movement speed by 50% for 5 sec. The effectiveness is increased to 100% in outdoor areas.You call down a Thunderstorm when you Reincarnate.

387385.name: Backlash
387385.description: BacklashInstantRequires WarlockIncreases your critical strike chance by 2%.Physical attacks against you have a 20% chance to make your next Incinerate instant cast. This effect can only occur once every 6 sec.

450442.name: Poisoned Claws
450442.description: Poisoned ClawsInstantThe caster's claws drip with poison, causing melee attacks to have a chance to inflict additional Nature damage. (6s cooldown)

1244918.name: Lake of Fire
1244918.description: Lake of Fire100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarlockCataclysm now leaves behind a lake of fire that deals [(60% of Spell Power) * 10] Fire damage to enemies within it over 10 sec.Immolate deals 20% increased damage to enemies within the lake of fire.

1229863.name: Evercore Shade
1229863.description: Evercore Shade2 sec cast2 Tools:Arclight Spanner, Gyromatic Micro-AdjustorReagents:EvercoreOptional Reagents:Add Embellishment (#499), Amplify Secondary Stat (#459), Empower (#470), Artisan's Authenticity (#388) Profession Trainer: Midnight Engineering (1)Cost: 60Evercore ShadeItem Level 44Binds when equippedHeadLeather10 Armor+9 [Agility or Intellect]+14 Stamina+18 Random Stat 1Durability 85 / 85Requires Level 58Requires Midnight Engineering (1)Sell Price: 3

433550.name: Rite of Sanctification
433550.description: Rite of SanctificationInstantRequires PaladinImbue your weapon with the power of the Light, increasing your armor by 5% and your primary stat by 2%.Lasts 1 hour.

1228115.name: Netherbreaker
1228115.description: NetherbreakerUnlimited range2 sec castSalhadaar hurls his mace which ricochets between several targets, inflicting 130037 Shadow damage within 30 yards of each impact.

466153.name: Bad Belated Boom
466153.description: Bad Belated BoomUnlimited rangeInstantLoaded with out-of-compliance "safety fuse" these bombs scatter detonating late inflicting 41523 Fire damage to players within 7 yards and applies Blast Burns.

1265751.name: Felfire Fist
1265751.description: Felfire FistInstantRequires Demon HunterActivating Infernal Strike out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat places a Sigil of Flame at the target location.

1250557.name: Void Execution Mandate
1250557.description: Void Execution MandateLevel 90Item Effect100 yd rangeInstant2 min cooldownMark your target for execution, increasing your Haste by 185 for 20 sec. While the target is marked, each of your attacks against them grants an additional 13 Critical Strike, as the Void urges you to finish the kill, up to a maximum of (13 * 15) Critical Strike.

1237615.name: Overflowing Void
1237615.description: Overflowing VoidItem EffectInstantRequires Priest DisciplineVoid Blast now also causes Entropic Rift to grow, Collapsing Void increases Entropic Rift's damage by an additional 10%, and the damage of your next Mind Blast is increased by up to 200% based on the size of Entropic Rift when it collapses. Holy, ShadowVoid Blast now also causes Entropic Rift to grow, Collapsing Void increases Entropic Rift's damage by an additional 10%, and the damage of your next Void Torrent is increased by up to 200% based on the size of Entropic Rift when it collapses.

385042.name: Gushing Wound
385042.description: Gushing Wound100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarriorBloodthirst critical strikes generate 4 additional Rage, and inflict a Gushing Wound that leeches (1139 * 3) health over 6 sec.

1230999.name: Dark Matter
1230999.description: Dark Matter1000 yd rangeInstantDimensius sweeps his enormous hand over all players and blasts them with dark matter, inflicting 49898 Shadow damage to players within 4 yards on impact.

1229325.name: Oblivion
1229325.description: OblivionUnlimited rangeInstantDimensius instantly devours any player who enters his body for any reason, killing them horribly.

267997.name: Bile Spit
267997.description: Bile Spit40 yd range2 sec castRequires WarlockRequires level 1Requires WeaponsThe Vilefiend spits a ball of bile at its target, dealing [(81.6% of Spell Power) * 1] Nature damage and an additional [(24% of Spell Power) * 1] Nature damage every 2 sec for 10 sec.

421603.name: Incarnation: Owl of the Flame
421603.description: Incarnation: Owl of the Flame2 sec castTindral shapeshifts into a flaming owl.

160060.name: Deadly Sting
160060.description: Deadly StingMelee RangeInstant6 sec cooldownRequires HunterRequires level 1The Scorpion lashes out with its tail, stinging the target and causing the Mortal Wounds effect. Mortal WoundsGrievously wounds the target, reducing the effectiveness of any healing received for 10 sec.

102558.name: Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc
102558.description:
An improved Bear Form that grants the benefits of Berserk, causes Mangle to hit up to 3 targets, and increases maximum health by 30%.

Lasts 30 sec. You may freely shapeshift in and out of this improved Bear Form for its duration.

119996.name: Transcendence: Transfer
119996.description: Transcendence: Transfer40 yd rangeInstant45 sec cooldownRequires MonkRequires level 32Your body and spirit swap locations.

449209.name: Authority of Fiery Resolve
449209.description: Authority of Fiery ResolveInstantArathor Alterations - Fortified FlamesPermanently enchants a weapon with the Authority of Fiery Resolve. Healing allies has a chance to call upon that authority, radiating a wave of soothing fire that heals yourself and your 4 closest allies for 875. Cannot be applied to items lower than level 70.

97547.name: Solar Beam
97547.description: Solar Beam100 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidRequires level 16You summon a beam of solar light over the enemy target's location, interrupting the enemy target and silencing all enemy targets under the beam while it is active. Solar Beam lasts for 8 sec.

1217607.name: Void Metamorphosis
1217607.description: Void MetamorphosisInstantRequires Demon HunterRequires 50 Soul FragmentsYou ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.

347901.name: Veiled Augmentation
347901.description: Veiled AugmentationLevel 80Item EffectInstantIncreases Agility, Intellect and Strength by 5 for 1 hour. Augment Rune.

386652.name: Bulwark of Righteous Fury

1252622.name: Flailstorm

1215159.name: Inertia
1215159.description: Inertia100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterThe Hunt and Vengeful Retreat cause your next Fel Rush or Felblade to empower you, increasing damage by 18% for 5 sec.

1269520.name: Massive Freezing Trap
1269520.description: Massive Freezing TrapInstantPick up a Massive Freezing Trap, reducing your movement speed by 50%.

370564.name: Stasis
370564.description: Stasis100 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerRequires level 60Causes your next 3 helpful spells to be duplicated and stored in a time lock. You may reactivate Stasis any time within 30 sec to quickly unleash their magic.

1604.name: Dazed
1604.description: DazedMelee RangeInstantA concussive strike dismounts the target and reduces movement speed by 50% for 4 sec.

1228070.name: Unbound Rage
1228070.description: Unbound RageInstantUpon reaching 50% health, Loom'ithar rips itself free of its bindings, incurring a great wound that increases its damage taken by 33%. As it crashes down, Loom'ithar inflicts 26083 Physical damage to all players and knocking them away.Arcane Ichor pours endlessly from its severed half above.

1267227.name: Shade Cleave
1267227.description: Shade Cleave100 yd range3 sec castCaster cleaves the area in front of them, sending a line of energy outward inflicting 40 Shadow damage and slowing players hit by 30% for 8 sec.

1224025.name: Mystic Lash
1224025.description: Mystic LashUnlimited rangeInstantThe Soulbinder Naazindhri lashes out at her current target, inflicting 35533 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 5 sec. [The blow brands the victim, increasing the damage of Mystic Lash by 40% and Physical damage by 15% for 45 sec.This effect stacks. ][The blow brands the victim, increasing the damage of Mystic Lash by 12%.This effect stacks.]

43308.name: Find Fish
43308.description: Find FishInstant1.5 sec cooldownNearby fishing nodes appear on the minimap.

434587.name: Summon Overfiend
434587.description: Summon Overfiend100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarlockGenerates 1 Soul Shard Fragment every 1 sec and casts Chaos Bolt at 80% effectiveness at its summoner's target. Lasts 8 sec.

451038.name: Arcane Soul
451038.description: Arcane SoulInstantRequires MageArcane Barrage grants Clearcasting and generates 4 Arcane Charges.Each cast of Arcane Barrage grants 5 stacks of Arcane Salvo and casting Arcane Barrage does not consume Arcane Salvo.

157348.name: Call Lightning
157348.description: Call Lightning40 yd range2 sec cast20 sec cooldownRequires ShamanRequires level 1Call down a lightning strike on an enemy, dealing (270% of Spell Power) Nature damage, and leaving the Storm Elemental charged with energy for 20 sec.While charged, the Storm Elemental's damage is increased by 30%.

198813.name: Vengeful Retreat
198813.description: Vengeful RetreatInstantRequires Demon HunterRemove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take (16% of Attack Power) Physical damage [Vengeful Bonds: and have their movement speed reduced by 70% for 3 sec].

471225.name: Gatling Cannon
471225.description: Gatling CannonUnlimited rangeInstantGallywix's barrels spit hot lead inflicting 43965 Physical damage, increasing by up to 200% as distance to the target increases.

1248126.name: Paid in Blood
1248126.description: Paid in BloodInstantIncreases Valeera and all allies' primary stat by 10% for 20 sec.

386237.name: Fade to Nothing
386237.description: Fade to NothingInstantRequires RogueGaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shroud of Concealment increases movement speed by 10% for 10 sec.

1227742.name: Piercing Strand
1227742.description: Piercing StrandUnlimited rangeInstantLoom'ithar launches a heavily infused strand through their current target at high speed, inflicting 173886 Arcane damage to all players in a line and increasing damage taken from Piercing Strand by 1000% for 45 sec.

363534.name: Rewind
363534.description:
Rewind 30% of damage taken in the last 5 seconds by all allies within 40 yds. Always heals for at least 760.

Healing increased by 100% when not in a raid.

471990.name: Bear Summon
471990.description: Bear Summon100 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterWhile in combat, every 30 sec your next Kill Command summons the aid of a Beast. WyvernA Wyvern descends from the skies, letting out a battle cry that increases the damage of you and your pets by 10% for 12 sec. BoarA Boar charges through your target 1 time, dealing (1200% of Attack Power) physical damage to the primary target and (1440% of Attack Power) damage to up to 5 nearby enemies. BearA Bear leaps into the fray, rending the flesh of your enemies, dealing (400% of Attack Power) damage over 10 sec to up to 8 nearby enemies.

2565.name: Shield Block
2565.description: Raise your shield, blocking all melee attacks against you for 6 sec.

377129.name: Golden Path
377129.description: Golden Path100 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinRequires level 1Consecration heals you and 5 allies within it for [(5% of Attack Power)] every 1 sec.

1261558.name: Lightscar Flare
1261558.description: Lightscar Flare60 yd rangeInstantA fractured image of Lothraxion strikes at Nysarra, causing her wound to flare and stunning her for 18 sec. Players caught in the image's blast suffer 76228 Holy damage and are disoriented for 5 sec.Standing in the wound's flare increases the target's healing done by 30% and damage dealt to Nysarra by 300% but inflicts 35592 Holy damage every 1 sec until she recovers.

386730.name: Divine Resonance
386730.description: Divine Resonance30 yd rangeInstantRequires Paladin ProtectionAfter casting Divine Toll, you instantly cast Avenger's Shield every 5 sec for 15 sec. RetributionAfter casting Divine Toll, you instantly cast Judgment every 5 sec for 15 sec. HolyAfter casting Holy Prism, Holy Armament, or Divine Toll, you instantly cast Holy Shock every 5 sec for 15 sec.

415404.name: Fungalstorm
415404.description: FungalstormInstantSpin rapidly, striking all nearby enemies for 6206 Physical damage every 1 sec.

184367.name: Rampage
184367.description:
Unleash a series of 4 brutal strikes for a total of 104 Physical damage.

Enrages you.

468207.name: Incendiary Fire
468207.description: Incendiary FireInstantThe Geargrinder focuses fire at several players for 6 sec, launching blazing shells at their location every 0.5 sec. Each shell inflicts 14655 Fire damage to players within 3 yards and burns away any Oil Slicks in the area.

455443.name: Light Up!
455443.description: Light Up!40 yd range2 sec castYour spells have a chance to bring the candle to life, summoning a waxen ally to light up your enemies.

468938.name: Sunseeker Mushroom
468938.description: Sunseeker MushroomUnlimited rangeInstantRequires DruidSunfire damage has a chance to grow a magical mushroom at a target's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing (265.85% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (150% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

377077.name: Rage of the Frozen Champion
377077.description: Rage of the Frozen ChampionInstantRequires Death KnightFrost Strike and Glacial Advance have a 15% increased chance to trigger Rime and Howling Blast generates 8 Runic Power while Rime is active.

382024.name: Earthliving Weapon
382024.description: Earthliving Weapon100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanRequires level 10Imbue your weapon with the element of Earth for 1 hour. Your Riptide, Healing Wave, and Chain Heal healing has a 20% chance to trigger Earthliving on the target, healing for (138.915% of Spell Power) over 6 sec.

1236111.name: Lightning Strike
1236111.description: Lightning StrikeUnlimited rangeInstantYour spells and abilities have a chance to turn you into a Lightning Rod striking a random enemy target within 40 yds for (1 * 1305) Nature damage every 3 sec for 15 sec.

398950.name: Aberrant Melting Fluid
398950.description: Aberrant Melting FluidItem Effect5 sec castSynthesize a soulbound Aberrus, the Shadowed Crucible Class Head item appropriate for your class.

466248.name: 1500-Pound "Dud"
466248.description: 1500-Pound "Dud"Unlimited rangeInstantDUD-1500 munitions embed into the arena exploding after 15 sec inflicting 80 Fire damage to all players plus an additional 30 Fire damage every 3 sec for 9 sec. This effect stacks.Interacting with the ordnance instead focuses the blast inflicting 160 Physical damage and applying Focused Detonation, additionally knocking back.

2484.name: Earthbind Totem
2484.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 20 sec that slows the movement speed of enemies within 10 yards by 50%.

255546.name: Poison Bomb
255546.description: Poison Bomb100 yd rangeInstantRequires RogueEnvenom has a 5% chance per combo point spent to smash a vial of poison at the target's location, creating a pool of acidic death that deals [(38.3328% of Attack Power) * 4] Nature damage over 2 sec to all enemies within it.

468616.name: Leaping Spark
468616.description: Leaping SparkUnlimited rangeChanneled (0 sec cast)Geezle consumes 40 Electricity to galvanize several Leaping Sparks that fixate players.Upon contact, the spark inflicts 40 Nature damage and stuns for 8 sec.

443106.name: Courage of the White Tiger
443106.description: Courage of the White Tiger100 yd rangeInstantRequires MonkRequires level 1 WindwalkerTiger Palm has a chance to cause Xuen to claw your target for (337.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage, healing a nearby ally for 100% of the damage done.Invoke Xuen, the White Tiger guarantees your next cast activates this effect. MistweaverTiger Palm, Vivify, and Sheilun's Gift have a chance to cause Xuen to claw a nearby enemy for (337.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage, healing a nearby ally for 100% of the damage done.Invoke Yu'lon, the Jade Serpent or Invoke Chi-Ji, the Red Crane guarantees your next cast activates this effect.

1226951.name: Arcane Infusion
1226951.description: Arcane InfusionInstantThe caster infuses players within 60 yards with arcane energy, inflicting 26461 Arcane damage and an additional 6426 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.Additionally, Budding Silkworms within 60 yards receive Arcane Bites.

444686.name: Reaver's Glaive
444686.description: Reaver's GlaiveInstantRequires Demon Hunter VengeanceConsuming 20 Soul Fragments or casting Sigil of Spite converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive. Reaver's Glaive: Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing (310% of Attack Power) Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies. Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next and Soul Cleave.The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage. HavocConsuming 6 Soul Fragments or casting The Hunt converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive. Reaver's Glaive: Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing (310% of Attack Power) Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies. Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next Chaos Strike and Blade Dance.The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.

427681.name: Fiery Blastwave
427681.description: Fiery BlastwaveInstantTindral lands with a fiery impact, inflicting 0 Fire damage to players within 60 yards and knocking them back.

450752.name: Feast of Souls
450752.description: Feast of SoulsInstantRequires WarlockWhen you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.

1246160.name: Voidsurge
1246160.description: VoidsurgeInstantRequires Demon Hunter HavocMetamorphosis now also causes Demon Blades to generate 3 additional Fury.While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Demonsurge, causing you to explode with Fel energy, dealing (280% of Attack Power) Chaos damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. DevourerVoid Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash.While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing (625% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

190446.name: Brain Freeze
190446.description: Brain Freeze100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageRequires level 10[Frostfire Bolt / Frostbolt] has a 25% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Flurry and cause your next Flurry to deal 50% increased damage.

448666.name: Kablooey!
448666.description: Kablooey!8 yd rangeInstantOn death, 25% chance that the dynamite in the backpack explodes on death, inflicting 7757 Fire damage to enemies within 5 yards.

213764.name: Swipe
213764.description: Swipe nearby enemies, inflicting Physical damage. Damage varies by shapeshift form.

1216788.name: Carrying Oil
1216788.description: Carrying Oil300 yd rangeInstantCarrying an oil canister for 30 sec.Coming within 7 yards of a bike with an Empty Tank fuels the bike.

1252548.name: Fiery Landing
1252548.description: Fiery LandingInstantEmberdawn inflicts 1 Fire damage to players within 18 yards upon landing.

382440.name: Shifting Power
382440.description: Shifting Power5% of base manaChanneled (4 sec cast)1 min cooldownRequires MageDraw power from within, dealing [(60.996% of Spell Power) * 4] Arcane damage over 4 sec to enemies within 18 yds. While channeling, your Mage ability cooldowns are reduced by 12 sec over 4 sec.

1249953.name: Vampiric Reaping
1249953.description: Vampiric Reaping10 yd rangeInstant20 sec cooldownValeera stabs an enemy and rips away some of its life force, inflicting (450% of Attack Power) Physical damage, creating Reaped Orbs and heals the player with the lowest health. Collecting these Orbs heals the player.

1249815.name: Transference
1249815.description: Transference40 yd range2.5 sec castImbues a target with a rerouting essence causing all incoming healing received by the target to be redirected to the caster. (2s cooldown)

1236770.name: Arcane Geyser
1236770.description: Arcane Geyser300 yd range3 sec castCaster unleashes arcane energies from the ground, inflicting 12 Arcane damage to players caught in the blast.

1228213.name: Astral Harvest
1228213.description: Astral HarvestUnlimited range3 sec castThe Arcane Collector draws energy from several players, inflicting 15147 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 4 sec. Upon expiration, an Arcane Manifestation forms at each player's location.

1276672.name: Summon Doomguard
1276672.description:
Summons a Doomguard to assist you in combat for 12 sec. Consuming a Demonic Core reduces the cooldown of Summon Doomguard by 3 sec.

 Doom Bolt Volley
Sends a volley of malefic bolts at 5 enemies within 40 yds, inflicting 1,563 Shadow damage to each target.

427490.name: Ride Along
427490.description: Ride AlongInstantA member of your group can ride along with you on your mount.

68530.name: Cologne Immune
68530.description: Cologne ImmuneItem Effect20 yd rangeInstantNegates the harmful effects of Irresistible Cologne. The caster can only be immune to one "scent" at a time.

344572.name: Bestial Wrath
344572.description: Sends you and your pet into a rage, instantly dealing 280 Physical damage to its target, and increasing all damage you both deal by 20% for 15 sec. Removes all crowd control effects from your pet.

1231497.name: Overgorged
1231497.description: OvergorgedInstantBursts upon death, inflicting 1060 Shadow damage every 1 sec to all players for 5 sec.

253595.name: Inexorable Assault
253595.description: Inexorable AssaultInstantRequires Death KnightRequires level 1Gain Inexorable Assault every 4 sec, stacking up to 5 times. 1233702.description: VanquishUnlimited rangeInstantSalhadaar cleaves his current target, inflicting 120964 Physical damage and an additional 190519 Shadow damage to all players in front of him, knocking them away. Increases damage taken from Vanquish by 500% for 20 sec.

451767.name: Whirling Dragon Punch
451767.description: Whirling Dragon Punch100 yd rangeInstantRequires MonkPerforms a devastating whirling upward strike, dealing [3 * (241.5% of Attack Power)] damage to all nearby enemies and an additional (450% of Attack Power) damage to the first target struck. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.Only usable while both Fists of Fury and Rising Sun Kick are on cooldown.

110960.name: Greater Invisibility
110960.description: Greater InvisibilityInstantRequires MageMakes you invisible and untargetable for 20 sec, removing all threat. Any action taken cancels this effect.

292360.name: Embrace of Bwonsamdi
292360.description: Embrace of BwonsamdiInstantApproximately 3 procs per minuteYour damaging abilities have a chance to deal [Attack Power * 0.22 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Shadow damage and heal you for 100% of the damage done.

115203.name: Fortifying Brew
115203.description: Turns your skin to stone for 15 sec.

115867.name: Mana Tea
115867.description: Mana TeaInstantRequires MonkConsumes 1 stack of Mana Tea per 0.5 sec to restore 1080 Mana.Can be cast while moving, but movement speed is reduced by 40% while channeling.

462180.name: Hearty Well Fed
462180.description: Hearty Well FedInstantIncreases Haste by 0 for 1 hour.

455489.name: Gloom Slash
455489.description: Gloom SlashInstantRequires WarlockTooth and claw are drenched in malignant shadow magic, causing the Gloomhound's melee attacks to deal an additional (31.7766% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

444248.name: Summon Mograine
444248.description: Summon MograineInstantRequires Death KnightSpending Runes has a chance to call forth the aid of a Horsemen for 10 sec.MograineCasts Death and Decay at his location that follows his position and extends the duration of your diseases by 1.0 sec whenever it deals damage.WhitemaneCasts Undeath on your target dealing (6.86532% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage per stack every 3 sec, for 24 sec. Each time Undeath deals damage it gains a stack. Cannot be refreshed.TrollbaneCasts Chains of Ice on your target slowing their movement speed by 40% and increasing the damage they take from you by 5% for 8 sec.NazgrimWhile Nazgrim is active you gain Apocalyptic Conquest, increasing your Strength by 5%.

1216039.name: R.P.G.G.
1216039.description: R.P.G.G.Unlimited range2.5 sec castThe caster launches a volley of rockets from their R.P.G.G., inflicting 42386 Fire damage to players within 8 yards of impact.After firing, the R.P.G.G. must be reloaded.

1270620.name: Flame Nova
1270620.description: Flame Nova4 sec castThe Phantasmal Mystic unleashes a nova of flame, inflicting 76268 Fire damage to all players.

1238844.name: Echo Barrage
1238844.description: Echo BarrageUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster summons echoes that strike the ground beneath them, inflicting 60482 Shadow damage to players within 4.5 yards and an additional 6048 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

453.name: Mind Soothe
453.description: Soothes enemies in the target area, reducing the range at which they will detect you by 10 yards. Only affects Humanoid and Dragonkin targets. Does not cause threat. Lasts 20 sec.

1250553.name: Arcane Zap
1250553.description: Arcane Zap30 yd rangeInstantKasreth zaps the player, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage.

1234021.name: Earthshatter Slam
1234021.description: Earthshatter Slam50 yd range4 sec castThe Hoardmonger slams the ground, inflicting 254225 Nature damage to players in a frontal cone.

403876.name: Divine Protection
403876.description: Reduces all damage you take by 20% for 8 sec. Usable while stunned.

209388.name: Bulwark of Order
209388.description: Bulwark of OrderInstantRequires PaladinAvenger's Shield also shields you for 8 sec, absorbing 60% as much damage as it dealt, up to 50% of your maximum health.

1270859.name: Noxious Blast
1270859.description: Noxious Blast40 yd range2.5 sec castReduces the movement speed of the target by 40% for 12 sec.Inflicts 4 Shadow damage to an enemy every 2 sec for 12 sec.

1248229.name: Void Infusion
1248229.description: Void Infusion200 yd rangeInstant3 sec cooldownVoid Bomb explodes after 5 sec, inflicting 12 Shadow damage to players within 4 yards. Every unit within 4 yards have their damage done increased by 15% and absorb the next 100 healing.

1250987.name: Combo Strikes: Rushing Wind Kick
1250987.description: Combo Strikes: Rushing Wind KickInstantRequires MonkYour last ability to trigger Mastery: Combo Strikes was Rushing Wind Kick.

1235640.name: Thornblade
1235640.description: Thornblade100 yd range3 sec castLekshi ambushes a player and backstabs them, inflicting 50845 Nature damage and causing them to bleed for 20338 Physical damage every 2 sec for 8 sec.

1243704.name: Antimatter
1243704.description: Antimatter1000 yd rangeInstantSpheres of Antimatter form at the location of Shattered Space and remain stable for 10 sec, then trigger an annihilation reaction that inflicts 725785 Cosmic damage to all players.Every (5 / 10) sec, Antimatter reacts with players within 0 yards inflicting 7560 Cosmic damage and reducing the damage of its final reaction by the same amount.

1252875.name: Eclipsing Step
1252875.description: Eclipsing Step100 yd rangeInstantNysarra slips into the shadows and strikes at random players, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage and additional 20338 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec to all players within 14 yards.

1243055.name: Fists of the Voidlord
1243055.description: Fists of the Voidlord300 yd rangeInstantDimensius' melee attacks disrupt the very fabric of space, forcing his target into melee range if they can't be reached and inflicting 45362 Shadow damage to players within 8 yards of his target.The force of the impact knocks away other players within 8 yards of his target.

1259183.name: Piercing Screech
1259183.description: Piercing ScreechUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster screeches, releasing a pulse of Sonic energy that inflicts 15 Physical damage to any players struck.

471877.name: Howl of the Pack Leader
471877.description: Howl of the Pack LeaderInstantRequires HunterWhile in combat, every 30 sec your next Kill Command summons the aid of a Beast. WyvernA Wyvern descends from the skies, letting out a battle cry that increases the damage of you and your pets by 10% for 12 sec. BoarA Boar charges through your target 1 time, dealing (1200% of Attack Power) physical damage to the primary target and (1440% of Attack Power) damage to up to 5 nearby enemies. BearA Bear leaps into the fray, rending the flesh of your enemies, dealing (400% of Attack Power) damage over 10 sec to up to 8 nearby enemies.

1238693.name: Voidglass Shards
1238693.description: Voidglass ShardsItem Effect100 yd rangeInstantYour spells have a chance to conjure voidglass shards, slicing enemies for (3705 * 1) Cosmic damage or orbiting allies to absorb 9867 damage for up to 20 sec.

198793.name: Vengeful Retreat
198793.description: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.

449609.name: Lighter Than Air
449609.description: Lighter Than AirInstantRequires MonkRoll causes you to become lighter than air, allowing you to double jump to dash forward a short distance once within 5 sec, but the cooldown of Roll is increased by 2 sec.

210824.name: Touch of the Magi
210824.description: Touch of the Magi100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageArcane Blast has a 10% chance to apply Touch of the Magi, accumulating 15% of the damage you deal to the target for 12 sec, and then exploding for that amount of Arcane damage to the target and all nearby enemies.

1214966.name: Fel Infused
1214966.description: Fel InfusedInstantReleases fel energy upon death inflicting 30 Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds.

474511.name: Shadow Smash
474511.description: Shadow Smash40 yd range2 sec castInflicts 4137 Shadow damage to all players within 40 yds.

1253862.name: Takedown
1253862.description: Takedown100 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterRequires level 1You and your pet leap to your target and strike as one, dealing [(600% of Attack Power) + (1200% of Attack Power)] Physical damage.For the next 8 sec, the damage dealt by you and your pet is increased by 20%.Generates 50 Focus.

1227276.name: Soulfray Annihilation
1227276.description: Soulfray Annihilation300 yd rangeInstantThe Soulbinder Naazindhri unleashes an orb in the direction of randomly targeted players, inflicting 60520 Arcane damage to any player struck by the orb and causing them to take 15% increased damage for 20 sec.If a Binding Chamber is hit by the orb, its shield is destroyed and the Unbound Soul within takes 200% increased damage.

1213703.name: Stealth Burst
1213703.description: Stealth BurstInstantElectricty bends the light around you, preventing enemies from detecting you for 10 sec.

16979.name: Wild Charge
16979.description: Wild Charge8 - 25 yd rangeInstant15 sec cooldownRequires DruidRequires level 1Requires Bear FormCharge to an enemy, immobilizing them for 4 sec.

389787.name: Sigil of Flame
389787.description: Sigil of FlameInstantRequires Demon HunterRequires level 1Place a Sigil of Flame at the target location that activates after 2 sec.Deals (80% of Attack Power) Fire damage, and an additional (200% of Attack Power) Fire damage over 8 sec, to all enemies affected by the sigil.Generates 25 Fury.

472724.name: Shadow Bolt
472724.description: Shadow BoltUnlimited range2.5 sec castKalis inflicts 61014 Shadow damage to a player.

156910.name: Beacon of Faith
156910.description: Mark a second target as a Beacon, mimicking the effects of Beacon of Light. Your heals will now heal both of your Beacons, but at 30% reduced effectiveness.

402831.name: Volcanic Blast
402831.description: Volcanic BlastUnlimited rangeInstantThe erupting segment of Twisted Earth inflicts 55118 Volcanic damage to players in 7 yards, and knocks them away.

451113.name: Web Bolt
451113.description: Web Bolt50 yd range2.5 sec castExpels webs towards a target inflicting 13511 Nature damage.

7814.name: Lash of Pain
7814.description: Lash of Pain60 EnergyMelee RangeInstantRequires level 14Lashes the target, dealing (30% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.(Right - Click to toggle)

1234243.name: Crushing Gravity
1234243.description: Crushing GravityUnlimited rangeInstantAfter 5 sec intense gravity pushes down around the target, inflicting 13608 Cosmic damage and applying Crushed to all players within 2 yards.

392959.name: Glory of the Dawn
392959.description: Glory of the DawnMelee RangeInstantRequires MonkRequires level 24Kick upwards, dealing (50% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

1243590.name: Overwhelming Onslaught
1243590.description: Overwhelming Onslaught100 yd rangeInstantNalorakk swipes repeatedly, obliterating his primary target for 4 sec, inflicting 203380 Physical damage every 1 sec and increasing Overwhelming Onslaught damage taken by 50% for 5 sec. This effect stacks.

198103.name: Earth Elemental
198103.description: Calls forth a Greater Earth Elemental to protect you and your allies, generating high threat and taunting enemies periodically for 30 sec.

194384.name: Atonement
194384.description: Atonement60 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestRequires level 1Power Word: Shield, Flash Heal, Plea, Penance, and Power Word: Radiance apply Atonement to your target for 15 sec.Your spell damage heals all targets affected by Atonement for 35% of the damage done. Healing is reduced when healing more than 5 targets.

5672.name: Healing Stream
5672.description: Healing StreamInstantRequires ShamanRequires level 14Summons a totem at your feet for 15 sec that heals [Rushing Streams: two injured party or raid members / an injured party or raid member] within 40 yards for (67.68% of Spell Power) every 2 sec.If you already know Healing Stream Totem, instead gain 1 additional charge of Healing Stream Totem.

448485.name: Shield Slam
448485.description: Shield Slam20 yd range1.5 sec castGuard Captain Suleyman slams his target with his shield with tremendous force, inflicting 52982 Physical damage and knocking the target away.

1251690.name: Prized Turkey
1251690.description: Prized Turkey1.5 sec castSummons and dismisses this mount."This extra-large turkey not only took first place due to its pristine feathers, but also for its larger-than-average size."Trading Post

201594.name: Stampede
201594.description: Stampede150 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterSummon a herd of stampeding animals from the wilds around you that deal [(150% of Attack Power) * 3] Physical damage to your enemies over 7 sec.

1249658.name: Breath of Sindragosa
1249658.description:
Call upon Sindragosa's aid in battle for 8 sec, continuously dealing 48 Frost damage every 1 sec to enemies in a cone in front of you. Consuming Killing Machine or Rime increases the duration by 0.8 sec. Deals reduced damage to secondary targets.

Grants a charge of Empower Rune Weapon at the start and 2 Runes at the end.

198590.name: Drain Soul
198590.description:
Replaces Shadow Bolt.

Drains the target's soul, causing 2,117 Shadow damage over 4.5 sec.

Damage is increased by 100% against enemies below 20% health.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies during this effect.

1219545.name: Alter Time
1219545.description: Alter TimeInstantRequires MageRequires level 1Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 seconds. Effect negated by long distance or death.

1241922.name: Voidglare Boon
1241922.description: Voidglare BoonInstantRequires Demon HunterAfter fully channeling Void Ray, gain 10 Fury.

1265629.name: Insatiable Hunger
1265629.description: Insatiable HungerChanneled (7 days cast)The totem drives players into an insatiable hunger, reducing their maximum health by 3% for 15 sec. This effect stacks.

77761.name: Stampeding Roar
77761.description: Stampeding RoarInstant2 min cooldownRequires DruidRequires level 22Let loose a wild roar, increasing the movement speed of all friendly players within 15 yards by 60% for 8 sec.

367902.name: Volatile Satchel
367902.description: Volatile SatchelLevel 80100 yd rangeInstantYour melee attacks and abilities have a high chance to attach a Volatile Satchel onto your target. Upon reaching 3 stacks, or when removed, the Volatile Satchel detonates, inflicting (1 * 34877) Fire damage.

387552.name: Infernal Command
387552.description: Infernal Command100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarlockWhile your Felguard is active, your Wild Imps and Dreadstalkers deal 5% additional damage.

387350.name: Ouroboros
