393897.name: Tireless Pursuit
393897.description: Tireless PursuitInstantRequires DruidRequires level 60For 3.0 sec after leaving Cat Form or Travel Form, you retain up to 40% movement speed.

424317.name: Shalasar's Guidance
424317.description: Shalasar's GuidanceInstantThe collected data of Shalasar's Sophic Vellum inspires you.

407302.name: Infused Explosion
407302.description: Infused ExplosionUnlimited rangeInstantThe energy from Infused Strikes explodes, inflicting 3675 Arcane damage to all players and an additional 4630 Arcane damage every 2 sec for 20 sec. This effect stacks.

19574.name: Bestial Wrath
19574.description: Sends you and your pet into a rage, instantly dealing 280 Physical damage to its target, and increasing all damage you both deal by 20% for 15 sec. Removes all crowd control effects from your pet.

1238197.name: Infusion Tether
1238197.description: Infusion TetherUnlimited rangeInstantLoom'ithar pulls several players to its location, binding them with silken strands that inflict 2434 Arcane damage each second, growing in intensity over time.Each strand snaps when drawn to 40 yards, creating a splotch of Living Silk at the player's location.

1265779.name: Searing Light
1265779.description: Searing Light100 yd rangeInstantCreates patches of light that flare out, inflicting 10 Holy damage and disorienting for 2 sec all enemies within 4 yards of impact.Leaves radiant searing ground that inflicts 3 Holy damage every 1 sec. and burns away Light-Crazed Rutaani.

1277597.name: Radiant Scar
1277597.description: Radiant ScarUnlimited rangeInstantA jagged brand of divine energy inflicts 10 Holy damage every 1 sec to players within the area.

450763.name: Aspect of Harmony
450763.description: Aspect of HarmonyUnlimited rangeInstantRequires Monk MistweaverStore vitality from 10% of your damage dealt and 30% of your healing. Vitality stored from overhealing is reduced.For 10 sec after casting Thunder Focus Tea your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional healing over 8 sec. BrewmasterStore vitality from 25% of your damage dealt and 12% of your effective healing.For 10 sec after casting Celestial Brew your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional damage over 8 sec.

408957.name: Cleansing Breath
408957.description: Cleansing BreathUnlimited rangeInstantThe dracthyr unleashes a breath attack that inflicts 47769 Fire damage to enemies and heals allies for 30% of their max health in a cone in front of the caster.

1248829.name: Blizzard
1248829.description:
Ice shards pelt the target area, dealing 1,317 Frost damage over 10.7 sec and reducing movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

This spell is cast at your target.

102560.name: Incarnation: Chosen of Elune
102560.description:
An improved Moonkin Form that grants both Eclipses, any learned Celestial Alignment bonuses, and 10% critical strike chance.

Lasts 20 sec. You may shapeshift in and out of this improved Moonkin Form for its duration.

1225218.name: Dread of the Unknown
1225218.description: Dread of the Unknown4 sec castSoul-Scribe imbues marked players with dread. Upon expiration, the player erupts inflicting 10596 Arcane damage to players within 9 yards of the eruption.Fates struck afflict their bound player with Wounded Fate.

163505.name: Rake
163505.description: RakeUnlimited rangeInstantRequires DruidRequires level 17While stealthed, Rake will also stun the target for 4 sec.

465957.name: Ignited Embers
465957.description: Ignited Embers100 yd rangeInstantFlaming Updraft inflicts 127113 Fire damage, and throws players up into the air.

1246664.name: Revitalizing Waters
1246664.description: Revitalizing Waters45 yd range4 sec castHeals a nearby injured ally for 45% health.

1248196.name: Cheap Shot
1248196.description: Cheap Shot10 yd rangeInstant20 sec cooldownValeera unleashes an unexpected attack to a vulnerable spot, inflicting moderate Physical damage and Stunning the target for 5 sec.

1252437.name: Void Lash
1252437.description: Void LashMelee RangeInstantThe caster's mainhand strikes all enemies in a cone in front of the caster, inflicting Shadow damage.

1216846.name: Holding a Wrench
1216846.description: Holding a WrenchInstantThe hobgoblin is holding a wrench. Doing so he now knows how to strike someone with the wrench.

1252204.name: Leech Veil
1252204.description: Leech Veil1.333 sec castAt 45% health, latches to an ally's shadow, hiding within and draining life to heal. The effect ends early if the shield on the leech victim is broken.

460781.name: Big Bada BOOM!
460781.description: Big Bada BOOM!Unlimited rangeInstantKeeza calls down a delivery of multiple Ticking Time Bombs. Ticking Time Bombs last for 30 sec and cause Deflagration when they expire.

1262475.name: Commune with the Void
1262475.description: Commune with the VoidChanneled (2 min cast)Caster begins casting a ritual expelling clusters of cosmic energy at nearby locations inflicting 4 Shadow damage to players within 2 yards.

432119.name: Faded
432119.description: Faded300 yd rangeInstantPlayers struck by Cosmic Singularity have their essences partially dissolved, reducing damage done by 75% and increasing damage taken by 75% for 12 sec.

1260754.name: Rending Gore
1260754.description: Rending Gore100 yd range2 sec castInflicts 8 Physical damage to an enemy.Inflicts 2 Physical damage to an enemy every 1 sec for 20 sec.

102383.name: Wild Charge
102383.description: Wild ChargeUnlimited rangeInstant15 sec cooldownRequires DruidRequires level 1Requires Moonkin FormBound backward away from your enemies.

392793.name: Frothing Berserker
392793.description: Frothing BerserkerInstantRequires Warrior ArmsMortal Strike and Cleave have a 20% chance to immediately refund 10% of the Rage spent. FuryRampage has a 20% chance to immediately refund 10% of the Rage spent. ProtectionRevenge has a 20% chance to immediately refund 50% of the Rage spent.

436023.name: Prismatic Null Stone
436023.description: Prismatic Null StoneIncreases effectiveness of Blasphemite secondary effects by 25%.

406712.name: Lava
406712.description: LavaInstantInflicts 8% of maximum health as Fire damage every 1 sec.

132403.name: Shield of the Righteous
132403.description: Shield of the RighteousMelee RangeInstantRequires PaladinRequires level 1 HolySlams enemies in front of you with your shield, causing (95% of Attack Power) Holy damage, and increasing your Armor by (160 * $INT / 100) for 4.5 sec. ProtectionSlams enemies in front of you with your shield, causing (95% of Attack Power) Holy damage, and increasing your Armor by (160 * Strength / 100) for 4.5 sec. RetributionSlams enemies in front of you with your shield, causing (95% of Attack Power) Holy damage, and increasing your Armor by (160 * Strength / 100) for 4.5 sec.ProtectionArmor granted by Shield of the Righteous is increased by up to 60%, based on your missing health.

1233110.name: Purging Lightning
1233110.description: Purging Lightning300 yd rangeInstantThe Plexus Sentinel continuously channels arcane lightning through its chassis, inflicting 2079 Arcane damage to all players with each cast. Each cast empowers the chassis, increasing damage of subsequent casts by 25%. This effect stacks.

242551.name: Fel Focus
242551.description: Fel FocusLevel 80Item EffectInstantIncreases Strength, Agility, and Intellect by 5, and Stamina by 8 for 1 hour. Counts as both a Battle and Guardian elixir.

1214937.name: Jackpot
1214937.description: JackpotInstantRequires RogueModifies Effect #2's Value +1: Ambush, Sinister StrikeModifies Damage/Healing Done +15%: Ambush, Sinister StrikeModifies Effect #1's Value +30%: Restless Blades

32216.name: Victorious
32216.description: VictoriousInstantRequires WarriorVictory Rush enabled.Modifies Power Cost -100%: Impending Victory

98021.name: Spirit Link
98021.description: Spirit Link100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanThe Spirit Link Totem reduces damage taken by all party and raid members within 10 yards by 10%. Every 1 sec, the health of all affected players is redistributed, such that each player ends up with the same percentage of their maximum health.

1223085.name: Double Whammy Shot
1223085.description: Double Whammy Shot300 yd range2.5 sec castZee fires an explosive high caliber round towards a random player, inflicting 156320 Physical damage to the closest player and applying Perforating Wound. All other targets take up to 156320 Physical damage, reduced by the closest player's total damage mitigation.Unstable Crawler Mines hit are detonated and all players hit are stunned for 2 sec. In addition, an Explosive Payload is lodged in the original target.

1228219.name: Astral Mark
1228219.description: Astral MarkUnlimited rangeInstantAraz's Arcane Obliteration marks the player with residual energy, removing their ability to reduce the damage from this spell's next cast for 3 min.

421693.name: Predator
421693.description: Predator300 yd rangeInstantFyrakk leaps at his current target if not within reach, inflicting a melee attack wtih Fyr'alath.

335098.name: Crushing Blow
335098.description: Crushing Blow100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarriorRequires level 14Requires Melee WeaponStrike a mighty blow with both weapons that deals a total of [(206.997% of Attack Power) + (206.997% of Attack Power)] Physical damage. Crushing Blow has a 25% chance to instantly reset its own cooldown and its critical strikes deal 20% additional damage.Generates 12 Rage.

1216454.name: Arrow Rain
1216454.description: Arrow RainUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster fires a volley of arrows into the air, inflicting 25 Physical damage to players within 3 yards of impact.

1218081.name: Dive Bomb
1218081.description: Dive BombUnlimited rangeInstantCharges to a target and inflicts 30 Fire damage to nearby targets.

1253037.name: Rock Bolt
1253037.description: Rock Bolt45 yd range2.5 sec castThe caster fires a rock shard at a player, inflicting 12 Nature damage.

1228161.name: Silencing Tempest
1228161.description: Silencing Tempest3 sec castAraz rains down arcane energy at players' destinations every 1 sec for 6 sec, inflicting 121253 Arcane damage to players within 3.5 yards of the impact location and silencing them for 6 sec.

1263355.name: Marked for Execution
1263355.description: Marked for ExecutionItem Effect100 yd rangeInstantMark your target for execution, increasing your Haste by 185 for 20 sec. While the target is marked, each of your attacks against them grants an additional 13 Critical Strike, as the Void urges you to finish the kill, up to a maximum of (13 * 15) Critical Strike.

1240996.name: Dread Plague
1240996.description: Dread Plague100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightA malicious plague that deals (292.74% of Attack Power) Shadow damage over 24 sec. Explodes for (184.5% of Attack Power) Shadow damage to nearby enemies and infects one when the host dies. Can only be applied to 1 host at a time.

1245743.name: Eradicate
1245743.description: EradicateUnlimited range2.5 sec castAdarus conjures a scythe-wielding shadow that dashes behind players and cleaves through them, inflicting 105844 Cosmic damage to all players struck.

1226493.name: Shattered Soul
1226493.description: Shattered SoulUnlimited rangeInstantIlyssa shatters the target's soul, increasing their damage taken from Fracture by 125% for 36 sec.

227255.name: Frailty
227255.description: Frailty100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterConsume up to 5 Soul Fragments then explode, dealing (200% of Attack Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased by 20% per fragment consumed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1226277.name: Entropic Howl
1226277.description: Entropic Howl4 sec castThe caster releases a bone-rattling howl, inflicting 30241 Shadow damage to players within 60 yards and an additional 4536 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 12 sec.Additionally, this howl afflicts players with Entropic Terror.

688.name: Summon Imp
688.description: Summons an Imp under your command that casts ranged Firebolts.

1236824.name: Powered Core
1236824.description: Powered Core300 yd rangeInstantThe caster's core protects them from incoming damage. When the core is destroyed it explodes inflicting 1 Cosmic Damage.

1222755.name: Void Cascade
1222755.description: Void Cascade100 yd rangeInstantCharonus projects condensed cosmic power toward nearby players. Players coming into contact with this energy suffer 152535 Shadow damage and are knocked away.

373861.name: Temporal Anomaly
373861.description: Send forward a vortex of temporal energy, absorbing 2,280 damage on you and any allies in its path. Absorption is reduced beyond 6 targets.

1261726.name: Shadow Strike
1261726.description: Shadow StrikeMelee Range1.5 sec castCaster conjures dark energy and strikes their target, inflicting Shadow damage.

461508.name: Arcane Explosion
461508.description: Arcane Explosion100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageRequires level 6Causes an explosion of magic around the caster, dealing (38.6% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to all enemies within 10 yards. [ Arcane (Level 10): Generates 1 Arcane Charge if any targets are hit.]

413546.name: Igniting Roar
413546.description: Igniting Roar200 yd rangeInstantMagmorax roars, inflicting 25722 Fire damage on impact and an additional 620 Fire damage every 1 sec to all players. This effect stacks.Additionally, Magmorax expels numerous Lava Ejections into the chamber.

281000.name: Execute
281000.description: Execute20 to 40 RageMelee RangeInstant6 sec cooldownRequires WarriorRequires level 8Requires Melee WeaponAttempts to finish off a foe, causing up to [2.0 * (201.771% of Attack Power)] Physical damage based on Rage spent. Only usable on enemies that have less than 35% health. [Improved Execute: If your foe survives, 10% of the Rage spent is refunded]

1216954.name: Eye Beam

212552.name: Wraith Walk

Embrace the power of the Shadowlands, removing all root effects and increasing your movement speed by 70% for 4 sec. Taking any action cancels the effect.

While active, your movement speed cannot be reduced below 170%.

457284.name: Well Fed
457284.description: Well FedLevel 80Instant Well Fed If you spend at least 10 seconds eating you will become Well Fed and gain 4 primary stat for 1 hour.

447988.name: Light of the Martyr
447988.description: Light of the MartyrInstantRequires PaladinWhile above 80% health, Holy Shock's healing is increased 20%, but creates a heal absorb on you for 30% of the amount healed that prevents Beacon of Light from healing you until it has dissipated.

468216.name: Incendiary Fire
468216.description: Incendiary Fire150 yd range4 sec castThe Geargrinder focuses fire at several players for 6 sec, launching blazing shells at their location every 0.5 sec. Each shell inflicts 14655 Fire damage to players within 3 yards and burns away any Oil Slicks in the area.

472433.name: Evangelism
472433.description: Immediately Power Word: Radiance your target at 150% effectiveness, and causes your next 2 casts of Power Word: Radiance to be instant cast with 40% reduced mana cost.

1239641.name: Astral Antenna
1239641.description: Astral AntennaItem EffectInstantThe antenna has a chance to detect and draw ambient arcane energy towards you, granting 226 Critical Strike for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

443126.name: Piety
443126.description: PietyInstantRequires Priest20% of overhealing done is redistributed to up to 4 nearby injured allies.

193753.name: Dreamwalk
193753.description:
Teleports the caster to the Emerald Dreamway.

Casting Dreamwalk again while in the Emerald Dreamway will return you back to near your departure point.

1263984.name: Unstable Singularity
1263984.description: Unstable Singularity100 yd rangeInstantCharonus marks players and creates a gravity well at their location after 5.5 sec. Players within 12 yards of the well suffer 10169 Shadow damage every 1 sec and are slowly pulled toward the center. Players within 6 yards suffer an additional 50845 Shadow damage every 1 sec and have their movement speed reduced by 50%.

381637.name: Atrophic Poison
381637.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by 3.0% for 10 sec.

1285445.name: Arcane Explosion
1285445.description: Arcane ExplosionChanneled (12 sec cast)Inflicts 9 Arcane damage to all enemies every 2 sec.

124274.name: Moderate Stagger
124274.description: Moderate StaggerInstantRequires MonkYou shrug off attacks, delaying a portion of Physical damage based on your Agility, instead taking it over 10 sec. Affects magical attacks at 58% effectiveness. [Training of Niuzao: Gain up to 15% Mastery based on your current level of Stagger.]

1268810.name: Vanguard
1268810.description: Vanguard30 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinJudgment has a chance to grant you Vanguard, causing your next Avenger's Shield to leave an echoing bolt of light in a line between you and the initial target, piercing any enemies for (300% of Attack Power) Holy damage.

67713.name: Mote of Flame
67713.description: Mote of FlameLevel 80InstantGained a Mote of Flame. When 3 Motes are accumulated, they will release, firing a Pillar of Flame for 2550 damage.

373442.name: Inescapable Torment
373442.description: Inescapable Torment100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestRequires level 1[ Discipline: Penance]Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death cause your Shadowfiend, Mindbender, and Voidwraith to teleport behind your target, slashing up to 5 nearby enemies for [(190% of Spell Power) * 0.442] Shadow damage and extending their durations by 0.7 sec.

1242866.name: Raise Dead
1242866.description: Raise Dead30 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightRaises a [Glyph of the Geist: Geist / Ghoul] to fight by your side. You can have a maximum of one [Glyph of the Geist: Geist / Ghoul] at a time.

1216607.name: Battery Discharge
1216607.description: Battery Discharge2 sec castThe hobgoblin's batteries discharge every 5 sec, inflicting 31789 Nature damage to players within 4 yards of each impact.The discharge also inflicts 5722 Nature damage to all players within 60 yards.

1249454.name: Starshard Nova
1249454.description: Starshard NovaInstantPargoth releases a burst of superheated stardust, inflicting 181446 Cosmic damage to players within 10 yards, launching several Starshards, and leaving behind a Debris Field.

1239856.name: Sky Strike
1239856.description: Sky Strike100 yd range3.5 sec castCharges to a nearby target and inflicts 15 Physical damage and knocks back enemies within 10 yards.

1271717.name: Collect Amani Hanging Brazier
1271717.description: Collect Amani Hanging BrazierDecor0.5 sec castAdd this Decor to your House Chest.

132463.name: Chi Wave
132463.description: Every 15 sec, your next Rising Sun Kick or Vivify releases a wave of Chi energy that flows through friends and foes, dealing 6 Nature damage or 20 healing. Bounces up to 7 times to targets within 25 yards.

1215087.name: Unstable Void Essence
1215087.description: Unstable Void Essence2.5 sec castDegentrius launches unstable void energy that bounces to 4 locations, inflicting 50845 Shadow damage to any player at the point of impact.If no player is in the area the unstable void essence erupts in Void Destruction.

1271192.name: Boon of the Water Ascendant
1271192.description: Boon of the Water AscendantInstantRequires ShamanImmediately heals for (1287.72% of Spell Power) split between allies within 20 yds and transforms into a Water Ascendant for 15 sec.While ascended, Chain Heal jumps to 3 additional allies with 10% healing reduced for all jumps, Healing Wave always critical heals and heals 1 additional ally at 50% effectiveness, and the mana cost of Chain Heal and Healing Wave is reduced by 25%.

408131.name: Ruptured Veil
408131.description: Ruptured VeilInstantThe Voice From Beyond ruptures the veil of reality, inflicting 11024 Shadow damage to all players every 4 sec. until slain.

431971.name: Flask of Tempered Aggression
431971.description: Flask of Tempered AggressionLevel 80Item EffectInstantDrink to increase your Critical Strike by 173.Lasts 1 hour and through death. Consuming an identical flask will add another 1 hour.

8092.name: Mind Blast
8092.description: Blast the target's mind for 297 Shadow damage. Costs a high amount of mana.

1236231.name: Lesser Time Warp
1236231.description: Lesser Time WarpInstantRequires MageAt any moment, you have a chance to gain Arcane Power for 8 sec, gain Evocation for 1 sec, or gain Time Warp for 6 sec.

452917.name: Fatebound Coin (Tails)
452917.description: Fatebound Coin (Tails)InstantRequires RogueFlip a Fatebound Coin each time a finishing move consumes 5 or more combo points. Tails deals 10 Cosmic damage to your target.For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Tails increases its damage by 10%.

1266731.name: Fearful Ritual Mask
1266731.description: Fearful Ritual Mask100 yd rangeInstantInflicts 3 Shadow damage to an enemy.

1237210.name: Overbloom
1237210.description: Overbloom40 yd rangeInstantInflicts 12 Holy damage to enemies within 3 yards.

412488.name: Arcane Burst
412488.description: Arcane Burst15 yd range1 sec cast3 sec cooldownThe slime spasms inflicting 12494 Arcane damage to random players immediately and an additional 5144 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

1229038.name: Devour
1229038.description: Devour1000 yd range2 sec castUpon reaching 100 energy, Dimensius attempts to devour all players, inflicting 30241 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 5 sec.After 5 sec any player with insufficient Collective Gravity is pulled into Dimensius and consigned to Oblivion. He then absorbs all Excess Mass and Living Mass.

359077.name: Eternity Surge
359077.description: Eternity Surge100 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerFocus your energies to release a salvo of pure magic, dealing [(1088.47% of Spell Power)] Spellfrost damage to an enemy. Damages additional enemies within 25 yds when empowered.I: Damages [Eternity's Span: 2 enemies enemy].II: Damages [Eternity's Span: 4 enemies / 2 enemies].III: Damages [Eternity's Span: 6 enemies / 3 enemies].

114216.name: Angelic Bulwark
114216.description: Angelic BulwarkInstantRequires PriestRecently protected by Angelic Bulwark.

1223612.name: Ethereal Barrier
1223612.description: Ethereal Barrier100 yd rangeInstantYour spells and abilities have a high chance to coalesce the energy around you, granting you a shield that reduces damage taken by 20% up to 20844 total damage.Upon falling below 40% health, gain this effect at 500% effectiveness. This effect may only occur once every 6 min.

1216538.name: Fel Detonation
1216538.description: Fel Detonation100 yd rangeInstantThe caster explodes upon death, inflicting 30 Fire damage to all enemies within 8 yds.

1271511.name: Core Exposure
1271511.description: Core Exposure100 yd rangeInstantInflicts 76268 Holy damage to all players and increases Holy damage taken by 20% for 1 min.

178963.name: Consume Soul
178963.description: Consume Soul100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterKilling an enemy sometimes creates a Soul Fragment that is consumed when you approach it, healing you for 20% of maximum health.If the Soul Fragment came from a Demon, you will deal 20% increased damage for 15 sec.

61295.name: Riptide
61295.description: Restorative waters wash over a friendly target, healing them for 1,853 and an additional 1,018 over 18 sec.

1219712.name: Charged Lightning
1219712.description: Charged Lightning300 yd rangeInstantThe Plexus Sentinel periodically emits arcing energy, inflicting 19657 Arcane damage to the target and up to 5 players within 20 yards.

467454.name: Charred
467454.description: CharredInstantThe goblin is injured from the crash, reducing health to 30%.

5487.name: Bear Form
5487.description:
Shapeshift into Bear Form, increasing armor by 220% and Stamina by 25%, granting protection from Polymorph effects, and increasing threat generation.

The act of shapeshifting frees you from movement impairing effects.

1236126.name: Binding Javelin
1236126.description: Binding Javelin100 yd rangeInstantTaah'bat launches arcane javelins at targeted players, inflicting 10596 Arcane damage to players within 8 yards of the targets and tethering all players struck. Each tether inflicts 2649 Arcane damage every 1 sec and reduces their movement speed by 50%, increasing in intensity every 5 seconds until the javelin is destroyed. This effect stacks.

1248702.name: Spirit Protection
1248702.description: Spirit Protection50 yd rangeInstantCalls forth a spirit and begins to consume it, reducing damage taken by 99% for 9 sec. While consuming, every 3 sec the caster gains a shield absorbing damage equal to 10% of their own maximum health for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

438825.name: Poisonous Cloud
438825.description: Poisonous Cloud200 yd rangeInstantInflicts 12716 Nature damage to an enemy every 1 sec for until canceled.

198533.name: Soothing Mist
198533.description: Soothing Mist60 yd rangeChanneled (8 sec cast)Requires MonkRequires level 10Heals the target for (1680% of Spell Power) over 8 sec. While channeling, Enveloping Mist [Surging Mist: Surging Mist] [Zen Pulse: Zen Pulse] and Vivify may be cast instantly on the target.MistweaverFollows the target of your Enveloping Mist and Vivify.

179057.name: Chaos Nova
179057.description: Unleash an eruption of fel energy, dealing 9 Chaos damage and stunning all nearby enemies for 3 sec.

393055.name: Death Sweep
393055.description: Death Sweep100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterStrike 5 nearby enemies for [3 * (27.5614% of Attack Power)% + (82.8% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

1239300.name: Gather Apples
1239300.description: Gather Apples5 yd range3 sec castGathering apples.

48707.name: Anti-Magic Shell
48707.description: Surrounds you in an Anti-Magic Shell for 5 sec, absorbing up to 9,165 magic damage and preventing application of harmful magical effects. Damage absorbed generates Runic Power.

451243.name: Skinning
451243.description: Skinning100 yd range1.5 sec castSkinning the beast for its leathers.

1257126.name: Corespark Overload
1257126.description: Corespark Overload12 sec cast3 sec cooldownThe battery overloads and explodes inflicting 6 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.

1223522.name: Arcane Soul
1223522.description: Arcane SoulInstantRequires MageArcane Barrage grants Clearcasting and generates 4 Arcane Charges.Each cast of Arcane Barrage grants 5 stacks of Arcane Salvo and casting Arcane Barrage does not consume Arcane Salvo.

1236993.name: Energy Shield
1236993.description: Energy ShieldInstantWhen you take damage, you have a chance to gain a Titan Energy Shield preventing up to 28604 damage for 10 sec. When the shield expires it deals 30% of the remaining absorb as Arcane damage split between enemies within 8 yds.

974.name: Earth Shield
974.description:
Protects the target with an earthen shield, increasing your healing on them by 20% and healing them for 332 when they take damage. This heal can only occur once every 3 sec. Maximum 9 charges.

Earth Shield can only be placed on one target at a time. Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman.

455979.name: Hideshaper's Workbag
455979.description: Hideshaper's WorkbagItem EffectInstantIncreases your Resourcefulness rating by 90 when crafting Leatherworking reagents. [Equip effect requires Khaz Algar Leatherworking 1][Equip effect requires Khaz Algar Leatherworking 1]

1282959.name: Gatekeeper
1282959.description: GatekeeperInstantThe presence of this creature is blocking the way to Charonus.

433656.name: Black Blood
433656.description: Black BloodInstantCarrying Black Blood. Any damage taken causes the drone to drop it and flee.

1260257.name: Uncrowned's Bloody Ledger
1260257.description: Uncrowned's Bloody LedgerInstantSeason 1Valeera's combat mastery grants her 0% increased damage done by her spells and abilities.

1233940.name: Ethereal Energy Converter
1233940.description: Ethereal Energy ConverterUnlimited rangeInstantWhen a party member drops below 60% health, an Ethereal Energy Converter materializes, dealing moderate damage to nearby enemies and taunting them for 6 sec. Once the taunt expires, the Converter releases an Etherwave healing nearby allies for 40% of their health. Can be triggered every 2 min. Killing enemies reduces the cooldown of this effect by 6 sec.

152108.name: Cataclysm
152108.description: Calls forth a cataclysm at the target location, dealing 1,375 Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards and afflicting them with Immolate.

1238173.name: Pollen Surge
1238173.description: Pollen Surge150 yd rangeInstantDamage done is increased by 50% and attack speed is increased by 50% by a nearby ally's Lightboom Pollination.

451964.name: Void Leech
451964.description: Void LeechInstantRequires PriestEvery 3 sec siphon an amount equal to 4% of your health from an ally within 40 yds if they are higher health than you.

1264095.name: Mirror Images
1264095.description: Mirror ImagesInstantKystia creates copies of herself nearby, each of which cast Felstorm.

468429.name: Bullseye Windblast
468429.description: Bullseye WindblastUnlimited range7 sec castThe Restless Heart fires an arrow at a location in its chamber, inflicting 203380 Nature damage to players within 20 yards of impact and forming Billowing Wind.

453314.name: Enduring Torment
453314.description: Enduring TormentInstantRequires Demon Hunter HavocAgility increased by 8% while not in demon form. DevourerIntellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

1272460.name: Ultradon Cuirass
1272460.description: Ultradon CuirassLevel 90Item EffectInstant2.5 min cooldownDon Ultradon scales granting you an 257670 absorb shield for 1 min.

155145.name: Arcane Torrent
155145.description: Remove 1 beneficial effect from all enemies within 8 yards and restore 1 Holy Power.

193331.name: Call Dreadstalkers
193331.description: Call Dreadstalkers100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarlockSummons 2 ferocious Dreadstalkers to attack the target for 12 sec.

1227665.name: Fists of the Voidlord
1227665.description: Fists of the Voidlord300 yd rangeInstantDimensius' melee attacks disrupt the very fabric of space, forcing his target into melee range if they can't be reached and inflicting 45362 Shadow damage to players within 15 yards of his target.The force of the impact knocks away other players within 15 yards of his target.

1233112.name: Devour
1233112.description: DevourChanneled (6 sec cast)Azhiccar inhales and attempts to consume all creatures in the arena for 6 sec.

1277557.name: Burning Radiance
1277557.description: Burning Radiance60 yd rangeInstantThe caster bursts with a holy radiance searing up to 2 nearby enemies, inflicting 5 Holy damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

1280212.name: Sunseeker Mushroom
1280212.description: Sunseeker Mushroom100 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidSunfire damage has a chance to grow a magical mushroom at a target's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing (265.85% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (150% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

1266617.name: Soul Cleanse
1266617.description: Soul CleanseUnlimited rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterRequires level 1[ Devourer: Soul Immolation / Havoc, VengeanceImmolation Aura] removes 1 Curse effect.

73685.name: Unleash Life
73685.description:
Unleash elemental forces of Life, healing a friendly target for 2,300.

Increases the healing of your next Riptide, Chain Heal, or Healing Wave by 25% and reduces its cast time by 30%.

447448.name: Entropic Rift
447448.description: Entropic Rift100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestMind Blast tears open an Entropic Rift that follows the enemy for 8 sec. Enemies caught in its path suffer (60% of Spell Power) Shadow damage every 1 sec while within its reach.

439200.name: Voracious Bite
439200.description: Voracious Bite200 yd rangeInstantAvanoxx leaps to her primary target and unleashes 3 consecutive bites. Each bite inflicts 26491 Physical damage and the final bite further increases damage taken by 50% for 10 sec.

116670.name: Vivify
116670.description: Causes a surge of invigorating mists, healing the target for 967.

113746.name: Mystic Touch
113746.description: Mystic TouchUnlimited rangeInstantRequires MonkYour damage weakens the target, increasing Physical damage taken by 5%.

467040.name: Burning Gale
467040.description: Burning Gale100 yd rangeInstantEmberdawn unleashes a blast of fire from her body, inflicting 25 Fire damage to all players and knocking them back.Additionally, all Ignited Embers are knocked away from Emberdawn.

375256.name: Time Spiral
375256.description: Time Spiral100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanBend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

112942.name: Shadow Focus
112942.description: Shadow FocusInstantRequires RogueAbilities deal 10% more damage while Stealth or Shadow Dance is active.

1258823.name: Ritual Firebrand
1258823.description: Ritual FirebrandUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster brands several players with a ritual mark, causing a gout of flame to erupt underneath them every 4 sec for 12 sec that inflicts 25 Fire damage to players within 5 yards.

399510.name: Sheilun's Gift
399510.description: Sheilun's Gift40 yd range2 sec castRequires MonkDraws in all nearby clouds of mist, healing the friendly target and up to 2 nearby allies for (260.6% of Spell Power) and an additional [(260.6% of Spell Power) * 33 / 100] per cloud absorbed.A cloud of mist is generated every 8 sec while in combat.

375813.name: Studying
375813.description: StudyingItem Effect1.5 sec castStudy to increase your Dragon Isles Engineering Knowledge by 1.

164862.name: Flap
164862.description: You flap your wings, slowing your falling speed.

1227554.name: Banishment
1227554.description: BanishmentUnlimited rangeInstantSalhadaar exiles several players, inflicting 10887 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. Upon expiration, each target bursts with torturous void inflicting 24495 Shadow damage.

1216819.name: Fungal Bolt
1216819.description: Fungal Bolt60 yd range2.5 sec castThe caster inflicts 12 Nature damage to a player.

305592.name: Mechagon Mechanostrider
305592.description: Mechagon Mechanostrider1.5 sec castFaction: AllianceSummons and dismisses this mount."The best mount, logically, serves multiple purposes -- sometimes you need to get places AND reach something high up once you get there."Achievement: Allied Races: Mechagnome

441144.name: Unseen Blade
441144.description: Unseen Blade100 yd rangeInstantRequires RogueRequires level 1 Subtlety and Shadowstrike now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing (280% of Attack Power) damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.This effect may occur once every 20 sec. OutlawSinister Strike and Ambush now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing (280% of Attack Power) damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.This effect may occur once every 20 sec.

3355.name: Freezing Trap
3355.description: Freezing Trap100 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterRequires level 1Hurls a frost trap to the target location that incapacitates the first enemy that approaches for 1 min. Damage may break the effect. Limit 1. Trap will exist for 1 min.

451049.name: Burden of Power
451049.description: Burden of PowerInstantRequires Mage[ Arcane: Arcane Blast damage increased by 5%.Arcane Pulse damage increased by 5% / FirePyroblast damage increased by 3%.Flamestrike damage increased by 3%]

1239756.name: Soul Step
1239756.description: Soul Step40 yd rangeInstant5 sec cooldownRequires Warlock DemonologyDamage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%.Consuming Demonic Core feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal [(601.005% of Spell Power) * 0.4] Shadow damage to your target. AfflictionDamage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%.Consuming Nightfall feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal (601.005% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to your target.

30146.name: Summon Felguard
30146.description: Summons a Felguard under your command as a powerful melee combatant.

421858.name: Ignited Essence
421858.description: Ignited Essence300 yd rangeInstantPlayers can collect Living Flames to increase their damage done by 20% and healing done by 10% for 20 sec. This effect stacks, but collecting additional flames does not extend the duration.

1257742.name: Exodar Replica
1257742.description: Exodar ReplicaItem EffectInstantSummon a replica of the Exodar to travel alongside you.

335467.name: Shadow Word: Madness
335467.description:
A word of madness haunts the target's mind, dealing 665 Shadow damage instantly plus an additional 2,235 Shadow damage over 6 sec. Heals you for 30% of damage dealt.

When reapplied to a target, all remaining damage is added to the new effect.

1231082.name: Howling Blades
1231082.description: Howling Blades100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightYour melee attacks have a chance to create icy copies of Icebringer and Frostreaper, which will then stab and pierce your foes.

30451.name: Arcane Blast
30451.description:
Blasts the target with energy, dealing 382 Arcane damage.

Each Arcane Charge increases damage by 84% and mana cost by 100%, and reduces cast time by 8%.

Generates 1 Arcane Charge.

200010.name: Power Leech
200010.description: Power LeechUnlimited rangeInstantRequires level 1The Mindbender's melee attacks siphon energy from the target, converting it into Insanity for its master.

52174.name: Heroic Leap
52174.description: Leap through the air toward a target location, slamming down with destructive force to deal 8 Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yards.

1262253.name: Demoralizing Scream
1262253.description: Demoralizing Scream300 yd rangeInstantZul'jarra cries out in pain from the undefended attack, inflicting 76268 Sonic damage to all players.Players feel the weight of her burden, increasing damage taken by 10% for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

48792.name: Icebound Fortitude
48792.description: Your blood freezes, granting immunity to Stun effects and reducing all damage you take by 30% for 8 sec.

396092.name: Well Fed
396092.description: Well FedLevel 80InstantIncreases your primary stat by 5 for 1 hour.

1248065.name: Killing Spree
1248065.description: Killing SpreeUnlimited rangeInstantValeera moves rapidly through the shadows, slashing at enemies for significant Physical damage.

471736.name: Jettison Kelp
471736.description: Jettison KelpChanneled (5 sec cast)Flings globs of rancid kelp from the caster's body every 0.5 sec for 5 sec, inflicting 4239 Nature damage to players struck.

384903.name: Convincingly Realistic Jumper Cables
384903.description: Convincingly Realistic Jumper CablesItem EffectMelee Range2 sec cast10 min cooldownFrighten a "dead" ally with the threat of an electric shock, restoring them to "life" with 35% health and 10% mana. Sometimes you fail to make a compelling case.Castable in combat. Item quality affects cast time. Cannot be used by players higher than level 80.

1271341.name: Suffocating Shadow
1271341.description: Suffocating ShadowInstantCreeping shadows drain the life from you.

473671.name: Void Metamorphosis
473671.description: Void MetamorphosisInstantRequires Demon HunterEvery 2 sec, you gain Void Buildup. Gaining Void Buildup grants 5 Fury per stack.Void BuildupYour spells and abilities deal 10% increased damage. Stacks up to 10 times.Upon reaching maximum Fury, you gain access to Void Metamorphosis.

1269886.name: Diabolic Gaze
1269886.description: Diabolic Gaze40 yd rangeInstantRequires WarlockFire a beam of destructive chaos magic at the target, dealing (160% of Spell Power) Chaos damage.

52437.name: Sudden Death
52437.description: Sudden DeathInstantRequires Warrior Fury, ProtectionYour attacks have a chance to make your next Execute be usable on any target regardless of their health. ArmsYour attacks have a chance to make your next Execute cost no Rage, be usable on any target regardless of their health, and deal damage as if you spent 40 Rage.

1221389.name: Freezing
1221389.description: Freezing100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageDamage from Frostbolt and Flurry applies Freezing to their targets. Stacks up to 20 times.Damage from Ice Lance shatters your enemies, consuming 4 stacks of Freezing and dealing (97.38% of Spell Power) Frost damage for each stack removed.

191634.name: Stormkeeper
191634.description: Charge yourself with lightning, causing your next 2 Lightning Bolts to deal 150% more damage, and also causes your next 2 Lightning Bolts or Chain Lightings to be instant cast and trigger an Elemental Overload on every target.

453846.name: Resonant Energy
453846.description: Resonant Energy100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestRequires level 1[ Shadow: Enemies damaged by your Halo take 2% increased damage from you for 8 sec, stacking up to 5 times / HolyAllies healed by your Halo receive 2% increased healing from you for 8 sec, stacking up to 5 times]

447425.name: Chain Lightning
447425.description: Chain Lightning100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanHurls a lightning bolt at the enemy, dealing (382.582% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then jumping to additional nearby enemies. Affects 3 total targets.

442419.name: Dark Hound
442419.description: Dark Hound100 yd rangeInstantRequires Hunter[ Beast Mastery: When summoning a Dire Beast, you have a 10% chance to instead summon a Dark Hound that deals significantly increased damage / MarksmanshipBlack Arrow's periodic damage has a small chance to rouse the dead, summoning a Dark Minion to fight alongside you for 20 sec]

1228238.name: Fel Inferno
1228238.description: Fel InfernoUnlimited range4 sec castVelaryn wreathes the arena in flame, inflicting 4536 Fire damage to all players and an additional 983 Fire damage every 0.5 sec for 15 sec when each pillar of the inferno is created. This effect stacks.The flame inflicts 45381 Fire damage every 1 sec to any players who step into the firestorm.

390260.name: Commander of the Dead
390260.description: Commander of the DeadInstantRequires Death KnightDark Transformation empowers your [Dark Arbiter / Gargoyle], Abomination, Magus and Lesser Ghouls for 30 sec, increasing their damage by 25%.The duration of Lesser Ghouls are increased by 0% of your Mastery.

1220891.name: Engorge
1220891.description: Engorge150 yd rangeInstantThe devourer leaps towards a player and sinks their fangs into them, leeching 4239 health.

1246167.name: The Hunt
1246167.description: Charge to your target, striking them for 2,269 Cosmic damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting 1,628 Cosmic damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

424423.name: Lunging Strike
424423.description: Lunging Strike100 yd range2.5 sec castSergeant Shaynemail leaps at a nearby target, inflicting 14835 Physical damage to players within 5 yards of the target and causing victims to bleed for an additional 7947 Physical damage every 3 sec for 12 sec.

450720.description: Inner RadianceItem EffectInstantApproximately 5 procs per minuteAdvance to the 50 Verses of Inner Resilience, reading as you are attacked.Inner Resilience increases your armor by 183 and grants your attacks a chance to invoke a ward which absorbs 17743 Magic damage. When finished, sift through the passages to another chapter.Valid only for tank specializations.

428770.name: Feather Bomb
428770.description: Feather BombUnlimited rangeInstantTindral bombards the platform every 1 sec for 6 sec, inflicting 55809 Fire damage to players within 4 yards of each impact.

93402.name: Sunfire
93402.description: A quick beam of solar light burns the enemy for 80 Nature damage and then an additional 705 Nature damage over 18 sec.

1233093.name: Collapsing Star
1233093.description: Collapsing StarUnlimited rangeChanneled (25 sec cast)Adarus manifests a Collapsing Star which begins to pull players towards its center.Stellar fragments rain down and are pulled towards the center of the star. The fragments explode upon contacting a player, inflicting 9072 Cosmic damage and applying Dark Residue.If the fragments reach the center, they instead inflict 28351 Cosmic damage to all players.

49576.name: Death Grip
49576.description: Harnesses the energy that surrounds and binds all matter, drawing the target toward you.

1225016.name: Command: Besiege
1225016.description: Command: BesiegeUnlimited range2 sec castSalhadaar commands the Royal Voidwing's images to Besiege players.

446534.name: Portal: Dornogal
446534.description: Creates a portal, teleporting group members that use it to Dornogal.

83245.name: Call Pet 5
83245.description: Summons your fifth pet to you.

275779.name: Judgment
275779.description: Judges the target, dealing 728 Holy damage.

21169.name: Reincarnation
21169.description: ReincarnationInstant30 min cooldownRequires ShamanRequires level 1Allows you to resurrect yourself upon death with 20% health and mana. This effect can occur only once every 30 minutes.

1253734.name: Lunar Storm
1253734.description: Lunar Storm100 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterWhen Sentinel's Mark is consumed, it summons a barrage of 4 lunar missiles, each dealing (200% of Attack Power) Arcane damage to enemies within 10 yds.

409174.name: Shadow Bolt
409174.description: Shadow Bolt45 yd range2 sec cast3 sec cooldownInflicts 7011 Shadow damage to an enemy.

1244274.name: Taunt Crowd
1244274.description: Taunt CrowdChanneled (8 sec cast)Provoke the crowd.

115175.name: Soothing Mist
115175.description: Heals the target for 6,386 over 7.1 sec. While channeling, Enveloping Mist and Vivify may be cast instantly on the target.

132578.name: Invoke Niuzao, the Black Ox
132578.description:
Summons an effigy of Niuzao, the Black Ox for 25 sec that attacks your primary target and Stomps when you cast Blackout Kick, damaging all nearby enemies.

While active, 40% of damage delayed by Stagger is instead Staggered by Niuzao, and Niuzao is healed for 100% of your purified Stagger.

213709.name: Brambles
213709.description: Brambles100 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidSharp brambles protect you, absorbing and reflecting up to (Attack Power * 0.2) damage from each attack.While Barkskin is active, the brambles also deal (7.5% of Attack Power) Nature damage to all nearby enemies every 1 sec.

153626.name: Arcane Orb
153626.description:
Launches an Arcane Orb forward from your position, traveling up to 40 yds, dealing 1,146 Arcane damage to enemies it passes through.

Grants 1 Arcane Charge when cast and every time it deals damage.

1264040.name: Flux Collapse
1264040.description: Flux Collapse100 yd rangeInstantBroken pipes leak excess power, inflicting 50845 Arcane damage to enemies within 2.5 yards of the impact. Causes an Arcane Spill to form for 1.3 min.

460602.name: Quick Shot
460602.description: Quick Shot100 yd range1.5 sec castKeeza fires a quick shot at a random player, inflicting 17484 Physical damage.

1277383.name: Sporebloom
1277383.description: Sporebloom100 yd rangeInstant10 sec cooldownA cloud of developing spores shields the caster, reducing damage taken by 50%.Being hit with a reflected spore consumes the shield's nutrients, removing it.

1239268.name: Voidwarding
1239268.description: VoidwardingChanneled (27 sec cast)The Voidwarden exerts control over the area around it, knocking back players who enter and inflicting 108868 Shadow damage plus an additional 45362 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 30 sec.

428608.name: Live by the Glaive
428608.description: Live by the GlaiveInstantRequires Demon HunterWhen you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

1252438.name: Void Lash
1252438.description: Void LashMelee RangeInstantThe caster's offhand strikes all enemies in a cone in front of the caster, inflicting Shadow damage.

1264648.name: Pan-GO-lin Time
1264648.description: Pan-GO-lin TimeAnima PowerInstantIncrease movement speed the longer you keep moving. Breaks in combat.

116095.name: Disable
116095.description: Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 15 sec, duration refreshed by your melee attacks.

1280213.name: Fungal Growth
1280213.description: Fungal GrowthUnlimited rangeInstantRequires DruidSunfire damage has a chance to grow a magical mushroom at a target's location. After 1 sec, the mushroom detonates, dealing (265.85% of Spell Power) Nature damage and then an additional (150% of Spell Power) Nature damage over 10 sec. Affected targets are slowed by 50%.Generates up to 20 Astral Power based on targets hit.

161399.name: Swap
161399.description: SwapItem Effect40 yd range1.5 sec castSwaps your location with another party member. Cannot be used in combat.

1264359.name: Wild Thrash
1264359.description:
Command your pet to thrash all enemies within 10 yds, dealing 66 Physical damage to them. Damage is increased by 200% if Wild Thrash hits 2 or more enemies.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

1266350.name: Claimed Spirit
1266350.description: Claimed Spirit100 yd rangeInstantJin'Ma claims the Flayed Spirit in his Phylactery, increasing his damage done by 5% for 30 sec. This effect stacks.

1241214.name: Earth Bolt
1241214.description: Earth Bolt40 yd range2.5 sec cast3 sec cooldownThe caster launches a bolt of earth at the target, inflicting 12 Nature damage.

412403.name: Volatile Amalgamation
412403.description: Volatile AmalgamationChanneled (10 sec cast)As the elementals combine, players with Blazing Heat and Corrupting Shadow lose all applications and trigger a Volatile Shadowflame.Applies Lingering Flames and Lingering Shadows to players with applications of Blazing Heat and Corrupting Shadow.

466974.name: Goblin Gun
466974.description: Goblin Gun15 yd rangeInstantZee's ranged attacks inflict Physical damage.

425030.name: Volcanic Guard
425030.description: Volcanic Guard40 yd range3 sec castThe caster's blazing shield charges up and erupts, inflicting 100456 Fire damage in a frontal cone.

160029.name: Resurrecting
160029.description: Resurrecting100 yd rangeInstantThe player is being resurrected.

470966.name: Bladestorm
470966.description: Bladestorm200 yd rangeInstantCommander Kroluk enters a battle-trance, fixating on a player and inflicting 76268 Physical damage every 1 sec to players within 7 yards.Commander Kroluk continues to Bladestorm until his warparty is defeated.

1253855.name: Brilliant Dispersion
1253855.description: Brilliant DispersionUnlimited range4 sec castLothraxion unleashes radiant swarms toward several players, blasting players within 8 yards of the impact for 61014 Holy damage and searing an additional 20338 Holy damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Fractured Images scatter, erupting with Mirrored Rend to enemies within 5 yards of their creation.

116768.name: Blackout Kick!
116768.description: Blackout Kick!InstantRequires MonkRequires level 1You have a 8% chance when you Tiger Palm to cause your next Blackout Kick to cost no Chi within 15 sec.

33110.name: Prayer of Mending
33110.description: Prayer of MendingUnlimited rangeInstantRequires PriestRequires level 1Places a ward on an ally that heals them for (61% of Spell Power) the next time they take damage, and then jumps to another ally within 30 yds. Jumps up to 4 times and lasts 30 sec after each jump.

51714.name: Razorice
51714.description: RazoriceUnlimited rangeInstantRequires Death KnightRequires level 1Engrave your weapon with a rune that causes [Max((0.01127 * Attack Power), 1)]% extra weapon damage as Frost damage and increases enemies' vulnerability to your Frost attacks by 3%, stacking up to 5 times. Modifying your rune requires a Runeforge in Ebon Hold.

271896.name: Blade Rush
271896.description: Blade RushInstantRequires RogueCharge to your target with your blades out, dealing [(375.3% of Attack Power)% * 230 / 100] Physical damage to the target and (375.3% of Attack Power)% to all other nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8% targets.While Blade Flurry is active, damage to non-primary targets is increased by 100%.Generates 25 Energy over 5 sec.

342601.name: Ritual of Doom
342601.description: Begins a ritual that sacrifices a random participant to summon a doomguard. Requires the caster and 4 additional party members to complete the ritual.

198013.name: Eye Beam
198013.description: Blasts all enemies in front of you, for up to 283 Chaos damage over 1.8 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

1236778.name: Arcane Geyser
1236778.description: Arcane Geyser300 yd rangeInstantCaster unleashes arcane energies from the ground, inflicting 12 Arcane damage to players caught in the blast.

383346.name: Expurgation
383346.description: Expurgation100 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinYour Blade of Justice causes the target to burn for (68.85% of Attack Power) [Holy Crusader: Holy / Radiant] damage over 9 sec. When reapplied, any remaining damage is added to the new effect.

1215157.name: Unstable Void Essence
1215157.description: Unstable Void Essence1000 yd rangeInstantDegentrius launches unstable void energy that bounces to 4 locations, inflicting 50845 Shadow damage to any player at the point of impact.If no player is in the area the unstable void essence erupts in Void Destruction.

1224794.name: Conquer
1224794.description: ConquerUnlimited rangeInstantSalhadaar smashes his current target, inflicting 544339 Physical damage and an additional 408254 Shadow damage split among all players within 8 yards, knocking them upwards.Players struck lose a stack of Oath-Bound. Increases damage taken from Conquer by 500% for 20 sec.

1856.name: Vanish
1856.description: Allows you to vanish from sight, entering stealth while in combat. For the first 3 sec after vanishing, damage and harmful effects received will not break stealth. Also breaks movement impairing effects.

1251877.name: Gift of an Ancient Guardian
1251877.description: Gift of an Ancient GuardianInstantRequires DruidIronfur increases your Mastery by 5%.

212988.name: Painbringer
212988.description: PainbringerInstantRequires Demon HunterConsuming a Soul Fragment reduces all damage you take by 3% for 8 sec.

1266619.name: First In, Last Out

40120.name: Travel Form
40120.description: Travel FormInstantRequires DruidShapeshift into swift flight form, increasing movement speed by 420% and allowing you to fly. Cannot use in combat. Replaces Flight Form.The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of movement impairing effects.

394049.name: Balance of All Things
394049.description: Balance of All ThingsInstantRequires DruidEntering Eclipse increases your critical strike chance with Nature spells by 20%, decreasing by 2% every 1 sec.

464996.name: Bloodthirsty Cackle

1247039.name: Fluorescent Outburst

1235193.name: Holy Ray
1235193.description: Holy RayInstantRequires PriestEach successive Penance bolt during a channel deals 5% increased damage and healing.

435156.name: Light Expulsion
435156.description: Light Expulsion40 yd rangeInstantA burst of light leaving the Risen's body inflicts 5298 Holy damage to all players within 60 yards.

467620.name: Rampage

1278969.name: Frantic Frenzy
1278969.description: Frantic FrenzyInstantRequires DruidUnleash a furious frenzy, flickering to nearby targets in front of you 5 times and clawing all enemies around them for (18.72% of Attack Power) Physical damage and an additional [(37.53% of Attack Power) * 6 / 2] Bleed damage over 6 sec.Awards 5 combo points.

49020.name: Obliterate
49020.description: A brutal attack that deals 37 Physical and 36 Frost damage.

457387.name: Wind Barrier
457387.description: Wind BarrierInstantRequires ShamanIf you have a totem active, your totem grants you a shield absorbing (Total Health * 6 / 100) damage for 30 sec every 30 sec.

1224302.name: Burrow

1227549.name: Banishment
1227549.description: BanishmentUnlimited rangeInstantSalhadaar exiles several players, inflicting 10887 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. Upon expiration, each target bursts with torturous void inflicting 24495 Shadow damage.

1247422.name: Scorching Valor
1247422.description: Scorching Valor1.5 sec castSummons and dismisses this mount."Some cannot be held back or restrained. Scorching Valor will seek greatness and only serve those who can serve their pursuit."In-Game Shop

1282535.name: Lesser Ghoul
1282535.description: Lesser GhoulInstantRequires Death KnightA mindless servant of the Scourge, raised to obey its master's commands for 15 sec.

272790.name: Frenzy
272790.description: Frenzy100 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterIncreases the attack speed of your active pets by 20%.

469377.name: Explosive Payload
469377.description: Explosive Payload300 yd rangeInstantThe round lodges in the original target exploding after 6 sec, inflicting 68390 Fire damage to players and detonates Unstable Crawler Mines within 15 yards.

343170.name: Premeditation

112042.name: Threatening Presence
112042.description: Threatening PresenceInstantIntimidates any target the Voidwalker attacks, increasing threat generation.Auto-Cast:Always keep this effect active.(Right - Click to toggle)

1246372.name: Awaken the Lightbloom
1246372.description: Awaken the Lightbloom3 sec castZiekket sows Light energy into the soil, sprouting Lightspawn Lashers and reawakening any that are Dormant.Lashers reawaken with Vicious Regrowth.

391528.name: Convoke the Spirits

Call upon the spirits for an eruption of energy, channeling a rapid flurry of 16 Druid spells and abilities over 4 sec.

You will cast Wild Growth, Swiftmend, Moonfire, Wrath, Regrowth, Rejuvenation, Rake, and Thrash on appropriate nearby targets, favoring your current shapeshift form.

1264110.name: Felstorm
1264110.description: FelstormInstantRequires WarlockKystia creates copies of herself nearby, each of which cast Felstorm.

1217987.name: Combination Canisters
1217987.description: Combination CanistersUnlimited range2 sec castGallywix taps into his reserve stash firing both Fused Canisters and Tick-Tock Canisters at the same time.After 5 sec the Fused Canisters detonate inflicting 63505 Fire damage to players within 8 yards, and after 6 sec the Tick-Tock Canisters detonate inflicting 63505 damage to players within 4 yards. These effects split evenly among effected players.All targets become afflicted with Mechengineer's Canisters.If this fails to hit at least 3 targets all players suffer the full effect.

1227331.name: Besiege
1227331.description: BesiegeUnlimited rangeChanneled (10 sec cast)The Voidwing sweeps across the sky, exhaling a breath that inflicts 45 Cosmic damage every 0.3 sec to any player within the effect.

406730.name: Crucible Instability
406730.description: Crucible InstabilityUnlimited rangeInstantElemental forms are unstable being transferred into the Crucible, reducing all damage taken by 99%.

444741.name: Anti-Magic Shell
444741.description: Anti-Magic Shell40 yd rangeInstant1 min cooldownRequires Death KnightSurrounds your target in an Anti-Magic Shell for 5 sec, absorbing up to [Total Health * 30 / 100 * (1 + Versatility) * 1 * 1] magic damage and preventing application of harmful magical effects. Damage absorbed generates Runic Power.

18562.name: Swiftmend
18562.description: Consume a Regrowth, Wild Growth, or Rejuvenation effect to instantly heal an ally for 4,000.

449332.name: Encroaching Shadows
449332.description: Encroaching ShadowsInstantThe Order of Night's ritual on Beledar inflicts 1059638 Shadow damage to those unprotected by Radiant Light, killing instantly upon expiration.

1236692.name: Void Reconstitution
1236692.description: Void ReconstitutionItem EffectInstantTaking damage has a high chance to cause you to devour the essence of nearby enemies, dealing 11120 Shadow damage split between them and healing you for 150% of the damage dealt.Fatal damage not exceeding 30388 instead restores you to 20% health and reconstitutes you as unstable void for 6 sec. Exceed 50% health to stabilize and avoid death. This effect may occur once per 8 min. The Nucleus is unable to deal damage while recharging.

1215488.name: Disintegration Beam
1215488.description: Disintegration Beam300 yd rangeInstantThe goblin fires a disintigration beam at a random player, inflicting 830 Fire damage every 1 sec for 12 sec. Every 1 sec, damage is increased by 100%.

417039.name: Blistering Heat
417039.description: Blistering HeatInstantSmolderon's body incinerates the air, inflicting 7032 Fire damage to all players every 3 sec.

44949.name: Whirlwind Off-Hand
44949.description: Unleashes a whirlwind of steel, striking all nearby enemies for 56 Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

1262252.name: Felstorm
1262252.description: FelstormInstantRequires WarlockThe caster engulfs their surrounding area in fel fire, inflicting 1 Fire damage to all nearby players every 1 sec.

444826.name: Chains of Ice
444826.description: Chains of Ice30 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightShackles the target with frozen chains, reducing movement speed by 40% for 8 sec.

2098.name: Dispatch
2098.description:
Finishing move that dispatches the enemy, dealing damage per combo point:
   1 point  : 21 damage
   2 points: 42 damage
   3 points: 65 damage
   4 points: 87 damage
   5 points: 107 damage

1280119.name: Hulking Fragment
1280119.description: Hulking FragmentUnlimited rangeInstantDegentrius smashes a massive fragment into their current target, inflicting 177958 Shadow damage to players within 8 yards.The force of the impact knocks away other players within 8 yards of their target.

1242171.name: Void Volley
1242171.description: Void VolleyInstantRequires PriestVoid Torrent is replaced with Void Volley for 20 sec after it is cast. Void VolleyReleases a volley of pure void energy, firing 10 bolts at your target and 1 bolt at all enemies within 10 yards of your target for (106.049% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.Generates 10 Insanity.

8690.name: Hearthstone
8690.description: HearthstoneItem Effect10 sec cast30 min cooldown1 ChargeReturns you to Hearthstone Location. Speak to an Innkeeper in a different place to change your home location.

193315.name: Sinister Strike
193315.description:
Viciously strike an enemy, causing 43 Physical damage.

Awards 1 combo point each time it strikes.

1213469.name: Dark Slug
1213469.description: Dark Slug45 yd range1.5 sec castShoots at a random enemy, inflicting 8793 Shadow damage.

428682.name: Boundless Moonlight
428682.description: Boundless Moonlight100 yd rangeInstantRequires Druid[ Guardian: Lunar BeamLunar Beam now causes you to leech life equal to 10% of all damage dealt to enemies within the beam. Fury of EluneFury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for (216.32% of Spell Power) Astral damage / Balance Fury of EluneFury of Elune now ends with a flash of energy, blasting nearby enemies for (216.32% of Spell Power) Astral damage. Full MoonFull Moon calls down 2 Minor Moons that deal (188.5% of Spell Power) Astral damage and generate 3 Astral Power.]

77762.name: Lava Surge
77762.description: Lava SurgeInstantRequires ShamanRequires level 19The Shaman's next Lava Burst casts instantly.Modifies Cast Time -100%: Lava BurstModifies Effect #2's Value 0%: Lava Burst

1224736.name: Protected Core
1224736.description: Protected CoreInstantAn arcane shield protects the caster's energy core, absorbing 0 damage. Upon removal, the caster's Exposed Core vents Arcane Flurries.

1267029.name: Call The Grove
1267029.description: Call The GroveChanneled (7 days cast)The caster frantically runs toward any nearby dormant lashers.

358733.name: Glide
358733.description:
Reduces your falling speed.

You can activate this ability with the jump key while falling.

23922.name: Shield Slam
23922.description:
Slams the target with your shield, causing 81 Physical damage.

Generates 15 Rage.

459731.name: Huntmaster's Call
459731.description: Huntmaster's CallInstantRequires HunterSummoning a Dire Beast 8 times sounds the Horn of Valor, summoning either Hati or Fenryr to battle.HatiIncreases the damage of all your pets by 4%.FenryrPounces your primary target, inflicting a heavy bleed that deals (800% of Attack Power) damage over 8 sec and grants you 4% Haste.

1227809.name: The Hunt
1227809.description: The HuntUnlimited range6 sec castVelaryn marks a player as her prey, charging towards them and inflicting 340212 Chaos damage. This effect is reduced for each player standing within the path of The Hunt.Velaryn additionally strikes players along the path, inflicting 51032 Chaos damage to players within 3 yards of each player struck.

115178.name: Resuscitate
115178.description: Returns the spirit to the body, restoring a dead target to life with 35% of maximum health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

448492.name: Thunderclap
448492.description: Thunderclap100 Energy1 sec castInflicts 14835 Nature damage to enemies within 50 yards and reduces movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

1234244.name: Inverse Gravity
1234244.description: Inverse GravityUnlimited rangeInstantAfter 5 sec intense gravity pushes outward from the target, inflicting 9072 Cosmic damage and violently knocking away players within 6 yards.Hitting players who have Crushing Gravity removes it from them instead of knocking them away.

1234248.name: Crushing Gravity
1234248.description: Crushing GravityUnlimited rangeInstantAfter 5 sec intense gravity pushes down around the target, inflicting 13608 Cosmic damage and applying Crushed to all players within 2 yards.

83381.name: Kill Command
83381.description: Kill Command100 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterRequires level 1Give the command to kill, causing your pet to charge your target and savagely deal (206% of Attack Power) Physical damage to the enemy.

121536.name: Angelic Feather
121536.description: Places a feather at the target location, granting the first ally to walk through it 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec. Only 3 feathers can be placed at one time.

1219611.name: Eradicating Salvo
1219611.description: Eradicating Salvo300 yd rangeInstantThe Plexus Sentinel targets a player to be purged, firing two missiles in quick succession. Each missile inflicts 461176 Arcane damage split evenly between players within 6 yards and knocking players away from the primary target.If a missile fails to hit at least 5 players, it instead inflicts 90723 Arcane damage to all players. []

264689.name: Fatigued
264689.description: FatiguedUnlimited rangeInstantCannot benefit from Primal Rage or other similar effects.

456486.name: Dangerous Skies
456486.description: Dangerous SkiesInstantThe nerubians swarm the skies, making it too dangerous to fly.

1235405.name: Bonespiked
1235405.description: Bonespiked100 yd rangeInstantBroken bones litter the ground, inflicting 10169 Physical damage every 0.5 sec and reducing movement speed by 50%.

1280134.name: Searing Light
1280134.description: Searing Light40 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestLaunches a volley of holy light at the target, causing [(67.575% of Spell Power) * 1 * 1 * (3 + 0 + 0)] Holy damage to an enemy or [(290.7% of Spell Power) * 1 * (3 + 0 + 0)] healing to an ally over 2 sec. Castable while moving.When you heal with Penance, everyone with your Atonement is healed for (18.72% of Spell Power).

438588.name: Mass Eruption
438588.description: Mass EruptionInstantRequires EvokerRequires level 10Empower spells cause your next Eruption to strike up to 3 targets. When striking less than 3 targets, Eruption damage is increased by 15% for each missing target.

1238760.name: Starvation Effigy
1238760.description: Starvation Effigy100 yd range1.5 sec castThe totem drives players into an insatiable hunger, reducing their maximum health by 3% for 15 sec. This effect stacks.

121557.name: Angelic Feather
121557.description: Angelic FeatherUnlimited rangeInstantRequires PriestPlaces a feather at the target location, granting the first ally to walk through it 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec. Only 3 feathers can be placed at one time.

254813.name: Summon Sharkbait
254813.description: Summon Sharkbait1.5 sec castSummon and dismiss Sharkbait with a yummy cracker. This mount changes depending on your Riding skill and location."Sharkbait's loyalty lies with whomever keeps the crackers coming."Drop: Harlan SweeteZone: Freehold (Mythic)Treasure: Challenger's CacheZone: Freehold

381750.name: Blessing of the Bronze
381750.description: Blessing of the Bronze100 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerRequires level 60Weave the threads of time, reducing the cooldown of a major movement ability for all party and raid members by 15% for 1 hour.

1231101.name: King's Hunger
1231101.description: King's HungerUnlimited rangeInstantSalhadaar drains the energy from the Voidwing, increases its damage taken by 100% and inflicting 16633 Shadow damage to all players every 1 sec for 30 sec.Upon completion, Salhadaar heals himself equal to the Voidwing's remaining health as the drake fades from existence.

391481.name: Coagulopathy
391481.description: Coagulopathy100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightEnemies affected by Blood Plague take 5% increased damage from you and Death Strike increases the damage of your Blood Plague by 10% for 15 sec, stacking up to 4 times.

1264320.name: Fling Chair
1264320.description: Fling Chair100 yd rangeInstantViolently launches a giant chair, inflicting 15 Physical damage to all enemies within 3 yards of impact, knocking them back and disorienting them for 4 sec.

1219491.name: Debilitating Shriek
1219491.description: Debilitating ShriekInstantKalis continually releases piercing shrieks, inflicting 25423 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec and increasing their damage taken from Debilitating Shriek by 30% for 3 sec. This effect stacks.Latch's Heaving Yank interrupts this ability.

1270990.name: Harmonic Surge
1270990.description: Harmonic SurgeInstantRequires Monk MistweaverCasting Thunder Focus Tea guarantees that your next 2 casts of Tiger Palm or Vivify will trigger a Harmonic Surge, dealing [10 * (400% of Spell Power) / 100] Nature damage split between your target and other nearby enemies, and [40 * (500% of Spell Power) / 100] healing to up to 5 injured allies. BrewmasterCasting guarantees that your next 2 casts of Tiger Palm or Vivify will trigger a Harmonic Surge, dealing [55 * (400% of Spell Power) / 100] Nature damage split between your target and other nearby enemies, and [10 * (500% of Spell Power) / 100] healing to up to 5 injured allies. (500ms cooldown)

1216284.name: Stealth
1216284.description: StealthInstantPuts the caster in stealth mode.

1243408.name: Echoing Fury
1243408.description: Echoing Fury100 yd rangeInstantThe charging Echo of Nalorakk ravages the first target in their path, inflicting 50845 Nature damage.

1227247.name: Void Cascade
1227247.description: Void Cascade100 yd range6 sec castCharonus projects condensed cosmic power toward nearby players. Players coming into contact with this energy suffer 152535 Shadow damage and are knocked away.

461867.name: Sacrosanct Crusade
461867.description: Sacrosanct CrusadeInstantRequires Paladin ProtectionDivine Toll surrounds you with a Holy barrier for 15% of your maximum health.Hammer of Light heals you for 15% of your maximum health, increased by 2% for each additional target hit. Any overhealing done with this effect gets converted into a Holy barrier instead. RetributionWake of Ashes surrounds you with a Holy barrier for 10% of your maximum health.Hammer of Light heals you for 5% of your maximum health, increased by 1% for each additional target hit. Any overhealing done with this effect gets converted into a Holy barrier instead.

VengeanceFracture has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Soul Cleave consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (540% of Attack Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

BoarA Boar charges through your target 1 time, dealing (1200% of Attack Power) physical damage to the primary target and (1440% of Attack Power) damage to up to 5 nearby enemies. III: Heals 1,050 instantly and 467 over 8 sec.

He then delivers a final empowered blow, inflicting 139824 Shadow damage and launching the target high into the air.The final blow leaves behind a patch of Spectral Decay.

BrewmasterStore vitality from 25% of your damage dealt and 12% of your effective healing.For 10 sec after casting Celestial Brew your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional damage over 8 sec.
