448468.name: Death Screech
448468.description: Death ScreechInstantOn death, the bat lets out a final screech inflicting 40 Sonic damage to all enemies within 5 yards.

473668.name: Pulsing Shriek
473668.description: Pulsing ShriekInstantThe caster shields themselves, absorbing 165 damage and preventing silencing effects. They shriek for 16 sec, inflicting 6 Shadow damage every 2 sec to players within 60 yards.

1263983.name: Condensed Mass
1263983.description: Condensed MassUnlimited rangeChanneled (0 sec cast)Gravitic Orbs fixate a player, inflicting 2542 Shadow damage every 1 sec and reducing their movement speed by 3%. This effect stacks.

473789.name: Fetid Bile
473789.description: Fetid BileUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster's bile pool inflicts 16 Nature damage every 1 sec to players within.

1221483.name: Arcing Energy
1221483.description: Arcing Energy30 yd range1.5 sec castThe caster charges a random player with arcane energy, inflicting 5298 Arcane damage every 1.5 sec to players within 5 yards for 9 sec.

453236.name: Student of Suffering
453236.description: Student of SufferingInstantRequires Demon Hunter[ Havoc: Eye Beam / DevourerVoid Ray] applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by (8 * $mas)% and granting 5 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

1220415.name: Turbo-Actuation
1220415.description: Turbo-ActuationItem EffectInstantEvery 6 sec, Zap your target and 1 nearby enemy for (836 * 1) Nature damage.Casting 30 spells Turbo-Charges you for 15 sec, doubling the frequency of your Zaps and upgrading them into Giga-Zaps, dealing (836 * 3 * 1) Nature Damage instead.

1258474.name: Crush
1258474.description: Crush300 yd rangeInstantThe caster smashes down with a crushing fist inflicting 40 Physical damage and knocking back enemies within 8 yards of the impact.

1245046.name: Blink
1245046.description: Blink100 yd rangeInstantTeleports the mage forward.

1239675.name: Latent Energy
1239675.description: Latent EnergyItem Effect100 yd rangeInstantYour harmful abilities draw focused void through the prism to deal (3441 * 1) Cosmic damage split between your target and nearby enemies. Damage increased by 30% per enemy struck, up to 150%. This effect may occur every 10 sec and accumulates Latent Power within the prism, up to 18 times.

1219040.name: Soulweave
1219040.description: Soulweave300 yd range1.683 min castThe Unbound Soul is slowly wrapped in silk bindings, transforming into a member of the Shadowguard.

473531.name: Empty Tank
473531.description: Empty TankInstantThe defunct bike begins with an empty fuel tank, preventing it from being used. Upon the tank being filled with oil, the bike becomes available to ride again.

265805.name: Zandalari Enchanting
265805.description: Zandalari EnchantingInstantFaction: HordeAllows an enchanter to enchant basic items up to a maximum potential skill of 175.

1249989.name: Coordinated Assault
1249989.description: Coordinated AssaultUnlimited rangeInstantMuro'jin hurls an axe at players knocked up by Carrion Swoop, inflicting 254225 Physical damage and knocking them further upwards.

1239487.name: Binding Javelin
1239487.description: Binding Javelin100 yd rangeInstantTaah'bat launches arcane javelins at targeted players, inflicting 10596 Arcane damage to players within 8 yards of the targets and tethering all players struck. Each tether inflicts 2649 Arcane damage every 1 sec and reduces their movement speed by 50%, increasing in intensity every 5 seconds until the javelin is destroyed. This effect stacks.

411811.name: Slime Ejection
411811.description: Slime Ejection100 yd range5 sec castThe slime infuses several players with volatile goop for 5 sec. Upon expiration, infused players inflict 51444 Nature damage to players within 10 yards.

1269660.name: Gift of Maul
1269660.description: Gift of MaulInstantRequires DruidAfter you cast Berserk or Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc, you gain access to Wild Guardian: Wild Guardian:Spirits of the wild come to your aid, causing your next 2 casts of Ironfur, Maul, and Frenzied Regeneration to be echoed at 50% effectiveness.

431186.name: Frostfire Empowerment
431186.description: Frostfire Empowerment100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageRequires level 1Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. FrostDamage from Frostfire Empowerment applies 1 stack of Freezing

1245422.name: Tsunami of Arcane
1245422.description: Tsunami of ArcaneUnlimited rangeInstantThe Soulbinder angrily strikes her primary target, inflicting 0 Arcane damage every 5.2 sec for until canceled to target. Player who hit by it increases Mystic Lash damage they taken by 40% and Physical damage by 15% for 45 sec.

1264087.name: Doomsayer
1264087.description: DoomsayerInstantRequires Demon Hunter VengeanceActivating Infernal Strike out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 1 Voidfall Meteor. DevourerActivating Void Ray out of combat or within 10 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration. HavocActivating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

1216529.name: Shield Bash
1216529.description: Shield Bash100 yd range3 sec castThe guard slams their shield against the target knocking them back, inflicting 55 Physical damage, and increasing Physical damage taken by 20% for 20 sec.

118297.name: Immolate
118297.description: Immolate10 Mana40 yd range2 sec cast10 sec cooldownRequires ShamanBurns an enemy, then inflicts additional Fire damage every 3 sec for 21 sec.

52212.name: Death and Decay
52212.description: Corrupts the ground targeted by the Death Knight, causing Shadow damage every sec that targets remain in the area for 10 sec.

284171.name: Banshee Wail
284171.description: Banshee Wail40 yd range1.5 sec castWails with anguish, inflicting Shadow damage to an enemy.

1258529.name: Knowledge of Timeways
1258529.description:
Increases experience gained from killing monsters and completing quests by 5%.

Completing Timewalking dungeons increases the effect and refreshes the duration.

Upon reaching 4 applications, transforms to Mastery of Timeways, increasing that effect to 30%.

450521.name: Aspect of Harmony
450521.description: Aspect of HarmonyInstantRequires Monk MistweaverStore vitality from 10% of your damage dealt and 30% of your healing. Vitality stored from overhealing is reduced.For 10 sec after casting Thunder Focus Tea your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional healing over 8 sec. BrewmasterStore vitality from 25% of your damage dealt and 12% of your effective healing.For 10 sec after casting Celestial Brew your spells and abilities draw upon the stored vitality to deal 40% additional damage over 8 sec.

465463.name: Turbo Charge
465463.description: Turbo ChargeUnlimited range4 sec castGeezle siphons power from the generator into his battery pack, gaining 10 Electricity and emitting 4768 Nature damage to all players every 1 sec for 10 sec.

447151.name: Soaring Meaderbee
447151.description: Soaring Meaderbee1.5 sec castSummons and dismisses this mount."This humble bee dreams of open skies. Whether or not an adventurer is along for the ride is of no consequence to it."Vendor: CendvinZone: The Isle of DornCost: 900

325174.name: Spirit Link Totem
325174.description: Spirit Link Totem100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanRequires level 16Summons a totem at the target location for 6 sec, which reduces damage taken by all party and raid members within 10 yards by 10%. Immediately and every 1 sec, the health of all affected players is redistributed evenly.

1235158.name: Consume
1235158.description: ConsumeUnlimited rangeInstantAdarus drains the essence of players afflicted with Devourer's Ire, inflicting 3591 Cosmic damage and absorbing the next 10945 healing received.This blast applies Unending Hunger.

1217099.name: Fel-Infused Freight
1217099.description: Fel-Infused FreightInstantA shipment that is barely containing the volatile magic within, inflicting 20338 Fire damage to all players every 3 sec.

431303.name: Night Bolt
431303.description: Night BoltUnlimited range2.5 sec castHurls shadow magic at a player, inflicting 12716 Shadow damage.

1250185.name: Focusing Iris
1250185.description: Focusing IrisUnlimited rangeInstantEnergy focused through the manaforge inflicts 90 Arcane damage every 1 sec to players within the iris.

474453.name: Mega Blast
474453.description: Mega BlastUnlimited range4 sec castUnleashes a massive torrent of electricity, inflicting 85487 Nature damage to all players caught in the blast.

363916.name: Obsidian Scales
363916.description: Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30%. Lasts 12 sec.

407221.name: Rushing Darkness
407221.description: Rushing DarknessUnlimited rangeInstantNeltharion blasts several players for 22047 Shadow damage and knocks them away, inflicting an additional 22047 Shadow damage to any players between Neltharion and his targets and silencing them for 3 sec.Colliding with a segment of Twisted Earth causes it to Shatter.

1329.name: Mutilate
1329.description:
Attack with both weapons, dealing a total of 42 Physical damage.

Awards 2 combo points.

120696.name: Halo
120696.description: Halo100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestCreates a ring of Holy energy around you that quickly expands to a 40 yd radius, healing allies for (161% of Spell Power) and dealing [(144.2% of Spell Power) * 1] Holy damage to enemies.Healing reduced beyond 6 targets.

1227280.name: Tentacle Slam
1227280.description:
Summons a massive shadowy appendage to slam the ground, dealing 261 Shadow damage in front of you and 8 yds around your target.

Applies Vampiric Touch to up to 6 enemies, prioritizing ones without Vampiric Touch.

Generates 6 Insanity.

1257100.name: Circuit Sense
1257100.description: Circuit SenseInstantErratic arcane energy arcs onto nearby devices, causing them to surge.

442503.name: Warblade's Hunger
442503.description: Warblade's HungerInstantRequires Demon Hunter VengeanceConsuming a Soul Fragment causes your next to deal (40% of Attack Power) additional Physical damage. HavocConsuming a Soul Fragment causes your next Chaos Strike to deal (40% of Attack Power) additional Physical damage.Felblade consumes up to 5 nearby Soul Fragments.

1258537.name: Summon Wyrms
1258537.description: Summon WyrmsChanneled (4 sec cast)The caster summons a Tiny Felwyrm every 1 sec for 4 sec.

406732.name: Spatial Paradox
406732.description:
Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.

1255503.name: Brilliant Dispersion
1255503.description: Brilliant DispersionUnlimited rangeInstantLothraxion unleashes radiant swarms toward several players, blasting players within 8 yards of the impact for 61014 Holy damage and searing an additional 20338 Holy damage every 1 sec for 6 sec. Fractured Images scatter, erupting with Mirrored Rend to enemies within 5 yards of their creation.

1216949.name: Fel Fire
1216949.description: Fel FireUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster slams the ground, knocking all enemies back and inflicting 39 Fire damage.

1252130.name: Unmake
1252130.description: UnmakeUnlimited rangeInstantVordaza unleashes a frontal surge of soulflaying force for 4.5 sec, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec to players caught in the blast and pushing them away.

432117.name: Cosmic Singularity
432117.description: Cosmic Singularity175 yd range7 sec castKi'katal the Harvester pulls in all players and begins create a spatial distortion. Upon finishing the cast, all players within 10 yards suffer 31789 Shadow damage and are knocked away.

234278.name: Fan of Knives
234278.description: Fan of KnivesInstantRequires RogueRequires level 1Sprays knives at all targets within 0 yards, dealing 1 Physical damage and applying your active poisons at their normal rate.Awards 1 combo point.

1719.name: Recklessness
1719.description: Go berserk, increasing all Rage generation by 50% and granting your abilities 20% increased critical strike chance for 12 sec.

406780.name: Shadowflame Contamination
406780.description: Shadowflame Contamination50 yd rangeInstantThe Shadowflame Amalgamation pulses every 10 sec, applying Shadowflame Contamination to all players. This dark flame inflicts 661 Shadowflame damage every 2 sec and reduces maximum health by 1%. This effect stacks.

1253489.name: Dire Echo
1253489.description: Dire Echo8 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidAwaken memories of past conflicts, causing a Dread Shade to take form nearby.While active, shades slowly travel toward your target, dealing (70% of Attack Power) Nature damage to nearby enemies and mirroring your Thrash casts.

448399.name: Battle Cry
448399.description: Battle Cry20 yd range2 sec castIncreases the attack and casting speed of the caster and allies within 20 yards by 25% for 12 sec.

400126.name: Forestwalk
400126.description: Forestwalk100 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidCasting Regrowth increases your movement speed and healing received by 8% for 6 sec.

417805.name: Spirit of Cooperation
417805.description: Spirit of CooperationInstantThe spirit of cooperation binds a fallen delver and their avenger together, granting both 10% increased movement speed and reducing damage they take by 5%.

1217291.name: Focused Detonation
1217291.description: Focused DetonationUnlimited rangeInstantDUD-1500 munitions embed into the arena exploding after 15 sec inflicting 39080 Fire damage to all players plus an additional 14655 Fire damage every 3 sec for 9 sec. This effect stacks.Interacting with the ordnance instead focuses the blast inflicting 78160 Physical damage and applying Focused Detonation, additionally knocking back.

453094.name: Halo
453094.description: Halo30 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestRequires level 1Creates a ring of Shadow energy around you that quickly expands to a 40 yd radius, healing allies for (161% of Spell Power) and dealing [(144.2% of Spell Power) * 1 * 1 * 1] Shadow damage to enemies.Healing reduced beyond 0 targets.

132409.name: Spell Lock
132409.description: Spell Lock2% of base mana40 yd rangeInstant24 sec cooldownRequires WarlockRequires level 22Counters an enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 7 sec.

1248772.name: Trapped!
1248772.description: Trapped!InstantStuns and damages the affected units.

394354.name: Wrecking Throw
394354.description: Wrecking Throw100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarriorRequires Melee WeaponHurl your weapon at the enemy, causing (600% of Attack Power) Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

1257716.name: Reanimation
1257716.description: ReanimationChanneled (12 sec cast)The caster begins to reanimate, reviving with 50% of their max health if the channel completes.

33763.name: Lifebloom
33763.description:
Heals the target for 1,715 over 15 sec. When Lifebloom expires, is dispelled, or is refreshed near expiration the target is instantly healed for 821.

May be active on one target at a time.

1238036.name: I'll fix what's got ye down.
1238036.description: I'll fix what's got ye down.Unlimited rangeInstantBrann's voice is slightly amplified with Arcane magic causing his words to potentially grant the party a buff based on what was spoken.

1234898.name: Event Horizon
1234898.description: Event Horizon4 sec castAs his health is depleted, Dimensius begins to collapse in on himself.

375357.name: Timewalker's Hearthstone
375357.description: Timewalker's HearthstoneItem Effect10 sec cast30 min cooldown1 ChargeReturns you to Hearthstone Location. Speak to an Innkeeper in a different place to change your home location.

394664.name: Shrouded Suffocation
394664.description: Shrouded Suffocation100 yd rangeInstantGarrote damage increased by 20%. Garrote generates 2 additional combo points when used from Stealth.

184662.name: Shield of Vengeance
184662.description:
Creates a barrier of holy light that absorbs 9,165 damage for 10 sec.

When the shield expires, it bursts to inflict Holy damage equal to the total amount absorbed, divided among all nearby enemies.

1263597.name: Rime Detonation
1263597.description: Rime Detonation300 yd rangeInstantInflicts 40676 Frost damage to all players and roots them in place for 4 sec.

1216825.name: Poison Spray
1216825.description: Poison SprayUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster sprays poison at players, inflicting 8 Nature damage and an additional 4 Nature damage every 1 sec for 12 sec.

456120.name: Opportunist
456120.description: OpportunistInstantRequires Warrior[ Arms: When Overpower has its cooldown reset by Tactician, your next Overpower deals 10% additional damage and 10% additional critical damage / FuryWhen Raging Blow resets its own cooldown, your next Raging Blow deals 10% additional damage and 10% additional critical damage] Stacking up to 2 times.

462508.name: Dark Prayer
462508.description: Dark PrayerMythic+ Affixes100 yd range18 sec castThe Void Emissary casts a dark prayer. When the cast completes, nearby creatures are granted Xal'atath's Gift, increasing their damage done by up to 50% and reducing their damage taken by up to 100% for 20 sec based on the amount of the Void Emissary's shield that remains.Defeating the Void Emissary empowers players, granting them 20% Versatility and 30% spell and ability cooldown rate for 30 sec.

1248009.name: Dark Terminus
1248009.description: Dark Terminus300 yd range7 sec castAraz abandons the ritual at 15% health and opens a Dark Singularity, inflicting 52922 Shadow damage to all players.

1219482.name: Rift Claws
1219482.description: Rift Claws100 yd range2 sec cast3 sec cooldownA'wazj slashes their current target with its Arcane-charged claws, inflicting 31789 Arcane damage and causing them to bleed for 4239 Physical damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

157122.name: Holy Shield
157122.description: Holy Shield100 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinYour block chance is increased by 20%, you are able to block spells, and your successful blocks deal (11.1682% of Attack Power) Holy damage to your attacker.

453770.name: Leydrinker Echo
453770.description: Leydrinker Echo100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageRequires level 10Consuming Clearcasting has a 40% chance to make your next Arcane Blast echo, repeating its damage at 70% effectiveness to the primary target and up to 4 nearby enemies.Casting Touch of the Magi grants Leydrinker.

474160.name: Viscous Bite
474160.description: Viscous Bite40 yd range1.5 sec castInflicts 3620 Shadow damage and an additional 259 Shadow damage every 0.5 sec for 5 sec.

1235075.name: Resourceful Measures
1235075.description: Resourceful Measures1 sec castThe Hoardmonger gathers from the nearest pile of resources, replacing one of his abilities with a new one.[][He can only retain one ability at a time.]

1233351.name: Frostreaper
1233351.description: Frostreaper100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightObliterate deals 10% increased damage and has a chance to tether the souls of its target and a nearby enemy to yours.Frost Strike severs the tethers, dealing (205.92% of Attack Power) Shadowfrost damage to both foes.

427905.name: Immolation Aura
427905.description: Immolation AuraInstantRequires Demon Hunter HavocEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.] DevourerEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.] VengeanceEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.]Generates 20 Fury over 6 sec.

211805.name: Gathering Storm
211805.description: Gathering StormUnlimited rangeInstantRequires Death KnightEach Rune spent during Remorseless Winter increases its damage by 10%, and extends its duration by 0.5 sec.

411730.name: Searing Fangs
411730.description: Searing Fangs15 yd range1.5 sec cast3 sec cooldownThe hound inflicts 25722 Volcanic damage to an enemy immediately and an additional 5144 Volcanic damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. This effect stacks.

474528.name: Bolt Gale
474528.description: Bolt GaleUnlimited range4 sec castThe Restless Heart fires a salvo of arrows towards a player for 5 sec, inflicting 20338 Nature damage every 0.5 sec to players in a frontal cone.

1243752.name: Icy Slick
1243752.description: Icy SlickUnlimited rangeInstantTriggered Freezing Traps leave behind a frozen patch that inflicts 25423 Frost damage every 1 sec to players within and causes them to slide.

1237267.name: Incise
1237267.description: Incise100 yd rangeInstantUpon reaching its prey, Ikuzz chomps down on the player, causing them to bleed 101690 Physical damage every 1 sec for 3 sec.

1238642.name: Bullet Seeds
1238642.description: Bullet SeedsUnlimited range3 sec castThe caster pelts explosive seeds that inflict 35 Nature damage to players within the effect.

1265560.name: Surge of Adrenaline
1265560.description: Surge of AdrenalineInstantRequires WarriorWhen Raging Blow resets its own cooldown, your auto-attack damage and speed is increased by 30% for 6 sec.

373862.name: Temporal Anomaly
373862.description: Temporal Anomaly100 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerSend forward a vortex of temporal energy, absorbing [Spell Power * 6 * (1 + Versatility)] damage on you and any allies in its path. Absorption is reduced beyond 6 targets.

200183.name: Apotheosis
200183.description: Reset the cooldown of your Holy Words, and enter a pure Holy form for 20 sec, increasing the cooldown reductions to your Holy Words by 200% and reducing their cost by 50%.

1248171.name: Void Tear
1248171.description: Void TearUnlimited rangeInstantThe Arcane Collector creates a Void Tear capable of consuming large amounts of arcane power, inflicting 83163 Shadow damage every 1 sec to players within them.

113656.name: Fists of Fury
113656.description: Pummels all targets in front of you, dealing 456 Physical damage to your primary target and 246 damage to all other enemies over 3.6 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets. Can be channeled while moving.

89751.name: Felstorm
89751.description: Felstorm60 EnergyInstant30 sec cooldownRequires WarlockThe Felguard recklessly swings its weapon, striking all nearby enemies within 8 yards for [0.33 * (Spell Power * 0.5) * 1 * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage every 1 sec for 5 sec. The Felguard cannot take any other action during Felstorm. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

441786.name: Escalating Blade
441786.description: Escalating BladeInstantRequires RogueRequires level 1After 4 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next [ Outlaw: Dispatch / SubtletyEviscerate] will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed 5 additional combo points, and granting you 5 stacks of Flawless Form.

85739.name: Whirlwind
85739.description: WhirlwindInstantRequires WarriorRequires level 1Causes your next single-target attack to strike up to 4 additional targets for 65% damage. (500ms cooldown)

408.name: Kidney Shot
408.description:
Finishing move that stuns the target. Lasts longer per combo point, up to 8 sec:
   1 point : 4 seconds
   2 points: 5 seconds
   3 points: 6 seconds
   4 points: 7 seconds
   5 points: 8 seconds

1264946.name: Moonlight Chakram
1264946.description: Moonlight ChakramInstantRequires HunterSummoning a Dire Beast 8 times sounds the Horn of Valor, summoning either Hati or Fenryr to battle.HatiIncreases the damage of all your pets by 4%.FenryrPounces your primary target, inflicting a heavy bleed that deals (800% of Attack Power) damage over 8 sec and grants you 4% Haste.

1269616.name: Wild Guardian
1269616.description: Wild GuardianInstantRequires DruidAfter you cast Berserk or Incarnation: Guardian of Ursoc, you gain access to Wild Guardian: Wild Guardian:Spirits of the wild come to your aid, causing your next 2 casts of Ironfur, Maul, and Frenzied Regeneration to be echoed at 50% effectiveness.

1269209.name: Backstab
1269209.description: BackstabLevel 80100 yd rangeInstantRequires RogueRequires level 14Stab the target, causing [(89.424% of Attack Power) * ((Max(0, Min(90 - 10, 10)) * 11 + 260) / 370)] Physical damage. Damage increased by 20% when you are behind your target [Improved Backstab: and critical strikes apply Find Weakness for 10 sec].Awards 1 combo point.

17962.name: Conflagrate
17962.description:
Triggers an explosion on the target, dealing 1,374 Fire damage.

Generates 5 Soul Shard Fragments.

360194.name: Deathmark
360194.description:
Carve a deathmark into an enemy, dealing 125 Bleed damage and restoring 80 Energy to you over 16 sec. Damage dealt to the target by your Garrote, Rupture, and Lethal Poisons is increased by 100%.

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to the target, apply it twice.

1246042.name: Valiant Crusade
1246042.description: Valiant CrusadeUnlimited rangeInstantRequires PaladinWhile out of combat, Divine Steed grants Shield of the Righteous for its duration and an additional 4.0 sec after it fades.

1269179.name: Valor
1269179.description: Valor30 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinJudgment has a chance to grant you Vanguard, causing your next Avenger's Shield to leave an echoing bolt of light in a line between you and the initial target, piercing any enemies for (300% of Attack Power) Holy damage.

439506.name: Burrow Charge
439506.description: Burrow ChargeUnlimited range4 sec castAnub'zekt burrows through a random player, inflicting 21193 Physical damage and knocking back players in his path. At the end of his path, he erupts from the earth, inflicting 26491 Physical damage and knocking back players within 13 yards.

6795.name: Growl
6795.description: Taunts the target to attack you, and increases the threat you generate against them by 800% for 6 sec.

1247056.name: Shocking Tendrils
1247056.description: Shocking TendrilsInstantCasters Tendrils are imbued with electricity, inflicting Nature damage on landing an attack.

32752.name: Summoning Disorientation
32752.description: Summoning DisorientationUnlimited rangeInstantRequires level 1The forces of the nether bind the target, stunning it for 5 sec.

412643.name: Ethereal Transmogrifier
412643.description: Ethereal TransmogrifierItem EffectInstantSummon an Ethereal Warpweaver for 10 min to transmogrify your gear.

1216253.name: Arcane Salvo
1216253.description: Arcane Salvo60 yd rangeInstantThe caster launches a salvo of magical energy, inflicting 4 Arcane damage to a player with each bolt.

1219480.name: Ascendance
1219480.description: AscendanceInstant3 min cooldownRequires ShamanRequires level 50Transform into a Flame Ascendant for 15 sec, instantly casting a Flame Shock and a 100% effectiveness Lava Burst at up to 6 nearby enemies.While ascended, Elemental Overload damage is increased by 75% and spells affected by your Mastery: Elemental Overload cause 1 additional Elemental Overload.

1215200.name: Rain of Felfire
1215200.description: Rain of Felfire100 yd rangeInstantInflicts 10 Chaos damage every 1 sec.

1222948.name: Electro-Charged Shield
1222948.description: Electro-Charged ShieldInstantThe MK II Electro Shocker envelopes itself in charged energy, reducing damage taken by 99%.Removed upon being hit with Stormfury Finger Gun.

343312.name: Furious Gaze
343312.description: Furious GazeInstantWhen Eye Beam finishes fully channeling, your Haste is increased by 367 for 12 sec.

1251568.name: Drain Soul
1251568.description: Drain SoulUnlimited rangeInstantVordaza siphons the life essence from her current target, inflicting 50845 Shadow damage and absorbing the next 26218 healing received every 1 sec for 4 sec.

321686.name: Mirror Image
321686.description: Mirror Image100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageCreates 3 copies of you nearby for 15 sec, which cast spells and attack your enemies. While active, you generate significantly reduced threat.Taking direct damage will cause one of your images to dissipate

1224669.name: Gatling Cannon
1224669.description: Gatling CannonUnlimited range0.5 sec castGallywix's barrels spit hot lead inflicting 43965 Physical damage, increasing by up to 200% as distance to the target increases.

225921.name: Fracture
225921.description: Fracture20 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterRapidly slash your target for [(103.5% of Attack Power)% + (207% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage, and shatter 2 Lesser Soul Fragments from them.Generates 25 Fury.

474754.name: Symbiotic Relationship
474754.description: Symbiotic Relationship100 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidForm a bond with an ally. Your self-healing also heals your bonded ally for 10% of the amount healed. Your healing to your bonded ally also heals you for 8% of the amount healed.

116858.name: Chaos Bolt
116858.description: Unleashes a devastating blast of chaos, dealing a critical strike for 3,149 Chaos damage. Damage is further increased by your critical strike chance.

385059.name: Odyn's Fury
385059.description:
Unleashes your power, dealing 135 Physical damage and an additional 182 Bleed damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 12 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enrages you and generates 20 Rage.

193065.name: Protective Light
193065.description: Protective LightInstantRequires PriestRequires level 1Casting Flash Heal on yourself reduces all damage you take by 10% for 10 sec.

279043.name: Shadow Blades

Upon losing all applications of Incorporeal, both A'wazj and Taah'bat become Destabilized.

1260801.name: Blooming Bile

471999.name: Rend Flesh
471999.description: Rend Flesh100 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterWhile in combat, every 30 sec your next Kill Command summons the aid of a Beast. WyvernA Wyvern descends from the skies, letting out a battle cry that increases the damage of you and your pets by 10% for 12 sec. BoarA Boar charges through your target 1 time, dealing (1200% of Attack Power) physical damage to the primary target and (1440% of Attack Power) damage to up to 5 nearby enemies. BearA Bear leaps into the fray, rending the flesh of your enemies, dealing (400% of Attack Power) damage over 10 sec to up to 8 nearby enemies.

Shares a cooldown with Blessing of Protection.

1226363.name: Twilight Scar

Usable while moving.

Generates 20 Focus.

Generates Clearcasting.

427904.description: Immolation AuraInstantRequires Demon Hunter HavocEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.] DevourerEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.] VengeanceEngulf yourself in flames, radiating [(12.317% of Attack Power) * 6] Fire damage over 6 sec.[Generates 20 Fury.]Generates 20 Fury over 6 sec.

1276767.name: Tyrant's Oblation
1276767.description: Tyrant's OblationInstantRequires WarlockYour Demonic Tyrant also empowers you while active, increasing your haste by 8%.

UnholyYour Death Coil, Epidemic and Death Strike have a 25% chance to make your next become Vampiric Strike.Vampiric Strike heals you for 2% of your maximum health and grants you Essence of the Blood Queen, increasing your Haste by 1.0%, up to 5.0% for 20 sec.

47585.name: Dispersion

Castable while stunned, feared, or silenced.

[ Arms: Cleave and Whirlwind deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active] [ Protection: Revenge and Thunder Clap deal 50% increased damage while Ravager is active.Generates 10 Rage each time it deals damage.]

Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.

 Blood Plague
A shadowy disease that drains 93 health from the target over 24 sec.

1257877.description: Scathing Review300 yd range0.001 sec castThe caster attempts to write a scathing review about the Illicit Rain. If the caster is interrupted, the spell backfires and forces them to leave.

233364.name: Leywoven Flying Carpet
233364.description: Leywoven Flying Carpet1.5 sec castSummons and dismisses a Leywoven Flying Carpet. This mount changes depending on your Riding skill and location."The threads are so thin and well-stitched, you can't imagine it wasn't made by magic, strand by strand."Drop: Nightfallen Cache

1231418.name: Recuperate
1231418.description: RecuperateChanneled (10 sec cast)Take a breather, prepare some food and have a meal. Restores 50% of your maximum health over 10 sec.

468659.name: Throw Axe
468659.description: Throw Axe60 yd range3 sec castInflicts 8 Physical damage to a player.

1282478.name: Melee
1282478.description: Melee6 yd rangeInstantThe caster inflicts Physical damage to its current target

1217345.name: Malefic Wave
1217345.description: Malefic WaveUnlimited range10 sec castLithiel Cinderfury conjures a Felshield and then projects a wave of fel fire. Impacted players suffer 7627 Fire damage every 1 sec and take 50% additional fire damage for 1 min. This effect stacks.Demons struck by Malefic Wave are granted Malefic Empowerment.

383223.name: Overflowing Shores
383223.description: Overflowing Shores100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanHealing Rain instantly restores (75.6756% of Spell Power) health to 5 allies within its area, and its radius is increased by 2 yards.

1238687.name: Feast of Misery
1238687.description: Feast of Misery100 yd range1.5 sec cast8 sec cooldownThe caster siphons the essence of all players to satiate its hunger, inflicting 7 Shadow damage and healing itself for 50% of that amount every 1 sec for 5 sec.

1263318.name: The Wind Awoken
1263318.description: The Wind AwokenItem EffectInstantYour spells and abilities have a chance to awaken the Heart of Wind, surrounding you with strong gales that increase your Haste by 173 for 10 sec.

1244102.name: Disease Cloud
1244102.description: Disease Cloud100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightArmy of the Dead now raises an Abomination that attacks enemies while emitting a disease cloud that lasts for 30 sec.Enemies within the disease cloud take 10% increased damage from your minions.

1282501.name: Dominion of Argus: Lady Sacrolash
1282501.description: Dominion of Argus: Lady Sacrolash100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarlockSummoning your Demonic Tyrant leaves open a portal to Argus for 15 sec, causing every 2 casts of Hand of Gul'dan to summon a subjugated demon that serves you for 10 sec.

1237212.name: Piercing Strand
1237212.description: Piercing StrandUnlimited rangeInstantLoom'ithar launches a heavily infused strand through their current target at high speed, inflicting 173886 Arcane damage to all players in a line and increasing damage taken from Piercing Strand by 1000% for 10 sec.

1221679.name: Farstalker's Leap
1221679.description: Farstalker's Leap50 yd rangeInstantThe wastelander leaps to a random player's location, inflicting 8477 Arcane damage to players within 4 yards of the impact.

1256015.name: Shadow Bolt
1256015.description: Shadow Bolt40 yd range2.5 sec castInflicts 12 Shadow damage to an enemy.

1244103.name: Ink?
1244103.description: Ink?40 yd range2 sec castA questionable dark substance splashes on the target, inflicting Nature damage and reducing target movement speed by 35% for 5 sec.

186254.name: Bestial Wrath
186254.description: Bestial Wrath100 yd rangeInstant1.5 min cooldownRequires HunterRequires level 34Sends you and your pet into a rage, instantly dealing (800% of Attack Power) Physical damage to its target, and increasing all damage you both deal by 20% for 15 sec. Removes all crowd control effects from your pet. [Scent of Blood: Activating Bestial Wrath grants 0 charges of Barbed Shot]

1256300.name: Massive Fel Detonation
1256300.description: Massive Fel Detonation5 sec castThe caster explodes upon death, inflicting 50 Fire damage to all enemies within 20 yds.

448469.name: Death Screech
448469.description: Death Screech8 yd rangeInstantOn death, the bat lets out a final screech inflicting 40 Sonic damage to all enemies within 5 yards.

1222795.name: Envenom
1222795.description: Envenom100 yd range3 sec castZaen drives a poisoned blade in deep at his current target, inflicting 228803 Physical damage and applying Heartstop Poison.

1271712.name: Frequent Traveler
1271712.description: Frequent TravelerInstantRequires WarlockReduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 sec and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.

1227562.name: Banishment
1227562.description: BanishmentUnlimited rangeInstantSalhadaar exiles several players, inflicting 10887 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. Upon expiration, each target bursts with torturous void inflicting 24495 Shadow damage.

388973.name: Cycle of Life
388973.description: Cycle of Life100 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerEvery 3 Emerald Blossoms leaves behind a tiny sprout which gathers 10% of your healing over 8 sec. The sprout then heals allies within 30 yds, divided evenly among targets.

435802.name: Wave of Souls
435802.description: Wave of Souls100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightReaper's Mark sends forth bursts of Shadowfrost energy and back, dealing [ Blood: (176.6% of Attack Power) / Frost(96.7079% of Attack Power)] Shadowfrost damage both ways to all enemies caught in its path.Wave of Souls critical strikes cause enemies to take 5% increased Shadowfrost damage for 15 sec, stacking up to 2 times, and it is always a critical strike on its way back.

1272299.name: Jagged Caltrops
1272299.description: Jagged CaltropsUnlimited rangeInstantValeera deploys a field of caltrops to waylay her enemies, slowing them by 70% and inflicting moderate Physical damage.

473690.name: Kinetic Explosive Gel
473690.description: Kinetic Explosive GelUnlimited range2 sec castKeeza affixes a Kinetic Explosive Gel to a player which inflicts 7947 Fire damage every 1 sec for 12 sec.Removing the gel causes it to erupt with force, inflicting 10596 Fire damage to players and knocking up all Ticking Time Bombs within 5 yards.

408160.name: Shadow Strike
408160.description: Shadow StrikeUnlimited rangeInstantNeltharion strikes the player's body while they are incorporeal, inflicting 36746 Physical damage to the body and hurtling it towards the player. The player rejoins their body and receives its missing health as Shadow damage. Increases damage taken from Sunder Shadow by 300% for 40 sec.The player's body colliding with a segment of Twisted Earth causes it to Shatter.

27285.name: Seed of Corruption
27285.description: Seed of CorruptionUnlimited rangeInstantRequires WarlockRequires level 10Embeds a demon seed in the enemy target that will explode after 12 sec, dealing (215% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yards and applying Corruption to them. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.The seed will detonate early if the target is hit by other detonations, or takes (Shadow spell power * 50 / 100) damage from your spells.

381748.name: Blessing of the Bronze
381748.description: Blessing of the Bronze100 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerRequires level 60Weave the threads of time, reducing the cooldown of a major movement ability for all party and raid members by 15% for 1 hour.

1214780.name: Maximum Distortion
1214780.description: Maximum Distortion4 sec castThe mechadrone overloads its communications array, inflicting 10596 Sonic damage to players within 60 yards and pushing them away every 2 sec for 12 sec.

1238076.name: Thornblade
1238076.description: Thornblade100 yd rangeInstantThe caster appears behind a target and backstabs them, inflicting 6 Nature damage and causing them to bleed an additional 6 Physical damage every 2 sec for 6 sec.

1269175.name: Glory of the Vanguard
1269175.description: Glory of the Vanguard30 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinJudgment has a chance to grant you Vanguard, causing your next Avenger's Shield to leave an echoing bolt of light in a line between you and the initial target, piercing any enemies for (300% of Attack Power) Holy damage.

444347.name: Death Charge
444347.description: Death ChargeInstant45 sec cooldown1 ChargeRequires Death KnightRequires level 1Call upon your Death Charger to break free of movement impairment effects.For 10 sec, while upon your Death Charger your movement speed is increased by 100%, you cannot be slowed below 100% of normal speed, and you are immune to forced movement effects and knockbacks.

451500.name: Energy Burst
451500.description: Energy BurstUnlimited rangeInstantRequires MonkRequires level 1When you consume Blackout Kick!, you have a 100% chance to generate 1 Chi.

366155.name: Reversion
366155.description:
Reverse an ally's injuries, healing them for 873 over 12 sec.

When Reversion critically heals, its duration is extended by 2 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.

444487.name: Controlled Instincts
444487.description: Controlled Instincts100 yd rangeInstantRequires Mage Frost60% of the direct damage dealt by a Frost Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Arcane60% of the direct damage dealt by an Arcane Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

1285883.name: Blooming Bile
1285883.description: Blooming BileInstantLightbloom can upset the stomach. Regurgitates blessed bile upon enemies within 20 yards, inflicting Holy damage every second. Gross.

982.name: Revive Pet
982.description: Revives your pet, returning it to life with 100% of its base health.

433443.name: Impale
433443.description: Impale100 yd rangeInstantAnub'zekt launches a cone of spikes through the earth at his current target, inflicting 52982 Physical damage to and knocking back players hit.

1238773.name: Extinction
1238773.description: ExtinctionUnlimited rangeInstantDimensius hurls a fragment of a broken world at players, inflicting 360 Cosmic damage to players caught in its path and stunning them for 4 sec.

474768.name: Delivery!
474768.description: Delivery!Unlimited rangeInstantZaen calls upon the warehouse workers above to throw Forbidden Freight at players, causing 203380 Fire damage on impact and knocking them away.

1237325.name: Gamma Burst
1237325.description: Gamma BurstUnlimited rangeInstantDimensius tears through space with an immense stream of radiation that inflicts 11 Cosmic damage every 1 sec to all players and pushes them away over 4 sec.

1258528.name: Mastery of Timeways
1258528.description: Mastery of TimewaysInstantIncreases experience gained from killing monsters and completing quests by 30%.Completing Timewalking dungeons refreshes the duration.

113942.name: Demonic Gateway
113942.description: Demonic GatewayInstantRequires WarlockFaded into the nether and unable to use another Demonic Gateway.

81262.name: Efflorescence
81262.description: Efflorescence100 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidRequires level 1Restores (58.56% of Spell Power) health to three injured allies within 10 yards of the initial target every 2 sec for 30 sec.

417003.name: Twisting Blade
417003.description: Twisting BladeUnlimited rangeInstantIgira expels swirling blades in the direction of a player, inflicting 66971 Shadowflame damage to players hit.

372245.name: Terror of the Skies
372245.description: Terror of the Skies100 yd rangeInstantRequires Evoker[Breath of Eons / Deep Breath] stuns enemies for 3 sec.

197277.name: Judgment
197277.description: Judgment30 yd rangeInstantRequires Paladin Protection (Protection Paladin)Judges the target, dealing (67.1596% of Spell Power) Holy damage. Holy, RetributionJudges the target, dealing (67.1596% of Spell Power) [Blades of Light: Holystrike / Holy] damage [Greater Judgment: and causing them to take 20% increased damage from your next Holy Power ability / .] [Judgment: Generates 1 Holy Power.]HolyGenerates 21 Holy Power.

217200.name: Barbed Shot
217200.description:
Fire a shot that tears through your enemy, causing them to bleed for 101 damage over 12 sec. If Barbed Shot is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Barbed Shot.

Generates 20 Focus over 8 sec.

2383.name: Find Herbs
2383.description: Find HerbsInstant1.5 sec cooldownNearby herb bushes appear on the minimap.

424891.name: Vine Spear
424891.description: Vine Spear100 yd range4 sec castThe caster hurls a spear in a line, impaling all enemies struck and inflicting 15513 Physical damage. After 3 sec, these targets are yanked towards the caster.

1285450.name: Arcane Explosion
1285450.description: Arcane ExplosionInstantInflicts 9 Arcane damage to all enemies every 2 sec.

1270085.name: Grim Ward
1270085.description: Grim WardInstantThe caster exchanges their health for an absorption shield equal to the same amount. The shield bursts when removed, inflicting 7 Shadow damage to players within 60 yards.

1216138.name: Demonic Gateway

1268873.name: Shade Cleave
1268873.description: Shade Cleave100 yd rangeInstantReduces the movement speed of the target by 30% for 8 sec.Inflicts 40 Shadow damage to an enemy.

203795.name: Soul Fragment
203795.description: Soul Fragment100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterConsume a Soul Fragment, healing you for (435.094% of Attack Power) health.

17735.name: Suffering
17735.description: Suffering30 yd rangeInstant10 sec cooldownRequires level 12The Voidwalker taunts the target to attack it for 6 sec, and increases its threat against the target.Auto-Cast:Taunts the current target if it is not attacking the Voidwalker and taunts any target who attacks its master.(Right - Click to toggle)

264178.name: Demonbolt
264178.description: Send the fiery soul of a fallen demon at the enemy, causing 1,519 Shadowflame damage.

1262083.name: Holy Impact

1246169.name: The Hunt
1246169.description: The Hunt100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterRequires level 48Charge to your target, striking them for (664.5% of Attack Power) Chaos damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting (429% of Attack Power) Chaos damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

88852.name: Beacon of Light
88852.description: Beacon of LightInstantRequires PaladinRequires level 1Casting Flash of Light or Holy Light grants 1 Holy Power.

All other targets take up to 156320 Physical damage, reduced by the closest player's total damage mitigation.Unstable Crawler Mines hit are detonated and all players hit are stunned for 2 sec. In addition, an Explosive Payload is lodged in the original target.

1219198.name: Order Up!
1219198.description: Order Up!Melee RangeInstantServe the target patron with what you are holding.

459678.name: Spew Oil
459678.description: Spew Oil300 yd rangeInstantThe Geargrinder launches oil at targeted players, forming an Oil Slick at their location and dousing players within 7 yards of the impact with oil, inflicting 4885 Nature damage every 1.5 sec for 12 sec.

138248.name: Holy Power
138248.description: Holy PowerInstantRequires PaladinRequires level 1Gained 1 Holy Power.

66235.name: Ardent Defender
66235.description:
Reduces all damage you take by 20% for 8 sec.

While Ardent Defender is active, the next attack that would otherwise kill you will instead bring you to 20% of your maximum health.

1262094.name: Summon Desperate Soul
1262094.description: Summon Desperate SoulMelee RangeInstantRequires WarlockDamage dealt by Haunt has a chance to release the demonic soul haunting its target. When released, it unleashes a devastating attack before being banished back to Nathreza. Wrath of NathrezaCalls down a meteor formed from the ruins of Nathreza that explodes upon impact, dealing (1684.51% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds.Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

449121.name: Looting
449121.description: Looting100 yd range1.5 sec castSearching for gold!

434506.name: Infernal Bolt

Affliction, DemonologyHurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing (1347.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

85948.name: Festering Strike
85948.description:
Slash the enemy for 52 Physical damage and corrupt your weapon with blight, causing your next 2-3 Scourge Strikes to summon a Lesser Ghoul.

Lesser Ghoul
A mindless servant of the Scourge, raised to obey its master's commands for 6 sec.

102693.name: Grove Guardians
102693.description: Grove Guardians40 yd rangeInstant20 sec recharge3 ChargesRequires DruidCasting Swiftmend or Wild Growth summons a Treant that casts Nourish on that target or a nearby ally periodically, healing for [(61% of Spell Power)]. Lasts 8 sec.

470057.name: Voltaic Blaze
470057.description:
Instantly shocks the target and 5 enemies within 10 yds with blazing thunder, applying Flame Shock and dealing 1,486 Nature damage. Always critically strikes.

Generates 1 stack of Maelstrom Weapon.

1260821.name: Sacrificial Aegis
1260821.description: Sacrificial Aegis2 sec castCaster exchanges their vitality for a shadow shield that absorbs damage.

1267124.name: Dark Pursuit
1267124.description: Dark Pursuit100 yd rangeInstantCaster charges to a target and strikes them, inflicting 9 Shadow damage and knocking them back.

1243887.name: Void Harvest
1243887.description: Void HarvestUnlimited range3 sec castThe Dark Singularity draws energy from several players, inflicting 25 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 4 sec. Upon expiration, a Void Manifestation forms at each player's location

1234917.name: Smashing Charge
1234917.description: Smashing Charge60 yd rangeInstantCharges forward inflicting 40 Physical damage and knocking back players.

1282723.name: Dusk Frights
1282723.description: Dusk Frights100 yd rangeInstantThe Grand Nullifier calls several frights to a void zone, fearing players within 5 yards of the impact for 5 sec.

407796.name: Shadow Strike
407796.description: Shadow Strike40 yd range4 sec castNeltharion strikes the player's body while they are incorporeal, inflicting 36746 Physical damage to the body and hurtling it towards the player. The player rejoins their body and receives its missing health as Shadow damage. Increases damage taken from Sunder Shadow by 300% for 40 sec.The player's body colliding with a segment of Twisted Earth causes it to Shatter.

1262250.name: Felstorm
1262250.description: FelstormChanneled (5 sec cast)The caster engulfs their surrounding area in fel fire, inflicting 1 Fire damage to all nearby players every 1 sec.

438826.name: Poisonous Cloud
438826.description: Poisonous Cloud100 yd range2.5 sec castThe caster expels a Poisonous Cloud, inflicting 12716 Nature damage every 1 second to players within it.

378989.name: Lycara's Teachings
378989.description: Lycara's TeachingsInstantRequires DruidYou gain 3% of a stat while in each form:No Form: HasteCat Form: Critical StrikeBear Form: VersatilityMoonkin Form: Mastery

1239424.name: Blighted Arrow
1239424.description: Blighted ArrowInstantRequires Death KnightAn unholy arrow that deals (34% of Attack Power) Shadow damage. When consuming Sudden Doom, your Death Coil commands your archer to fire an additional Blighted Arrow at 80% effectiveness. Epidemic will instead cause Blighted Arrow to ricochet and hit up to 5 additional targets.

385126.name: Blessing of Dusk
385126.description: Blessing of DuskInstantRequires PaladinDamage taken reduced by 4%[, armor increased by 4%, and Holy Power generating abilities cool down 4% faster] [Seal of Order: and your Holy Power generating abilities also grant an absorb shield for 4% of damage or healing dealt] For 10 sec.

1253765.name: Spiritbreaker
1253765.description: SpiritbreakerUnlimited rangeInstantRak'tul pummels his target twice, inflicting 177958 Physical damage with each strike. He then delivers a final empowered blow, inflicting 139824 Shadow damage and launching the target high into the air.The final blow leaves behind a patch of Spectral Decay.

405350.name: Wake of Ashes
405350.description: Wake of AshesInstantRequires PaladinRequires level 1Lash out at your enemies, dealing (321.86% of Attack Power) Radiant damage to all enemies within 14 yds in front of you, and applying Truth's Wake, burning the targets for an additional [(65.28% of Attack Power) * 2.73077] damage over 9 sec.Demon and Undead enemies are also stunned for 5 sec.Generates 3 Holy Power.

473258.name: Crowd Dispersal
473258.description: Crowd Dispersal100 Energy3 sec cast3 sec cooldownArcane Sentry attempts to disperse the crowd inflicting 18 Arcane damage and knocking back all players within 50 yds.

1260311.name: Send Vantacite
1260311.description: Send Vantacite10 yd range3.75 sec castTransfers Vantacite to the Bridge Terminal.

1270079.name: Grim Ward
1270079.description: Grim WardInstantThe caster exchanges their health for an absorption shield equal to the same amount. The shield bursts when removed, inflicting 7 Shadow damage to players within 60 yards.

1226120.name: Poison Splash
1226120.description: Poison Splash100 yd rangeChanneled (3 sec cast)Atroxus splashes poison around itself, inflicting 101690 Nature damage with an additional 30507 Nature damage every 1 sec for 5 sec to players struck. Each impact creates a poison pool for 1 min.

1234044.name: Darkened Sky
1234044.description: Darkened Sky2 sec castDimensius calls down a series of massive celestial objects that collide with the ground one after another. Each impact inflicts 226808 Shadow damage to players within 12 yards and triggers a Shadowquake.

1223624.name: Sigil of Chains
1223624.description: Sigil of ChainsUnlimited rangeInstantIlyssa places a Sigil of Chains at their current target's location that activates after (5 / 2) sec.All players are pulled to its center and snared, reducing movement speed by 60% for 6 sec.

423062.name: Hammer of Purity
423062.description: Hammer of Purity2 sec cast4 sec cooldownBraunpyke calls searing light down on a player's location, inflicting 31787 Holy damage to players within 3 yards. Hammers then spiral outwards from the impact location, inflicting 31787 Holy damage to players in their path. While empowered by Vindictive Wrath, Hammer of Purity hits 5 players.

96243.name: Invisibility
96243.description: InvisibilityInstantRequires MageRequires level 29Fades the caster to invisibility over 3 sec, reducing threat each second. The effect is cancelled if you perform or receive any actions. Lasts 20 sec.

12323.name: Piercing Howl
12323.description:
Snares all enemies within 12 yards, reducing their movement speed by 70% for 8 sec.

Spurs all allies within 12 yards, increasing their movement speed by 30% for 4 sec.

1228218.name: Arcane Obliteration
1228218.description: Arcane ObliterationUnlimited rangeInstantAraz unleashes a burst of energy onto his current target, inflicting 226830 Arcane damage to all players. The damage is reduced by the number of players within 10 yards of the impact location. Players within 10 yards of the impact location also have 182412 healing absorbed and suffer Astral Mark.Additionally an Arcane Echo is summoned at the location.

1223007.name: Burrowing Eruption
1223007.description: Burrowing Eruption50 yd range4 sec castThe caster burrows and then bursts from the ground, inflicting 37087 Nature damage to players within 7 yards of the impact and knocking them back.

1219283.name: Experimental Plating
1219283.description: Experimental PlatingInstantThe crawler mine is covered in experimental plating, granting immunity to all damage.Upon reaching 100 energy, the mine becomes immune to crowd control effects and gains 200% movement speed.

1250581.name: Ultimate Serenity
1250581.description: Ultimate Serenity100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestIncreases the healing done by Holy Word: Serenity by 10% and causes it to heal 4 nearby injured allies within 40 yards for 15% of its healing done.Talents that affect Holy Word: Sanctify instead affect Holy Word: Serenity.

191034.name: Starfall
191034.description: Calls down waves of falling stars upon enemies within 40 yds, dealing 852 Astral damage over 8 sec. Multiple uses of this ability may overlap.

467381.name: Goblin-guided Rocket
467381.description: Goblin-guided Rocket300 yd rangeInstantZee commands a Volunteer Rocketeer to assist him. This volunteer 'guides' an explosive payload to a player's location, inflicting 351719 Fire damage split evenly among all players within 12 yards of the impact and creating a Hot Mess. The impact also detonates any hit Unstable Crawler Mines.If the rocket fails to hit at least 5 players, it inflicts 97700 Fire damage to all players.

1225154.name: Immolation Aura
1225154.description: Immolation AuraInstantIlyssa engulfs themselves in flame, inflicting 6464 Chaos damage to all players every 2 sec.

1257595.name: Divine Guile
1257595.description: Divine Guile7.5 sec castUpon reaching 100 energy, Lothraxion disguises himself amongst his Fractured Images as they all channel light energy into the core, inflicting 35592 Holy damage every 2 sec until Lothraxion is interrupted.

1232888.name: Phenomenal Cosmic Power
1232888.description: Phenomenal Cosmic PowerInstantDimensius is immune to all attacks and spells.

1224793.name: Whispers of Fate
1224793.description: Whispers of Fate3 sec castSoul-Scribe shatters the fate of every player, summoning echoes of their Fate and causing them to suffer 10596 Arcane damage.

1227355.name: Voidstep
1227355.description: VoidstepUnlimited range2.5 sec castAdarus tears open a path through the void and teleports to a new location, inflicting 60482 Cosmic damage to players within 4 yards along the path to his destination.During this movement, Adarus manifests images of himself which cast Hungering Slash.

1249202.name: Chosen's Revelry
1249202.description: Chosen's RevelryInstantRequires RogueFlipping a Fatebound Coin restores (30% of Attack Power) health.

408677.name: Iron Guard
408677.description: Iron Guard1 sec castRaising their shield the dracthyr protects their allies within 10 yards, reducing their damage received by 90%.

1245654.name: Burning Blades
1245654.description: Burning Blades100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterThrow Glaive causes targets to take an additional 80% of damage dealt as Chaos over 6 sec.

192077.name: Wind Rush Totem
192077.description: Summons a totem at the target location for 15 sec, continually granting all allies who pass within 10 yards 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec.

124273.name: Heavy Stagger
124273.description: Heavy StaggerInstantRequires MonkYou shrug off attacks, delaying a portion of Physical damage based on your Agility, instead taking it over 10 sec. Affects magical attacks at 58% effectiveness. [Training of Niuzao: Gain up to 15% Mastery based on your current level of Stagger.]

1252449.name: King's Thrall
1252449.description: King's ThrallUnlimited rangeInstantA player succumbs to their oath, becoming mind-controlled for 12 sec. The void invigorates the player, healing them to full health.Upon expiration, the player explodes inflicting 27217 Shadow damage to all players.

1230916.name: Killing Streak
1230916.description: Killing StreakInstantRequires Death KnightObliterate and Frostscythe consume all Killing Machines to deal 25% increased critical strike damage and grant 1.5% Haste for 8 sec for each stack consumed.Multiple applications may overlap.

1233846.name: Void Blast
1233846.description: Void Blast100 yd range2.5 sec castInflicts 18 Shadow damage to the target.

1214663.name: Axe Toss
1214663.description: Axe TossUnlimited rangeInstantXathuux the Annihilator throws his massive axe at the location of a random player inflicting 91521 Chaos damage and interrupting players within 10 yds of the impact. The axe remains on the ground emitting Fel Light until it is destroyed.

1285838.name: Blooming Bile
1285838.description: Blooming Bile40 yd range3 sec cast5 sec cooldownLightbloom can upset the stomach. Regurgitates blessed bile upon enemies within 20 yards, inflicting Holy damage every second. Gross.

422776.name: Marked for Torment
422776.description: Marked for Torment100 Energy300 yd range1.6 sec castIgira inflicts 78133 Shadowflame damage, knocking back players within 45 yards and igniting three areas for torment. Heads increases the damage of your attacks by 4%, lasting 15 sec or until you flip Tails.For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Heads increases damage by an additional 2%.

1246687.name: Lightning Bolt

Devastation, AugmentationLiving Flame is enhanced with Bronze magic, repeating 25% of the damage or healing you dealt to the target in the last 5 sec as Arcane, up to [(Spell Power * 2.5) * (1 + Versatility)].

413060.name: Fire Eruption

1279656.name: Bloody Reflection
1279656.description: Bloody Reflection100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightRequires level 1While Blood Shield is active, taking direct damage reflects (110% of Attack Power) Shadow damage back to the attacker. Blood Shield can now absorb up to 65% of your maximum health.

114050.name: Ascendance

While ascended, Elemental Overload damage is increased by 75% and spells affected by your Mastery: Elemental Overload cause 1 additional Elemental Overload.

Increase all damage dealing allies' primary stat by 8.0% of your own and increase your own damage by 20% for 10 sec.

Ebon Might will split its effect when applied to more than 2 other allies.

Eruption, Deep Breath, and your empower spells extend the duration of these effects.

1260191.name: Shredding Claws
1260191.description: Shredding Claws40 yd range2 sec castCauses an enemy to take 5% increased Physical damage for 6 sec.Inflicts 5 Physical damage to an enemy.

434404.name: Felseeker

407965.name: Elemental Instability

Non-Player targets struck by a Wailing Arrow have their spellcasting interrupted and are silenced for 1 sec.Grants Deathblow.

121471.description: Draws upon surrounding shadows to empower your weapons, causing your attacks to deal 20% additional damage as Shadow and causing your combo point generating abilities to generate double combo points for 16 sec.

1263785.name: Holy Echo

196742.description: Whirling Dragon PunchInstantRequires MonkPerforms a devastating whirling upward strike, dealing [3 * (241.5% of Attack Power)] damage to all nearby enemies and an additional (450% of Attack Power) damage to the first target struck. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.Only usable while both Fists of Fury and Rising Sun Kick are on cooldown.

1256510.name: Spiny Leap
1256510.description: Spiny LeapInstantThe caster leaps to a location, inflicting 0 Nature damage to all creatures within 4 yards.

Applies 8 stacks of Freezing over its duration.

Empowering causes more of the damage to be dealt immediately instead of over time.

I:   Deals 628 damage instantly and 1,681 over 20 sec.

II:  Deals 1,120 damage instantly and 1,176 over 14 sec.

III: Deals 1,629 damage instantly and 672 over 8 sec.

20153.name: Immolation

1246154.name: Wildroot Weave

1236494.name: Chomp

382551.name: Pain and Gain

1267894.name: Savage Leap

235314.name: Blazing Barrier
235314.description: Blazing Barrier100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageRequires level 1Shields you in flame, absorbing [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage [Molten Skin: and reducing Physical damage taken by 0%] for 1 min.Melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take (14.375% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

465127.name: Wind Up
465127.description: Wind UpChanneled (6 sec cast)Winds up and fixates a player, inflicting 1589 Physical damage every 0.3 sec to players within 3.5 yards for 6 sec.

1249186.name: Charge
1249186.description: Charge100 yd rangeInstantZul'jarra charges toward Nalorakk.

1239746.name: Glacial Barrage
1239746.description: Glacial Barrage100 yd rangeInstantA barrage of frost spikes erupt from the Avatar's ground pound, inflicting 30 Frost damage to players standing within 4 yards of each impact location.

1272108.name: Cunning Disguise
1272108.description: Cunning DisguiseInstantAdopt a Cunning Disguise to fool lesser Twilight's Blade members into thinking you belong here for 30 sec.Only works from the front.

1247057.name: Shocking Tendrils

462240.name: Dispatch (Coup de Grace)

1234054.name: Shadowquake
1234054.description: Shadowquake1000 yd rangeInstantA tremendous shockwave of dark energy radiates outward from the impact, inflicting 48386 Shadow damage to players on contact and increasing damage taken from Shadowquake by 400% for 3 sec. This effect stacks.

1246038.name: Festering Rend
1246038.description: Festering Rend7 yd range1.5 sec cast1 Nature damage inflicted every 2 sec. and Armor reduced by 33% for 10 sec.

343294.name: Soul Reaper

Rupture the soul of your enemy, dealing 78 Shadowfrost damage and causing the foe to take 20% increased damage from your diseases and minions for 8 sec. Consumes all available charges to cast Putrefy.

Only usable on enemies below 35% maximum health.

432569.name: Chaos Salvo

1214355.name: Fire Bomb
1214355.description: Fire BombUnlimited rangeInstantZaen hurls a ticking bomb at a player. After 6 sec the bomb explodes, dealing 91521 Fire damage to players within 6 yards and destroying any Forbidden Freight caught in the blast.

1282053.name: Arcane Residue
1282053.description: Arcane Residue60 yd rangeInstant10 Arcane damage inflicted every 1 sec.

1243460.name: Arcane Pulse
1243460.description: Arcane Pulse3.5% of base mana40 yd rangeInstantRequires MageRequires level 6A pulse of Arcane magic erupts from underneath your target, dealing 1 Arcane damage to all enemies within 0 yds. 1261166.description: Agony100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarlockInflicts increasing agony on the target, causing up to [(7.05528% of Spell Power) * 18 / 2 * 8] Shadow damage over 18 sec. 1239526.name: Voidstep

111400.name: Burning Rush
111400.description: Increases your movement speed by 50%, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 sec. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts until canceled.

393108.name: Guardian of Ancient Kings
393108.description: Guardian of Ancient Kings30 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinEmpowers you with the spirit of ancient kings, reducing all damage you take by 50% for 4 sec.

115804.name: Mortal Wounds

453326.name: Arcane Surge

Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.For the next 15 sec, your Mana regeneration is increased by 425% and spell damage is increased by 35%.

196910.name: Raise Skulker
196910.description: Raise Skulker30 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightRequires level 1

468149.name: Exhaust Fumes
468149.description: Exhaust FumesInstantThe Geargrinder releases smog that suffocates all players for 6 sec, inflicting 2931 Shadow damage every 1 sec. This increases in intensity by 25% with every cast.

1277556.name: Necrotic Convergence
1277556.description: Necrotic ConvergenceInstantVordaza protects herself with Deathshroud and unleashes waves of necrotic energy which inflict 22880 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec for up to 1 min. This effect grows in intensity over time.

375234.name: Time Spiral

1257745.name: Searing Rend

1223847.name: Triplicate
1223847.description: Triplicate2.5 sec castAt the start of the encounter and upon reaching 50% remaining health Gemullus self replicates, creating 2 clones of itself.

546.name: Water Walking
546.description: Allows the friendly target to walk across water for 10 min. Damage will cancel the effect.

1243113.name: Horrific Vision
1243113.description: Horrific VisionInstantRequires PriestYou create Horrific Visions when casting harmful spells on enemies.At 50 stacks of Horrific Visions, your target sees a nightmare, dealing (140% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and granting you 4.07 Insanity over 3 sec.At 100 stacks, your target witnesses a vision of N'Zoth, dealing (530% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and granting you 12.2 Insanity over 3 sec.

1242875.name: Screams of a Forgotten Sky: An'xoth
1242875.description: Screams of a Forgotten Sky: An'xothItem Effect100 yd rangeInstantYour harmful spells and abilities have a chance to strike your target with an abyssal comet, dealing (22601 * 1) Cosmic damage and amplifying their gravity to increase the damage of future comets by 5%.Upon death, enemies implode to deal 18049 Cosmic damage per gravity stack split between nearby enemies. 1239221.name: Diamantine Voidcore
1239221.description: Diamantine VoidcoreItem EffectInstantYour spells have a chance to empower the Voidcore, granting you 87 Intellect for 15 sec. This chance is increased by 25% while below 25% mana. Multiple applications may overlap.

1219354.name: Potent Mana Residue
1219354.description: Potent Mana Residue300 yd rangeInstantResidual energy slows players in the area by 50% and inflicts 26492 Arcane damage every 2 sec.

1257268.name: Forfeit Essence
1257268.description: Forfeit Essence12 yd range4 sec castFunnels health into an ally.

459627.name: Tank Buster
459627.description: Tank Buster100 yd range1.5 sec castThe Geargrinder slams into its current target, inflicting 73275 Physical damage, knocking them back and causing them to bleed for 3908 Physical damage every 1.5 sec for 25 sec. In addition, the target suffers 200% increased damage taken by Tank Buster for 25 sec. This effect stacks.The exertion causes the Geargrinder to expel a cloud of Exhaust Fumes and leak an Oil Slick that lasts for 5 min.

1221133.name: Hungering Rage
1221133.description: Hungering RageInstantThe caster enters a rage, increasing their attack speed by 50%.

1221190.name: Gluttonous Miasma
1221190.description: Gluttonous Miasma60 yd range3 sec cast6 sec cooldownHungering energies surround the target, inflicting 8159 Shadow damage to players within 5 yards of the target every 1.5 sec for 6 sec. The caster heals for 100% of the damage inflicted.

401862.name: Blazing Heat
401862.description: Blazing Heat50 yd rangeInstantThe Eternal Blaze pulses every 5 sec, applying Blazing Heat to players within 50 yards. This searing heat inflicts 367 Fire damage every 1 sec. This effect stacks.

420422.name: Wildfire
420422.description: Wildfire1.5 sec castFyrakk bites Fyr'alath into the bark of Amirdrassil, inflicting 72552 Shadowflame damage to all players.Raging Flames spread to nearby locations and inflict 223237 Shadowflame damage to players within 9 yards of the impact locations.

1266471.name: Reflection
1266471.description: ReflectionInstantDeals Shadow damage to targets within 4 yards.

1227846.name: The Hunt
1227846.description: The HuntUnlimited rangeInstantVelaryn marks a player as her prey, charging towards them and inflicting 340212 Chaos damage. This effect is reduced for each player standing within the path of The Hunt.Velaryn additionally strikes players along the path, inflicting 51032 Chaos damage to players within 3 yards of each player struck.

17627.name: Distilled Wisdom
17627.description: Distilled WisdomLevel 80Item EffectInstantIncreases Intellect by 25 for 1 hour. Counts as both a Battle and Guardian elixir. This effect persists through death.

446649.name: Castigator's Shield

132158.description: Your next Regrowth, Rebirth, or Entangling Roots is instant, free, castable in all forms, and heals for an additional 60%.

203794.name: Consume Soul
203794.description: Consume Soul100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterShear shatters the target's soul, leaving a Lesser Soul Fragment behind for 25 sec.Consuming a Lesser Soul Fragment heals you for 6% of all damage taken in the last 5 sec, minimum 1% of maximum health.

Infernal BoltHurl a bolt enveloped in the infernal flames of the abyss, dealing (1347.35% of Spell Power) Fire damage to your enemy target and generating 3 Soul Shards.

474075.name: Heaving Chop
474075.description: Heaving ChopUnlimited rangeInstantLatch strikes the hooked player, inflicting 101690 Physical damage and stunning them for 4 sec.

1216967.name: Shadow Fling

220543.name: Silence

Healing starts high and declines over the duration.May only occur once every 6 min.

1255357.description: Tangle of Vibrant Vines100 yd rangeInstant

473137.name: Soweezi's Vintage Waveshredder
473137.description: Soweezi's Vintage Waveshredder1.5 sec castSummons and dismisses Soweezi's Vintage Waveshredder. This mount changes depending on your Riding skill and location."This pretty lil' thing has a beautiful platinum sheen. It'll take ya sky-high in seconds! You'll be dancing around the sun to your heart's content for the low, low price of ten thousand smackeroonies."Zone: Siren IsleVendor: Soweezi
