441602.name: Ravage
441602.description: RavageInstantRequires Druid FeralYour auto-attacks have a chance to make your next Ferocious Bite become Ravage.RavageFinishing move that slashes through your target in a wide arc, dealing Physical damage per combo point to your target and consuming up to 25 additional Energy to increase that damage by up to 100%. Hits all other enemies in front of you for reduced damage per combo point spent. 1 point: [(185.6% of Attack Power) / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) / 5] in an arc2 points: [(185.6% of Attack Power) * 2 / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) * 2 / 5] in an arc3 points: [(185.6% of Attack Power) * 3 / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) * 3 / 5] in an arc4 points: [(185.6% of Attack Power) * 4 / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) * 4 / 5] in an arc5 points: [(185.6% of Attack Power) * 5 / 5] damage, [(84.46% of Attack Power) * 5 / 5] in an arc GuardianYour auto-attacks have a chance to make your next Maul become Ravage.RavageSlash through your target in a wide arc, dealing (550% of Attack Power) Physical damage to your target and (210% of Attack Power) to all other enemies in front of you.

89808.name: Singe Magic
89808.description: Singe Magic30 yd rangeInstant15 sec cooldownRequires level 27Burns harmful spells, removing 1 harmful Magic effect from an ally.Auto-Cast:Cast upon master when he is unable to cast spells due to a Magic effect.(Right - Click to toggle)

285452.name: Lava Burst
285452.description: Lava Burst100 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanHurls molten lava at the target, dealing (138.996% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Lava Burst will always critically strike if the target is affected by Flame Shock and its damage is increased by your critical strike chance.ElementalGenerates 8 Maelstrom.

375229.name: Time Spiral
375229.description: Time Spiral100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterBend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

1225616.name: Soulfire Convergence
1225616.description: Soulfire Convergence2 sec castThe Soulbinder Naazindhri courses arcane energy through the bodies of several players, inflicting 11340 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 5 sec. Upon expiration, Soulrend Orbs explode from the target's body.

421643.name: Emberscar's Mark
421643.description: Emberscar's Mark300 yd rangeInstantEmberscar brands the player, increasing damage taken from Brand of Damnation by 500%.Being struck by Devour Essence removes the effect.

424741.name: Infectious Spores
424741.description: Infectious SporesInstantThe caster hurls a rotting mushroom. Players struck are infected with spores for 3 min, causing them to randomly cough and become stunned for 1 sec.

1219313.name: Overloaded Bolts
1219313.description: Overloaded BoltsUnlimited rangeInstantThe Giga Coils furiously eject free ions causing strikes throughout inflicting 31753 Nature damage to players within 4 yards of each impact.

1269224.name: Blaze of Glory
1269224.description: Blaze of Glory30 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinJudgment has a chance to grant you Vanguard, causing your next Avenger's Shield to leave an echoing bolt of light in a line between you and the initial target, piercing any enemies for (300% of Attack Power) Holy damage.

386478.name: Violent Outburst
386478.description: Violent OutburstInstantRequires WarriorEvery 250 rage you spend triggers a Violent Outburst, causing your next Shield Slam to deal 200% increased damage, generate 50% more Rage and grant Ignore Pain.

1260797.name: Blooming Flourish
1260797.description: Blooming Flourish7 yd range2 sec castFlourishes their weapon, inflicting Holy damage to the enemy target and healing the caster for 5% of their maximum health.

1247054.name: Lightning Surge
1247054.description: Lightning Surge30 yd range3 sec castInflicts 25 Nature damage to enemies within 8 yards.

1215904.name: Volatile Mana
1215904.description: Volatile ManaUnlimited rangeInstantThe volatile energy explodes upon contact with a player, inflicting 50 Arcane damage and an additional 7 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 8 sec. The impact also knocks players upwards.

433843.name: Erupting Webs
433843.description: Erupting Webs300 yd rangeInstantThe caster causes several spiderweb eruptions to occur, inflicting 31789 Nature damage and stunning players struck for 3 sec.

384360.name: Temporal Velocity
384360.description: Temporal VelocityInstantRequires MageIncreases your movement speed by 5% for 3 sec after casting Blink.

389422.name: Yu'lon's Blessing
389422.description: Yu'lon's BlessingInstantRequires MonkMana cost of Enveloping Mist reduced by 50%.

473126.name: Mudslide
473126.description: MudslideUnlimited rangeInstantSwampface upheaves massive amounts of mud in front of him, inflicting 47684 Nature damage to any player hit.

1263735.name: Necrotic Convergence
1263735.description: Necrotic ConvergenceInstantVordaza protects herself with Deathshroud and unleashes waves of necrotic energy which inflict 22880 Shadow damage to all players every 2 sec for up to 1 min. This effect grows in intensity over time.

1216834.name: Acidic Demise
1216834.description: Acidic DemiseUnlimited rangeInstantAcid leaks from the caster's corpse, inflicting 10 Nature damage to players within it every 1 sec.

1244985.name: Arcane Volley
1244985.description: Arcane Volley40 yd rangeInstantHurls Arcane bolts at 2 players inflicting 4 Arcane damage.

428524.name: Demonic Art: Overlord
428524.description: Demonic Art: OverlordInstantRequires WarlockYour next Soul Shard spent summons an Overlord that unleashes a devastating attack.Modifies Damage/Healing Done 0%: Chaos Bolt, ShadowburnModifies Cast Time 0%: Chaos Bolt, Hand of Gul'dan

207317.name: Epidemic
207317.description:
Causes each of your Virulent Plagues to flare up, dealing 20 Shadow damage to the infected enemy and 7 Shadow damage to foes nearby.

Extends the duration of Dread Plague and Virulent Plague by 1.5 sec.

127797.name: Ursol's Vortex
127797.description: Ursol's VortexUnlimited rangeInstantRequires DruidRequires level 1Conjures a vortex of wind for 10 sec at the destination, reducing the movement speed of all enemies within 8 yards by 50%. The first time an enemy attempts to leave the vortex, winds will pull that enemy back to its center. Usable in all shapeshift forms.

473898.name: Legion Strike
473898.description: Legion Strike30 yd range3 sec castXathuux the Annihilator performs a powerful swing with his axe that inflicts 279648 Physical damage and reduces healing received by 80% for 8 sec.

185562.name: Darkmoon Firewater
185562.description: Darkmoon FirewaterItem EffectInstantIncreases your Deftness by 15% and your size for 1 hour. Deftness allows you to gather resources more quickly.

443112.name: Strength of the Black Ox
443112.description: Strength of the Black OxInstantRequires Monk[ Mistweaver: After Xuen assists you, your next Enveloping Mist's cast time is reduced by 50% and causes Niuzao to grant an absorb shield to 5 nearby allies for 0] [ Windwalker: After Xuen assists you, your next Blackout Kick refunds 2 stacks of Teachings of the Monastery and causes Niuzao to stomp at your target's location, dealing (200% of Attack Power) damage to nearby enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets]

132168.name: Shockwave
132168.description: ShockwaveUnlimited rangeInstantRequires WarriorSends a wave of force in a frontal cone, causing (20% of Attack Power) damage and stunning all enemies within 10 yards for 2 sec.

117952.name: Crackling Jade Lightning
117952.description: Channel Jade lightning, causing 9 Nature damage over 3.6 sec to the target and sometimes knocking back melee attackers.

187650.name: Freezing Trap
187650.description: Hurls a frost trap to the target location that incapacitates the first enemy that approaches for 1 min. Damage may break the effect. Limit 1. Trap will exist for 1 min.

1243114.name: Vision of N'Zoth
1243114.description: Vision of N'ZothInstantRequires PriestYou create Horrific Visions when casting harmful spells on enemies.At 50 stacks of Horrific Visions, your target sees a nightmare, dealing (140% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and granting you 4.07 Insanity over 3 sec.At 100 stacks, your target witnesses a vision of N'Zoth, dealing (530% of Spell Power) Shadow damage and granting you 12.2 Insanity over 3 sec.

54710.name: MOLL-E
54710.description: MOLL-EItem EffectInstantCreates a portable mailbox for 10 min.

127802.name: Touch of the Grave
127802.description: Touch of the Grave100 yd rangeInstantYour attacks and damaging spells have a chance to drain the target, dealing [Max(Attack Power * 1.25, Spell Power) * 0.25 * Percent Damage * (1 + Versatility)] Shadow damage and healing you for the same amount. Additionally, you can breathe underwater indefinitely.

1265172.name: Solar Charge
1265172.description: Solar Charge100 yd range3 sec castCharges at a random enemy's location, knocking back and inflicting 25 Physical damage to any enemy in the way and leaves behind Overbloom in its wake.

391356.name: Tear
391356.description: Tear100 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidRequires Cat FormApplying Rip to a target also applies a Tear that deals 15% of the new Rip's damage over 8 sec.

391378.name: Blade Dance
391378.description: Blade Dance100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon HunterStrike nearby enemies for [3 * (23.35% of Attack Power)% + (70% of Attack Power)%] Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

91807.name: Shambling Rush
91807.description: Shambling Rush5 - 30 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightRequires level 14Requires GhoulCharge an enemy, interrupting spellcasting and immobilizing them for 2 sec.

184364.name: Enraged Regeneration
184364.description: Reduces damage taken by 30% and Bloodthirst restores an additional 20% health for 8 sec. Usable while stunned or incapacitated.

474480.name: Unstable Mech
474480.description: Unstable MechInstantBegins to Short Circuit at 70% health.

1237098.name: Astrophysical Jet
1237098.description: Astrophysical JetUnlimited rangeInstantDimensius tears through space with an immense stream of radiation that inflicts 75603 Cosmic damage every 1 sec to players who stray too close.Players who attempt to cross the center of the stream are vaporized instantly.

85416.name: Grand Crusader
85416.description: Grand CrusaderInstantRequires PaladinRequires level 1When you avoid a melee attack or use [Hammer of the Righteous] [Blessed Hammer / Crusader Strike], you have a 15% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Avenger's Shield [Inspiring Vanguard: and increase your Strength by 2% for 8 sec / .]

372152.name: Dream of Cenarius
372152.description: Dream of CenariusInstantRequires DruidYour next Regrowth heals for an additional 130% and is free, instant, and castable in all forms.

182104.name: Shining Light

1224840.name: Behead

1267754.name: Savage Leap

Bestial Wrath provokes your pets to tear into your target, causing your target to bleed for 42 damage over 12 sec.

Damage from Bloodshed has a 10% chance to summon Dire Beasts.

461885.name: Sacrosanct Crusade
461885.description: Sacrosanct CrusadeInstantRequires Paladin ProtectionDivine Toll surrounds you with a Holy barrier for 15% of your maximum health.Hammer of Light heals you for 15% of your maximum health, increased by 2% for each additional target hit. Any overhealing done with this effect gets converted into a Holy barrier instead. RetributionWake of Ashes surrounds you with a Holy barrier for 10% of your maximum health.Hammer of Light heals you for 5% of your maximum health, increased by 1% for each additional target hit. Any overhealing done with this effect gets converted into a Holy barrier instead.

1214595.name: Void Ray

The Spirit of Redemption cannot move, attack, be attacked or targeted by any spells or effects. While in this form the Priest can cast any healing spell free of cost. When the effect ends, the Priest dies.

428439.name: Healing Elixir
428439.description: Healing ElixirInstant30 sec recharge2 ChargesRequires MonkRequires level 1Drink a healing elixir, healing you for 15% of your maximum health.

458128.name: Festering Scythe

153596.name: Comet Storm
153596.description: Comet Storm100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageCalls down a series of 7 icy comets on and around the target, that deals up to [7 * (86% of Spell Power)] Frost damage to all enemies within 6 yds of its impacts.

2006.description: Brings a dead ally back to life with 35% health and mana. Cannot be cast when in combat.

445507.name: Obliterate
445507.description: ObliterateMelee RangeInstant6 sec cooldownRequires Death KnightA brutal attack that deals (200% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

207640.name: Abundance

3716.name: Consuming Shadows

1269645.name: Echo of Frenzied Regeneration
1269645.description: Echo of Frenzied RegenerationInstantRequires DruidRequires Bear FormHeals you for 80% health over 10 sec.

30213.name: Legion Strike
30213.description: Legion Strike60 EnergyMelee RangeInstantRequires WarlockRequires level 1Requires WeaponsA strong attack that deals [0.816 * (Spell Power * 0.5) * 1 * (1 + Versatility)] damage to all enemies in front of it, and reduces the effectiveness of any healing the victim receives by 20% for 12 sec.(Right - Click to toggle)

1242189.name: Void Volley
1242189.description: Void Volley100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestReleases a volley of pure void energy, firing 10 bolts at your target and 1 bolt at all enemies within 10 yards of your target for (106.049% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.Generates 10 Insanity.

124255.name: Stagger
124255.description: StaggerInstantRequires MonkYou shrug off attacks, delaying a portion of Physical damage based on your Agility, instead taking it over 10 sec. Affects magical attacks at 58% effectiveness. [Training of Niuzao: Gain up to 15% Mastery based on your current level of Stagger.]

1256005.name: Darkstride

1234802.name: Fertile Loam

1269879.name: Mind's Eyes

1241167.name: Virulent Plague (Erupt)

1226915.name: Sticky Silk
1226915.description: Sticky SilkUnlimited rangeInstantSticky silk inflicts 18 Nature damage every 1 sec to players within it and slows their movement speed by 30%.

446794.name: Insatiable

427484.name: Flamestrike

1249425.name: Mass Destruction

1265804.name: Shattering Star
1265804.description: Shattering Star25 yd rangeInstantRequires EvokerExhale a bolt of concentrated power from your mouth at the target for (173.645% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage.

1264680.name: Sylvan Beckoning
1264680.description: Sylvan BeckoningInstantRequires Druid[ Balance: Entering an Eclipse summons a Dryad to assist you for 8 sec, casting Starsurge dealing (150% of Spell Power) astral damage and Starfall at 200% effectiveness / RestorationYour periodic heals have a chance to empower your next Swiftmend to summon a Dryad to assist you, casting Tranquility at 10% effectiveness and Regrowth to heal (658.507% of Spell Power) damage onto your lowest health ally]

The burst of light also heals Braunpyke for 10% of his maximum health. While empowered by Vindictive Wrath, the cast time of Burning Light is reduced.

1269866.name: Void Tentacles
1269866.description: Void TentaclesInstantAttacks inflict 1 Shadow damage to the enemy.

467815.name: Intercepting Charge

414663.name: Prismatic Barrier
414663.description: Prismatic Barrier3% of base manaInstantRequires MageRequires level 11Shields you with an arcane force, absorbing [20 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage and reducing magic damage taken by 15% for 1 min.The duration of harmful Magic effects against you is reduced by 25%.

449318.name: Shadows of Strife
449318.description: Shadows of Strife30 yd range3 sec cast5 sec cooldownInfect a player's mind with strife, inflicting 1035 Shadow damage every 2 sec for 8 sec.Upon expiration or removal, strife explodes outward from the target inflicting 10859 Shadow damage to players hit and knocking them back.

1223212.name: Pulsing Darkness
1223212.description: Pulsing DarknessInstantThe caster pulses shadowy energy, inflicting 7560 Shadow damage to players within 60 yards every 1 sec for 6 sec.

411913.name: Shadowflame Exhaust
411913.description: Shadowflame ExhaustUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster emanates the consumed energy, inflicting 7349 Shadowflame damage to all players every 4 sec.

462821.name: General's Bulwark
462821.description: General's BulwarkInstantThe General's Bulwark safeguards you. When an attack would cause you to die, absorb the attack and become immune to all damage for 10 sec.

432629.name: Undisputed Ruling
432629.description: Undisputed RulingInstantRequires PaladinHammer of Light [ Protection: grants Shield of the Righteous, erupts a Consecration beneath its target / Retributionapplies Judgment to its targets] and increases your Haste by 12% for 6 sec.

1276467.name: Grimoire: Fel Ravager
1276467.description:
Summons a Fel Ravager to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will interrupt their target when summoned.

Turns into Spell Lock while on cooldown.

1262709.name: Lightbloom Salvo
1262709.description: Lightbloom SalvoUnlimited rangeInstantSpews a number of projectiles around the area randomly, each inflicting 3 Nature damage.

382411.name: Eternity Surge
382411.description: Eternity Surge25 yd rangeChanneled (3.25 sec cast)30 sec cooldownRequires EvokerFocus your energies to release a salvo of pure magic, dealing [(1088.47% of Spell Power)] Spellfrost damage to an enemy. Damages additional enemies within 25 yds when empowered.I: Damages [Eternity's Span: 2 enemies enemy].II: Damages [Eternity's Span: 4 enemies / 2 enemies].III: Damages [Eternity's Span: 6 enemies / 3 enemies].IV: Damages [Eternity's Span: 8 enemies / 4 enemies].

1244227.name: Chair Smack
1244227.description: Chair Smack5 yd range1.5 sec cast

474478.name: Killing Spree
474478.description: Killing SpreeChanneled (3 sec cast)Zaen unleashes a rapid barrage of gunfire, inflicting 20338 Physical damage to all players every 0.5 sec over 3 sec.

196728.name: Ox Charge
196728.description: Ox Charge40 yd rangeInstant5 sec cooldownRequires MonkRequires level 1Charge to the enemy.

468844.name: Leaping Spark
468844.description: Leaping SparkUnlimited rangeInstantGeezle consumes 40 Electricity to galvanize several Leaping Sparks that fixate players.Upon contact, the spark inflicts 42386 Nature damage and stuns for 8 sec.

473220.name: Sonic Boom
473220.description: Sonic Boom100 yd range3 sec castBig M.O.M.M.A. blasts a pulse of sonic energy towards a player which inflicts 10596 Sonic damage every 0.5 sec while dragging and silencing players within.The pulse explodes upon colliding with an obstacle, inflicting 26491 Sonic damage to players within 7 yards.

426595.name: Shadow Techniques

265189.name: Raptor Strike
265189.description: Raptor Strike30 Focus40 yd rangeInstantRequires HunterRequires level 1A vicious slash dealing (357.5% of Attack Power) Physical damage.

1226950.name: Arcane Infusion
1226950.description: Arcane Infusion60 yd range3 sec castThe caster infuses players within 60 yards with arcane energy, inflicting 26461 Arcane damage and an additional 6426 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 10 sec.Additionally, Budding Silkworms within 60 yards receive Arcane Bites.

1221532.name: Erratic Ritual
1221532.description: Erratic Ritual30 yd range2.5 sec cast11 sec cooldownThe caster performs a ritual, inflicting 2119 Arcane damage every 0.5 sec to all players for 6 sec.

1282507.name: Shadow Nova
1282507.description: Shadow Nova40 yd range2 sec castRequires WarlockDark magic is unleashed at the target's location, inflicting (231% of Spell Power) Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yards.Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1284958.name: Cosmic Sting
1284958.description: Cosmic Sting100 yd rangeInstantGemellus stings a player with Cosmic Void, inflicting 61014 Shadow damage and creating a pool of Void Secretions at their location. Inflicts an additional 25423 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec.

319175.name: Black Powder
319175.description:
Finishing move that launches explosive Black Powder at all nearby enemies dealing Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

   1 point  : 7 damage
   2 points: 14 damage
   3 points: 22 damage
   4 points: 30 damage
   5 points: 36 damage

469708.name: Uncontrolled Destruction
469708.description: Uncontrolled Destruction300 yd rangeInstantZee takes charge by calling in bombs, rockets, and drones, inflicting 2470 Fire damage to all players every 0.5 sec for 6 sec. Players are then afflicted with Uncontrolled Burn.

1241100.name: Mystic Lash
1241100.description: Mystic Lash2 sec castThe Soulbinder Naazindhri lashes out at her current target, inflicting 35533 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 5 sec. [The blow brands the victim, increasing the damage of Mystic Lash by 40% and Physical damage by 15% for 45 sec.This effect stacks. ][The blow brands the victim, increasing the damage of Mystic Lash by 12%.This effect stacks.]

475.name: Remove Curse

6673.name: Battle Shout
6673.description: Increases the attack power of all raid and party members within 100 yards by 5% for 1 hour.

1253739.name: Shred Flesh
1253739.description: Shred Flesh60 yd rangeInstantThe creature shreds the flesh of its target, causing them to bleed for 6 Physical damage every 1 sec and absorb 20 healing for 20 sec.

1277799.name: Brutal Chop
1277799.description: Brutal ChopUnlimited range3.5 sec castThe caster inflicts 70 Physical damage to its current target.

1254180.name: Xathuux's Last Roar
1254180.description: Xathuux's Last RoarInstantYour damaging abilities have a chance to echo with Xathuux's furious roar, increasing Critical Strike by 0 for 30 sec.

1213409.name: Felfire Orb
1213409.description: Felfire Orb100 yd rangeInstantInflicts 40 Fire damage to an enemy.

181089.name: Encounter Event
181089.description: Encounter EventInstantAn encounter event has occurred.

1248712.name: Skyfire Heel
1248712.description: Skyfire Heel100 yd rangeInstantRequires DruidRising Sun Kick's critical strike chance is increased by 4% for each nearby enemy, up to 5 enemies.10% of Rising Sun Kick's damage splashes onto nearby enemies. Damage is reduced beyond 5 targets.

395296.name: Ebon Might
395296.description: Ebon MightInstantRequires EvokerIncrease all damage dealing allies' primary stat by (8 + 0)% of your own and increase your own damage by 20% for 10 sec.Ebon Might will split its effect when applied to more than 2 other allies.Eruption, [Breath of Eons / Deep Breath], and your empower spells extend the duration of these effects.

357214.name: Wing Buffet
357214.description: With a powerful flap of your wings, knock away enemies in front of you.

1231224.name: Arcane Slash
1231224.description: Arcane Slash100 yd rangeInstantUnleashes Arcane energy in the direction of the current target, inflicting 21193 Arcane damage to players in a cone and causing them to suffer additional 7417 Arcane damage every 1.5 sec for 9 sec. This effect stacks.

1270875.name: Blood Frenzy
1270875.description: Blood Frenzy20 yd range2.5 sec castCaster smells blood in the air, increasing their movement speed by 5%, and attack speed by 10% for 15 sec. This effect stacks for every nearby unit below 50% health.

1219536.name: Binding Javelin
1219536.description: Binding Javelin100 yd rangeInstant10 sec cooldownTaah'bat launches arcane javelins at targeted players, inflicting 10596 Arcane damage to players within 8 yards of the targets and tethering all players struck. Each tether inflicts 2649 Arcane damage every 1 sec and reduces their movement speed by 50%, increasing in intensity every 5 seconds until the javelin is destroyed. This effect stacks.

1240002.name: Barrier of the Oathsworn
1240002.description: Barrier of the OathswornItem Effect100 yd rangeInstantBecome Oath-Bound to a nearby ally every 30 sec.Directly healing the ally fulfills the oath to grant you 154 Intellect for 12 sec and shields your ally for 100% of any overhealing done.

90361.name: Spirit Mend
90361.description: Spirit Mend5 Focus25 yd rangeInstant30 sec cooldownRequires HunterRequires level 14The Spirit Beast heals the current friendly target for [0 + ((Ranged Attack Power * 0.6))] plus an additional [0 + ((Ranged Attack Power * 0.6) * .66) * (5)] over 10 sec.

433410.name: Fearful Shriek
433410.description: Fearful Shriek3 sec castFears enemies within 8 yards of the caster for 3 sec.Inflicts 2068 Shadow damage to enemies within 8 yards.

1233857.name: Warp Mind
1233857.description: Warp Mind100 yd rangeInstantReduces the movement speed of up to two targets by 50% for 8 sec and inflicts 7 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 8 sec.

1259794.name: Ritual Sacrifice
1259794.description: Ritual SacrificeUnlimited rangeChanneled (7 days cast)The caster prepares a target for sacrifice, stunning them for 1 sec and placing them atop a sacrifical altar.

32223.name: Crusader Aura
32223.description: Increases mounted speed by 20% for all party and raid members within 40 yds.

1241109.name: Niuzao's Resolve
1241109.description: Niuzao's ResolveInstantRequires MonkHealing Spheres now heal over 10 sec, and their healing is increased by up to 80% based on your missing health.

1217953.name: Giga Blast
1217953.description: Giga BlastUnlimited rangeInstantGallywix blasts lightning in a direction inflicting 60 Nature damage plus an additional 3 Nature damage every 1 sec for 10 sec. This effect stacks.

65116.name: Stoneform
65116.description: StoneformInstantRemoves all poison, disease and bleed effects and reduces all physical damage taken by 10% for 8 sec.

212743.name: Shuriken Storm
212743.description: Shuriken Storm100 yd rangeInstantRequires RogueRequires level 1Grants 1 combo point.

46968.name: Shockwave
46968.description: Sends a wave of force in a frontal cone, causing 7 damage and stunning all enemies within 10 yards for 2 sec.

30151.name: Pursuit
30151.description: Pursuit20 Energy6 - 25 yd rangeInstant15 sec cooldownRequires WarlockRequires level 14The Felguard charges an enemy, causing [0.1326 * (Spell Power * 0.5) * 1 * (1 + Versatility)] Physical damage and increasing its movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.Auto-Cast:Use anytime the Felguard's target is further than 8 yards away.(Right - Click to toggle)

1216731.name: Oil Canister
1216731.description: Oil CanisterInstantUpon defeat, the bike explodes and sends canisters of oil flying through the air. A player can catch the oil canister, suffering 7327 Nature damage and becoming Soaked in Oil for 1 min.Each canister that fails to hit a player explodes, leaving an Oil Slick behind.

366222.name: Summon Sayaad
366222.description: Summons a Succubus or Incubus under your command to seduce enemy Humanoids, preventing them from attacking.

392060.name: Wailing Arrow
392060.description:
Fire an enchanted arrow, dealing 489 Shadow damage to your target and an additional 245 Shadow damage to all enemies within 8 yds of your target. Non-Player targets struck by a Wailing Arrow have their spellcasting interrupted and are silenced for 1 sec.

Grants Deathblow.

460158.name: Jumpstart
460158.description: JumpstartInstantOnce all Darkfuse Mechadrones are defeated, Big M.O.M.M.A. attempts to jumpstart their depleted battery. This process causes it to take 200% increased damage and release jolts of energy every 1.5 sec for 12 sec. Each jolt of energy inflicts 7629 Nature damage to all players.Once their reserves are fully recharged, Big M.O.M.M.A. leaves behind Excessive Electrification.

1244907.name: Runic Glaive
1244907.description: Runic Glaive100 yd range3 sec castHurls an Arcane infused glaive at a target inflicting 7 Arcane damage and an additional 4 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 10 sec. The glaive bounces to 1 additional nearby player.

1243002.name: Fury of the War God
1243002.description: Fury of the War God300 yd rangeChanneled (10 sec cast)Nalorakk headbutts Zul'jarra into a Concussive Shock, then commands the Echoes of Nalorakk to charge her position. These collide with the first target encountered casting Echoing Fury.Any Echo of Nalorakk that reaches Zul'jarra triggers Demoralizing Scream. Each Echo remains for one additional Fury of the War God, then vanishes.

1214492.name: Scathing Review
1214492.description: Scathing ReviewUnlimited rangeInstantRecipient of a scathing review, stunning the target for 6 sec.

1236691.name: All-Devouring Nucleus
1236691.description: All-Devouring NucleusItem EffectInstantTaking damage has a high chance to cause you to devour the essence of nearby enemies, dealing 11120 Shadow damage split between them and healing you for 150% of the damage dealt.Fatal damage not exceeding 30388 instead restores you to 20% health and reconstitutes you as unstable void for 6 sec. Exceed 50% health to stabilize and avoid death. This effect may occur once per 8 min. The Nucleus is unable to deal damage while recharging.

1234529.name: Cosmic Maw
1234529.description: Cosmic MawUnlimited range1.25 sec castThe Voidwing shreds its current target between stellar jaws, inflicting 604821 Physical damage. The target's essence is devoured, inflicting an additional 22681 Cosmic damage every 0.3 sec and increasing damage taken from Dimension Breath by 200% for 10 sec.

411750.name: Elementium Shards
411750.description: Elementium Shards60 yd rangeInstantThe caster flings shards of burning elementium at several players within 40 yards every 0.2 sec for 1 sec. Each shard inflicts 8819 Fire damage.

1236709.name: Thorncaller Roar
1236709.description: Thorncaller Roar2 sec castIkuzz roars, inflicting 50845 Nature damage to all players while Bloodthorn Roots erupt around it every 2 sec for 6 sec.

1239152.name: Blessing: Nalorakk's Pressure
1239152.description: Blessing: Nalorakk's PressureInstantThe Loa of War grants you his blessing, unlocking the potential of your spirit. Your attack and spell power increase by 15%.Only active while in Zul'Aman.

1265871.name: Azure Sweep
1265871.description: Azure SweepInstantRequires EvokerEternity Surge upgrades your next Azure Strike to Azure Sweep, damaging all nearby enemies and dealing 75% additional damage. Azure SweepConcentrate azure energy into your tail and sweep to release pure magic upon an enemy and nearby targets for (163.185% of Spell Power) Spellfrost damage. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

1260824.name: Sacrificial Aegis
1260824.description: Sacrificial AegisInstant3 sec cooldownCaster exchanges their vitality for a shadow shield that absorbs damage.

1241598.name: Festering Bites
1241598.description: Festering BitesMelee Range1 sec cast5 sec cooldownDiseased fangs sink into the enemy, inflicting Nature damage and an additional 3 Nature damage every 3 sec for 12 sec.

1240257.name: Pulverizing Strikes
1240257.description: Pulverizing Strikes100 yd range1.9 sec castRuia marks several targets and launches a wave of force toward each of them in a frontal cone every 2 sec for 6 sec. Each impact inflicts 76268 Physical damage to players within the effect and applies Pulverized.

444743.name: Fireball Volley
444743.description: Fireball Volley50 yd range3.5 sec castInflicts 18014 Fire damage to all players within 50 yds.

119381.name: Leg Sweep
119381.description: Knocks down all enemies within 6 yards, stunning them for 3 sec.

1246067.name: Abyssal Bladestorm
1246067.description: Abyssal BladestormInstantWhirl an Abyssal Polearm for 6 sec, dealing 14 Shadow damage to enemies within 5 yards every 0.5 sec.

406086.name: Art of War
406086.description: Art of WarInstantRequires PaladinYour auto attacks have a 100% chance to reset the cooldown of Blade of Justice.

83243.name: Call Pet 3
83243.description: Summons your third pet to you.

132157.name: Holy Nova
132157.description: An explosion of holy light around you deals up to 154 Holy damage to enemies and up to 118 healing to allies within 12 yds, reduced if there are more than 5 targets.

275335.name: Punish
275335.description: Punish100 yd rangeInstantRequires WarriorShield Slam deals 15% increased damage and reduces enemies' damage against you by 3% for 9 sec. Multiple punishments may overlap.

431398.name: Empyrean Hammer
431398.description: Empyrean HammerUnlimited rangeInstantRequires PaladinA Holy Hammer called down from the skies to deal (46.55% of Attack Power) Holy damage to its target.

1262159.name: Fuel on the Fire
1262159.description: Fuel on the Fire40 yd rangeInstantRequires MonkExploding Keg also causes your next 2 casts of Keg Smash to summon a whirl of flame which spirals outwards, dealing (200% of Attack Power) additional Fire damage to each enemy struck.

431309.name: Ensnaring Shadows
431309.description: Ensnaring ShadowsUnlimited rangeInstantCurses a target with alabaster words inflicting 5298 Shadow damage and an additional 2649 Shadow damage every 1 sec, reducing movement speed by 50% for 9 sec.

453000.name: Siphon Life
453000.description: Siphon LifeInstantRequires WarlockCorruption deals 30% increased damage and its periodic damage heals you for 5% of the damage dealt.

204157.name: Throw Glaive
204157.description: Throw a demonic glaive at the target, dealing 7 Physical damage. The glaive can ricochet to an additional enemy within 10 yards. Generates high threat.

1256305.name: Voidfall Meteor
1256305.description: Voidfall Meteor100 yd rangeInstantRequires Demon Hunter Havoc, DevourerConsume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (200% of Spell Power) Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets. VengeanceFracture has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Soul Cleave consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing (540% of Attack Power) Shadowflame damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

384129.name: Neural Silencer Mk3
384129.description: Neural Silencer Mk3Item EffectInstantMakes you immune to some annoyances. Persists through death. Lasts 12 hrs.

1217526.name: Digestive Spittle
1217526.description: Digestive Spittle150 yd rangeInstantAzhiccar spews digestive acid at targeted players, inflicting 5298 Shadow damage every 1 sec for 6 sec to enemies within 10 yards of impact and leaving a pool of Digestive Spittle at their location.

1213803.name: Nailed
1213803.description: NailedUnlimited rangeInstantThe architect fires a nailgun at a player, inflicting 8477 Physical damage and causing them to bleed for 2119 Physical damage every 1 sec for 3 sec.

1221533.name: Erratic Ritual
1221533.description: Erratic Ritual50 yd rangeInstantThe caster performs a ritual, inflicting 2119 Arcane damage every 0.5 sec to all players for 6 sec.

377589.name: Ghoulish Frenzy
377589.description: Ghoulish FrenzyInstantDark Transformation increases the attack speed and damage of you and your Monstrosity by 5% for 15 sec.

465827.name: Warp Blood
465827.description: Warp Blood2.5 sec castThe caster warps the blood of all players within 60 yards, inflicting 3179 Shadow damage and absorbing 3179 healing received every 1 sec for 6 sec.

319836.name: Fire Blast
319836.description: Blasts the enemy for 318 Fire damage.

1246949.name: Shatter
1246949.description: Shatter100 yd rangeInstantRequires MageDamage from Frostbolt and Flurry applies Freezing to their targets. Stacks up to 20 times.Damage from Ice Lance shatters your enemies, consuming 4 stacks of Freezing and dealing (97.38% of Spell Power) Frost damage for each stack removed.

1214959.name: Chaotic Burst
1214959.description: Chaotic BurstInstantThe light infusion stuns Kystia for 15 sec, bringing her attacks to a halt, increasing all damage she takes by 100%, and expelling bursts of fel magic that inflict 30507 Chaos damage to all players every 1 sec.Additionally, this reduces the effectiveness of Kystia's Felshield.

316493.name: Elusive Quickhoof
316493.description: Elusive Quickhoof1.5 sec castSummons and dismisses this mount."The kind nature of alpacas makes them perfect as companions for the intrepid adventurer."Zone: Vol'dun

1217600.name: Whispering Waves
1217600.description: Whispering Waves100 yd rangeInstantRequires Shaman10% of Healing Wave's healing from you and your ancestors is duplicated onto each of your targets with Riptide.

1242310.name: Static Lightning
1242310.description: Static Lightning300 yd rangeInstantThe Great Exhaust rains lightning down when activated, inflicting 69 Nature damage to players in a 0 yard radius.

384965.name: Recompense
384965.description: Recompense100 yd rangeInstantRequires PaladinAfter your Blessing of Sacrifice ends, 50% of the total damage it diverted is added to your next Judgment as bonus damage, or your next Word of Glory as bonus healing.This effect's bonus damage cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health and its bonus healing cannot exceed 100% of your maximum health.

377103.name: Bonegrinder
377103.description: BonegrinderInstantRequires Death KnightConsuming Killing Machine grants 1% critical strike chance for 10 sec, stacking up to 5 times. At 5 stacks your next Killing Machine consumes the stacks and grants you 10% increased Frost damage for 10 sec.

1235623.name: Raging Squall
1235623.description: Raging Squall100 yd range3 sec castThe Sentinel of Winter creates Raging Squalls, inflicting 177958 Frost damage to players within 2 yards of the impact location. These squalls wander the arena for 1.5 min, inflicting 61014 Frost damage every 1 sec to players within 0 yards.

272770.name: The Dreadwake
272770.description: The Dreadwake1.5 sec castSummons and dismisses The Dreadwake."A ship unlike any other, held aloft by a gift from an unknown kraken-faced god of the deeps."In-Game Shop

411188.name: Dragonfire Traps
411188.description: Dragonfire TrapsUnlimited rangeInstantZskarn activates several nearby Dragonfire Traps that inflict 7349 Fire damage every 1 sec for 6 sec to all players within 11 yards of the trap. This effect stacks.

337327.name: Fluorescence
337327.description: FluorescenceItem EffectInstantReagents:Fluorescent Slime SampleWhen Obtained: You start to glow for 1 hour.

88423.name: Nature's Cure
88423.description: Cures harmful effects on the friendly target, removing all Magic effects.

275430.name: Lesser Ghoul
275430.description: Lesser GhoulInstantRequires Death KnightA mindless servant of the Scourge, raised to obey its master's commands for 6 sec.

1280172.name: Shadowfiend
1280172.description: Shadowfiend40 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestRequires level 20Shadow Word: Death has a 40% chance to summon a Shadowfiend for 5 sec when damaging targets below 20% health. ShadowfiendSummons a Shadowfiend to attack your target for 5 sec. [ Shadow: Generates 1 Insanity each time the Shadowfiend attacks. / DisciplineGenerates 0.1% mana each time the Shadowfiend attacks.]

468672.name: Pinch
468672.description: Pinch100 yd range1 sec castThe caster pinches their target, inflicting 26491 Physical damage and slowing them by 10% for 10 sec. This effect stacks.

2061.name: Flash Heal
2061.description: A fast spell that heals an ally for 2,610.

424366.name: Dreadfire Barrage
424366.description: Dreadfire BarrageUnlimited rangeInstantGnarlroot shoots missiles at his current target over 2 sec, each inflicting 26788 Physical damage and 15627 Shadowflame damage.Each impact also causes the target to take 24% increased Shadowflame damage for 34 sec. This effect stacks.

1243577.name: Reverse Gravity
1243577.description: Reverse Gravity300 yd rangeInstantDimensius targets random players then reverses their gravity after 5 sec, inflicting 18145 Shadow damage to players within 6 yards and sending them Airborne.Players hit by this effect who are already Airborne are immediately launched into Dimensius.

344174.name: Lightning Shield
344174.description: Lightning Shield10 yd rangeInstantRequires ShamanRequires level 1 ElementalSurround yourself with a shield of lightning for 1 hour.Melee attackers have a 100% chance to suffer (21.75% of Spell Power) Nature damage and have a 0% chance to generate 5 Maelstrom.Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman at a time. EnhancementSurround yourself with a shield of lightning for 1 hour.Melee attackers have a 100% chance to suffer (21.75% of Spell Power) Nature damage and have a 50% chance to generate a stack of Maelstrom Weapon.Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman at a time. RestorationSurround yourself with a shield of lightning for 1 hour.Melee attackers have a 100% chance to suffer (21.75% of Spell Power) Nature damage.Only one Elemental Shield can be active on the Shaman at a time.

343648.name: Solstice
343648.description: SolsticeInstantRequires DruidDuring the first 6 sec of every Eclipse, Shooting Stars fall 200% more often.

1245289.name: Devour
1245289.description: DevourInstantUpon reaching 100 energy Dimensius increases his Density, creating a powerful inward force that inflicts 9072 Shadow damage every 1 for 5 sec and pulls in players, Voidstars, Black Holes, and the Accretion Disk.After 5 sec any player outside of a Voidstar's Gravity Well is immediately pulled into Dimensius and consigned to Oblivion.

1245384.name: Fel Inferno
1245384.description: Fel InfernoUnlimited rangeInstantVelaryn wreathes the arena in flame, inflicting 4536 Fire damage to all players and an additional 983 Fire damage every 0.5 sec for 15 sec when each pillar of the inferno is created. This effect stacks.The flame inflicts 45381 Fire damage every 1 sec to any players who step into the firestorm.

186387.name: Bursting Shot
186387.description: Fires an explosion of bolts at all enemies in front of you, knocking them back, snaring them by 50% for 6 sec, and dealing 1 Physical damage.

453286.name: Set Fire to the Pain
453286.description: Set Fire to the PainInstantRequires Demon Hunter5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec.Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.

413231.name: Shadowy Apparition
413231.description: Shadowy Apparition100 yd rangeInstantRequires PriestRequires level 1Shadow Word: Madness conjures Shadowy Apparitions that float towards all targets afflicted by your Vampiric Touch for (63% of Spell Power) Shadow damage.

1217992.name: Workplace Accident
1217992.description: Workplace AccidentUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster throws the shipment at a nearby target, dealing 25 Physical damage within 5 yards and stunning for 3 sec.

427621.name: Impale
427621.description: Impale40 yd range2.5 sec castImpales a random target, inflicting 10597 Physical damage and causing the target to bleed for 7947 Physical damage every 3 sec for 12 sec.

232752.name: Glacial Advance
232752.description: Glacial Advance100 yd rangeInstantRequires Death KnightSummon glacial spikes from the ground that advance forward, each dealing [(63.4275% of Attack Power) * [(Attack Power * 0.98)][((Attack Power + Offhand Attack Power) * 2 / 3)] -- 2H, DW / Attack Power] Frost damage near their eruption point and applying Razorice.

1218508.name: Disguised
1218508.description: Disguised100 yd rangeInstantDisguises the target as an Illicit Rain employee.

450197.name: Skitter Charge
450197.description: Skitter Charge100 yd range2.125 sec castCharges at a random enemy's location, knocking back and inflicting 6205 Physical damage to any enemy in the way.

393438.name: Draconic Augmentation
393438.description: Draconic AugmentationLevel 80Item EffectInstantIncreases Agility, Intellect and Strength by 6 for 1 hour. Augment Rune.

202602.name: Into the Fray
202602.description: Into the FrayInstantYou gain 2% Haste for each enemy or ally within 10 yards, up to 8% Haste.

14914.name: Holy Fire
14914.description: Consumes the enemy in Holy flames that cause 1,186 Holy damage and an additional 421 Holy damage over 7 sec.

185123.name: Throw Glaive
185123.description: Throw a demonic glaive at the target, dealing 17 Physical damage. The glaive can ricochet to an additional enemy within 10 yards.

474061.name: Tank Buster
474061.description: Tank Buster100 yd rangeInstantThe Geargrinder slams into its current target, inflicting 73275 Physical damage, knocking them back and causing them to bleed for 3908 Physical damage every 1.5 sec for 25 sec. In addition, the target suffers 200% increased damage taken by Tank Buster for 25 sec. This effect stacks.The exertion causes the Geargrinder to expel a cloud of Exhaust Fumes and leak an Oil Slick that lasts for 5 min.

1276623.name: Singe Magic
1276623.description: Singe MagicInstantRequires WarlockSummons a Fel Ravager to assist you in combat for 20 sec and will interrupt their target when summoned.Turns into Spell Lock while on cooldown.

1226401.name: Mass Binding
1226401.description: Mass Binding2.5 sec castThe caster yanks players within 60 yards, inflicting 4536 Arcane damage every 1 sec for 12 sec. Upon expiration, players are Bound.The wrappings break when their victims move far enough away from the caster.

104275.name: Well Fed
104275.description: Well FedLevel 80InstantAgility increased by 8. Lasts 1 hour.

1216445.name: Bigger Badder Bomb Blast
1216445.description: Bigger Badder Bomb BlastUnlimited rangeInstantGallywix shells his primary target with many explosives inflicting 73275 Physical damage and increases Bigger Badder Bomb Blast damage taken by 200% for 1.2 min. This effect stacks and cannot be dodged or parried.Additionally inflicts 73275 Fire damage to players within 30 yards of the primary target, applying Blast Burns. These munitions (mostly) detonate on impact.However, some of the fuze within the bunch scatters about the arena.

1262411.name: Ritual Firebrand
1262411.description: Ritual FirebrandUnlimited rangeInstantThe caster brands several players with a ritual mark, causing a gout of flame to erupt underneath them every 4 sec for 12 sec that inflicts 25 Fire damage to players within 5 yards.

44425.name: Arcane Barrage
44425.description:
Launches bolts of arcane energy at the enemy target, causing 294 Arcane damage. 

For each Arcane Charge, deals 107% additional damage.

Consumes all Arcane Charges.

442981.name: Weaver's Tutelage
442981.description: Weaver's TutelageInstantProfessions Crafting and Gathering speed increased by 15%.

1219280.name: Gallybux Pest Eliminator
1219280.description: Gallybux Pest Eliminator100 yd rangeInstantHumane, high-voltage shock. Quickly eliminates pests. Gallywix attaches lightning tethers inflicting 2931 Nature damage every 0.5 sec to targeted players and any additional player between them and Gallywix. This effect increases in damage while tethered targets are further from Gallywix.

1222815.name: Arcane Bolt
1222815.description: Arcane Bolt30 yd range2.5 sec castThe caster launches a bolt of arcane energy at the target, inflicting 13245 Arcane damage.
